| 11.356 | UI: notification stream + toast queue | done | SHIPPED v1.11.374 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New web/src/lib/notification-stream.ts -- SSE subscriber + bounded toast queue. parseNotificationPayload accepts {id?, kind|type, message, title?, ts?, durationMs?, sticky?, action?{label,href?,payload?}}; unrecognised kind -> info; missing ts -> Date.now(); missing id -> generateFallbackId; null on malformed JSON. useNotificationStream({url=/api/notifications, maxVisible=5, autoDismissMs=5000, onMessage, onAction, onError, eventSourceFactory, enabled}) returns {toasts, connected, paused, dismiss, dismissAll, enqueue, setPaused, fireAction}. Behaviour: maxVisible cap with FIFO shift + cleared timers; enqueue dedups by id (in-place replace); sticky/durationMs<=0 skips auto-dismiss; hover-pause via setPaused freezes every timer + records remaining; resume schedules with remainder (a 1000ms timer paused at 400ms fires 600ms after resume); fireAction calls onAction then dismisses; closes EventSource + clears timers on unmount; SSR-safe; enabled=false skips SSE but keeps enqueue. Default constants exported. 26/26 tests pass. TypeScript clean. Out of scope: daemon-side /api/notifications endpoint, <NotificationPortal> component, App.tsx adoption, cross-tab dedup, explicit reconnect logic, rate-limit drop policy. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-notification-stream. Worker auto-w338. Bump 1.11.374. |
| 11.357 | UI: settings page redesign | done | SHIPPED v1.11.375 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). Existing pages/Settings.tsx has 47-case test suite -- rewrite deferred; this patch ships the underlying primitives. New lib/settings-sections.ts: SettingsGroup ('account'|'appearance'|'shortcuts'|'advanced'); SettingsSection {id, title, description?, group, keywords?, priority?, badge?}; groupSections (buckets by group, drops empty, priority asc within group + non-priority in source order); normalizeSearchQuery (lower + whitespace split); filterSections (AND semantics across id/title/description/keywords/group); filterAndGroupSections combinator; CANONICAL_SETTINGS_SECTIONS maps existing 7 tabs + shortcuts surface into the 4 groups (general+scribe+feature-flags->advanced, theme+density->appearance, notifications+locale->account, shortcuts->shortcuts). New lib/use-debounced-save.ts: useDebouncedSave({initialValue, onSave, debounceMs=300, onBeforeSave?, onAfterSave?}) -> {value, status, error, commit, flush, reset}. Optimistic UI: commit updates value immediately + status='pending'; rapid commits coalesce; timer -> 'saving' -> onSave -> 'idle' on success (server-authoritative value replaces optimistic when onSave returns one); on failure value reverts to last committed + status='error'; flush() fires pending save now; reset(next?) restores committed or override. SSR-safe; unmount cancels timer. 31/31 tests pass (14 sections + 17 debounced-save). TypeScript clean. Out of scope: pages/Settings.tsx rendering swap, per-section save endpoints, live cross-tab conflict detection, per-preference undo integration. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-settings-redesign. Worker auto-w339. Bump 1.11.375. |

Linear `<Progress>` / `<ProgressBar>` (11.256/v1.11.274) + `<Spinner>` (11.292/v1.11.310) already cover determinate bar with label, indeterminate spinner sizes (xs/sm/md/lg) + reduced-motion fallback, ARIA `role="progressbar"` with aria-label (11.327/v1.11.345) -- the single gap was the circular variant. This patch adds `CircularProgress` to `web/src/components/ui/progress.tsx`: SVG ring (track + arc circles) with `strokeDasharray=circumference` + `strokeDashoffset=(1-pct)*C` for determinate; quarter-arc + `animate-spin` for indeterminate. 4 sizes (xs=24px, sm=32px, md=48px default, lg=64px) with matched stroke widths (2/3/4/5px). 5 variants (default/success/warning/destructive/info) mapped to stroke-* tokens identical to the linear bar. `showPercent` renders rounded percent inside the ring; `labelText` (ReactNode) wins over showPercent and string-typed labelText also doubles as `aria-label`. ARIA precedence: explicit `ariaLabel` > string labelText > "Progress" fallback. 24 new test cases (52 total in progress.test.tsx); 78/78 pass under vitest 4.1.5 (progress + spinner). | 11.369 | UI: accordion primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.387 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). `<Accordion>` (11.272/v1.11.290) already covered the full dispatched contract: single/multi expanded mode (`mode`), keyboard nav (ArrowUp/Down + Home/End + Enter/Space via native button), smooth expand/collapse animation (transition-all duration-200 + chevron rotation) with reduced-motion gating via `useReducedMotion()`, full ARIA disclosure pattern (aria-expanded/controls + role=region + aria-labelledby), controlled/uncontrolled state, roving tabindex, disabled items. This patch ships three additive ergonomics: (1) `headerLevel: 'h2'|'h3'|'h4'|'h5'|'h6'` (default 'h3' byte-identical) -- pick the heading tag wrapping the trigger row; (2) `renderMode: 'always'|'lazy'` (default 'always' byte-identical) -- 'lazy' defers panel content mount until first open and keeps it mounted after collapse; (3) `collapsible: boolean` (default true, single mode only) -- false blocks closing the active item so the accordion always has exactly one open. New data attrs: data-header-level, data-collapsible, data-render-mode (root), data-accordion-item-mounted (per item). 16 new test cases in accordion.test.tsx (47 total); 47/47 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Per-page adoption deferred (additive; legacy byte-identical at all default values). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-accordion. | 11.370 | UI: select primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.388 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). Extends existing `<Select>` (single-value combobox with full ARIA combobox + listbox + activedescendant + keyboard nav + type-ahead + click-outside) with three additive props: `clearable` (X button on trigger resets value to ''), `searchable` (search input above listbox filters by case-insensitive label substring, suppresses legacy type-ahead, resets query on close), `searchPlaceholder` (default 'Search...'). Ships a new `<MultiSelect>` primitive in the same file: array-based `values`/`onChange`, Space/Enter/click toggles without closing, aria-multiselectable, per-option aria-selected + visual checkbox glyph, comma-joined labels up to maxLabelChips (default 3) collapsing to "<n> selected" above, data-selected-count attr, same clearable+searchable+searchPlaceholder ergonomics. 28 new test cases in select.test.tsx (52 total: 10 Select clearable/searchable + 3 filter helper + 14 MultiSelect + 1 data-selected-count rerender); 52/52 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.371 | UI: combobox primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.389 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). `<Combobox>` (11.275/v1.11.293) already shipped ARIA combobox pattern (role=combobox + aria-autocomplete=list + aria-expanded/controls/activedescendant), autocomplete input, custom value via `allowFreeText`, async loader slot (`loading` + `onQueryChange`), client-side filter, clearable, ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Escape nav. This patch closes the remaining dispatched bullets: (1) `debounceMs: number` (default 0, byte-identical) -- when > 0, `onQueryChange` fires once trailing-edge after the window of silence; internal client-side filter stays responsive regardless; pending timer cleared on unmount; (2) Home/End keyboard nav -- jumps highlight to first/last enabled visible option, no-ops when closed, skips disabled; (3) new `selectOptionsToComboboxOptions(options)` pure adapter widens `SelectOption[]` shape (from ./select) into `ComboboxOption[]` so both primitives share an options array. Adapter omits `disabled` key when input lacks one (exactOptionalPropertyTypes-safe), returns fresh array, preserves V type-parameter widening. 13 new test cases in combobox.test.tsx (40 total: 7 debounce/Home/End + 6 adapter); 40/40 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Out of scope (documented): multi-select (use `<MultiSelect>`), async cancellation (host owns AbortController), ReactNode label adapter, leading-edge debounce. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-combobox. Worker auto-w353. Bump 1.11.389. |
| 11.372 | UI: switch + toggle primitives | done | SHIPPED v1.11.390 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). `<Switch>` (11.287/v1.11.305) already shipped the full contract: `role="switch"` + `aria-checked`, motion-safe thumb transform with reduced-motion fallback, size variants (sm/md), inline label slot -- unchanged. This patch ships the new `<Toggle>` primitive at `web/src/components/ui/toggle.tsx`: button with WAI-ARIA pressed state (`role="button"` + `aria-pressed`), controlled (`pressed` + `onPressedChange`) or uncontrolled (`defaultPressed`) mode with `pressed` winning over `defaultPressed`, three sizes (sm h-7/md h-9/lg h-11), two variants (default filled-when-pressed / outline bordered-when-pressed), leading `icon` slot (aria-hidden) + label `children`, native Space/Enter synthesis flips pressed without extra keyboard wiring, default `type="button"` so the toggle does not submit a surrounding form, caller `onClick` runs after `onPressedChange` for predictable side-effect ordering, disabled is a click + keyboard no-op. Data attrs: data-section/pressed/size/variant + data-section="toggle-icon"/"toggle-label". 28 new test cases in toggle.test.tsx; 51/51 pass across toggle + switch tests under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): ToggleGroup (radio-vs-checkbox row, follow-on patch), animated pressed transition, per-surface adoption swap. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-switch-toggle. Worker auto-w354. Bump 1.11.390. |
| 11.373 | UI: slider + range primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.391 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/slider.tsx` ships two primitives: `<Slider>` (single-value) + `<RangeSlider>` (two-thumb). Both implement the full WAI-ARIA slider pattern (`role="slider"` + `aria-valuemin/max/now/text` + `aria-orientation="horizontal"`) with keyboard navigation: ArrowRight/Up=+step, ArrowLeft/Down=-step, PageUp/Down=+/-pageStep (default `max(step, (max-min)/10)`), Home=min, End=max. Discrete steps via `clampToStep(value, min, max, step)` pure helper (also exported) -- snaps in both directions so a `value={7}` with `step={5}` renders as 5 immediately. RangeSlider's low thumb exposes `aria-valuemax=<high>` and high exposes `aria-valuemin=<low>` so per-thumb bounds announce correctly; thumbs cannot cross (no-op when at constraint). Value tooltip via `data-section="slider-tooltip"` (single) or `-tooltip-low/-tooltip-high` (range); helper `sliderFormatters` map exports `{none, withPercent, fixed1, fixed2}`. Controlled (`value`/`onChange`) + uncontrolled (`defaultValue`) modes with the standard precedence (`value` wins). No-refire optimisation when snapped value equals current. Disabled drops tabindex to -1 + makes keyboard a no-op. 53 new test cases in slider.test.tsx (7 clampToStep + 24 Slider + 18 RangeSlider + 4 sliderFormatters); 53/53 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): pointer drag-to-set (keyboard-only v1), vertical orientation, marks/tick labels, inverted track, multi-thumb (>2). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-slider. Worker auto-w355. Bump 1.11.391. |
| 11.374 | UI: file upload progress UI | done | SHIPPED v1.11.392 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/file-upload-progress.tsx` renders a per-file upload panel with status badges, progress bars, per-row actions (cancel / retry / remove), and aggregate summary. Pure render-driven: host owns `items: UploadItem[]` (id/name/size?/progress 0..1/status: pending|uploading|success|error|cancelled/error?) plus three optional callbacks `onCancel(id)`/`onRetry(id)`/`onRemove(id)`. Per-status: pending+uploading -> Cancel button, error -> Retry button, success+cancelled -> Remove button; ProgressBar variant maps status -> info/success/destructive/warning/default; badge labels Queued/Uploading/Done/Failed/Cancelled. Button aria-label includes filename ("Cancel snapshot.zip" etc). Buttons render only when matching callback supplied. Pure helper `summarizeUploads(items)` exported: counts (total/done/failed/cancelled/uploading/pending), overallProgress (avg, treating success=1, cancelled/error retain last progress so operator sees how far it got), bytesTotal+bytesDone for rows that supplied size. Default `formatBytes(bytes)` IEC kibibyte ladder exported; overridable via `formatSize` prop (threads through both row + summary). Wrapper exposes data-count/done/failed/uploading + per-row data-status/data-id for tests. Pairs with `<FileDrop>` (11.270/11.352, file intake) and `lib/file-upload` (11.352, XHR). 41 new test cases in file-upload-progress.test.tsx (5 formatBytes + 7 summarizeUploads + 29 component); 41/41 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): inline thumbnails, auto-removal, drag-reorder, network-speed estimate, FileDrop adoption swap. | 11.375 | UI: virtualized table primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.393 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). Closes the three dispatched bullets: (1) header sticky -- `position: sticky; top: 0; z-10` within the wrapping container, opt-out via `stickyHeader={false}`; (2) horizontal scroll sync -- outer wrapper owns `overflow-x: auto` and header + virtualized body share the SAME `gridTemplateColumns` string so cells stay aligned at any horizontal scroll; (3) row selection -- opt-in via `selectable={true}` adds a leading 36px column with per-row checkbox + tri-state select-all in the header (toggles every VISIBLE row post-filter+post-sort), native `indeterminate` property + `data-indeterminate` attr for the mixed state. Sort UX: plain click toggles asc->desc->clear, shift-click appends (multi-column), aria-sort attr, priority badge when sortBy has > 1 column. Pure helpers exported: `buildGridTemplate(columns, selectable)` + `applyTableTransforms({rows, filters?, sortBy?, accessors})`. Filter+sort runs in canonical order (filter first, sort second). Column shape: `{key, label, width?, align?, sortable?, render?, accessor?, filterAccessor?, className?}`. Data attrs throughout for tests (data-section + data-row-key + data-row-selected + aria-sort etc). 28 new test cases in virtual-table.test.tsx (3 buildGridTemplate + 2 applyTableTransforms + 23 component); 28/28 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.376 | UI: stepper primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.394 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). `<Stepper>` (11.252/v1.11.270) already shipped horizontal/vertical orientation, complete/current/pending/error states with click-to-jump (`onStepClick` + `allowFuture`), per-step error flag, connectors per orientation, `aria-current="step"` on active, size variants (sm/md). This patch closes the dispatched "ARIA progressbar" bullet by adding a companion visually-hidden `<span role="progressbar">` with `aria-valuemin=0`/`aria-valuemax=<steps.length>`/`aria-valuenow=<completed-count>`/`aria-valuetext="Step <current+1> of <total>"`. valuenow counts only `state==='complete'` rows (retroactive errors are NOT counted as complete even before currentIndex). Past last step (`currentIndex >= steps.length`) caption flips to "Wizard complete". Empty steps array suppresses the progressbar. New `progressLabel?: string | null` prop overrides auto caption; `null` suppresses the visually-hidden progressbar entirely. New `showVisibleProgress?: boolean` prop renders a visible `<p>` caption above the list (default false, byte-identical). Wrapper now returns `<div data-section="stepper-root" data-orientation>` containing the visible caption + hidden progressbar + the legacy `<ol role="list">`; `<ol>` markup + ref forwarding unchanged. 11 new test cases in stepper.test.tsx (32 total: 21 legacy + 11 new); 32/32 pass under vitest 4.1.5. This patch closes the remaining dispatched "variants" bullet by adding `variant: 'default' | 'compact' | 'dense'` (default keeps legacy 11.149 layout byte-for-byte). compact halves row padding (pb-2/pl-5/gap-2) + dot size (h-3/w-3) + title text-xs; dense collapses to a single baseline-aligned line (pb-1/items-center, timestamp + title as siblings in a flex row), drops the description block entirely, suppresses the in-dot icon (8px dot too small). New data-section per inner block: data-timeline-title, data-timeline-timestamp, data-timeline-description (replaces class-only branching for downstream tests). Root `<ol>` + every `<li>` mirror `data-variant`. Variant threads through `groupByDay` mode (per-bucket rows render at the same density). 7 new test cases in timeline.test.tsx (17 total: 10 legacy + 7 new); 17/17 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files (2 pre-existing test errors on legacy `headers[0]` access unchanged). JS/TS coverage: line + block comments, single/double/template strings, numbers (incl. exponent), ~40 keywords (+TS-only: type/keyof/satisfies/is/never/unknown/infer/asserts), booleans + null + undefined. JSON: strings/numbers/true/false/null. Padding-bottom values: 16:9->56.25%, 4:3->75%, 1:1->100%, 21:9->42.857%, 9:16->177.778%; numeric 2->50%, 4->25%; invalid input falls back to 16:9 (56.25%). 14 new test cases in aspect-ratio.test.tsx (30 total: 16 legacy + 14 new = 6 ratioToPaddingBottom + 2 supportsAspectRatio + 6 forceFallback); 30/30 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.385 | UI: hover-card primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.403 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/hover-card.tsx` ships `<HoverCard>` -- a rich preview popover that opens on pointer hover, NOT on focus (focus reserved for `<Popover>`). Behaviour: mouseenter -> open after `openDelay` (default 300ms); mouseleave -> close after `closeDelay` (default 200ms); hovering the panel itself cancels pending close so the panel acts as a hover handoff surface; touchstart fallback for touch devices; Escape on trigger or document closes a stale-open card. Smart anchor positioning auto-flips when the preferred placement would overflow viewport (mirrors `<Popover>` flip-on-overflow math); placement (top/bottom/left/right) + align (start/center/end) + offset props. Portal rendering under auto-created `hover-card-root` node (escapes parent overflow/transform). ARIA: trigger gets `aria-describedby` pointing at the panel when open; panel uses `role="tooltip"`. Exported pure helper `computeHoverCardPosition(trigger, panel, viewport, placement, align, offset)` for tests + parallel primitives. Trigger data attrs: data-hover-card-trigger + data-hover-card-open. Panel data attrs: data-section="hover-card-panel" + data-hover-card-placement. 26 new test cases in hover-card.test.tsx (6 computeHoverCardPosition + 20 component: delay timers + cancellation + touch fallback + Escape + controlled/uncontrolled + onOpenChange + portal mount + ARIA links); 26/26 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-page adoption, sub-card/nested HoverCard, focus-triggered open (by design), arrow glyph on panel, long-press haptics, SSR. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-hover-card. Worker auto-w367. Bump 1.11.403. |
| 11.386 | UI: context-menu primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.404 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). `<ContextMenu>` already shipped right-click trigger, separator items, ArrowUp/Down + Enter keyboard nav, click-outside dismiss, Escape via focus-trap, portal rendering, danger/icon/disabled flags. This patch closes the remaining dispatched bullets: (1) sections via `sectionHeading?: boolean` flag (renders non-interactive uppercase label row, NOT selectable in keyboard nav); (2) sub-menu support via `items?: ContextMenuItem[]` on parent items -- parent renders trailing ChevronRight glyph, ArrowRight or hover opens nested menu positioned at parent item's right edge, hover on a non-parent closes active sub-menu, ArrowLeft/Escape closes sub-menu and returns to parent, Enter on parent opens sub-menu (does NOT fire onSelect; parent is opener), Enter on sub-menu item fires onSelect + closes ALL menus, click-outside both root + sub closes everything; (3) Home/End jumps to first/last selectable item in active menu (root or sub). Parent items expose `aria-haspopup="menu"` + `aria-expanded`; sub-menu panel has `role="menu"` + `aria-orientation="vertical"` + `aria-label="<parent label>"`. New data attrs: data-section="context-menu" (root), "-submenu" + data-parent, "-item" + data-context-menu-item, "-separator", "-section-heading", "-submenu-chevron". 15 new test cases in context-menu.test.tsx (27 total: 12 legacy + 15 new); 27/27 pass under vitest 4.1.5. Out of scope (documented): per-page adoption, nested-nested sub-menus (level 3+), ArrowLeft on root, type-ahead, custom sub-menu positioning, pinned/sticky sub-menu. | 11.387 | UI: menubar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.405 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/menubar.tsx` ships `<Menubar>` -- horizontal WAI-ARIA menubar with top-level triggers (File/Edit/View/Help) each opening a dropdown sub-menu. Roving tabindex; only the focused (or first enabled) trigger has tabindex=0. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right between triggers (wrap, skips disabled), ArrowDown/Enter/Space open dropdown, Home/End jump to first/last enabled trigger; inside open dropdown ArrowDown/Up moves highlight, Home/End jumps to first/last selectable, Enter fires onSelect + closes, ArrowLeft/Right swaps to prev/next trigger and opens its menu, Escape closes + restores focus, Tab exits the menubar. Hover-swap: once ANY dropdown is open, hovering a sibling auto-opens its menu; hover without one open does NOT auto-open (preserves click affordance). Single open menu at a time; click on the open trigger closes it (toggle). Click-outside dismisses. Disabled triggers drop out of the ArrowLeft/Right cycle. ARIA: root role=menubar + aria-orientation=horizontal + aria-label (default 'Menu bar'); trigger role=menuitem + aria-haspopup=menu + aria-expanded + aria-controls; dropdown panel role=menu + aria-orientation=vertical + aria-labelledby; dropdown items role=menuitem + aria-disabled; separators role=separator. Data attrs: data-section="menubar" (root); data-section="menubar-menu" + data-menubar-menu + data-menubar-open per top-level; data-section="menubar-trigger" + data-menubar-trigger per trigger; data-section="menubar-panel" per open dropdown; data-section="menubar-item" + data-menubar-item per dropdown item; data-section="menubar-separator". 30 new test cases in menubar.test.tsx; 30/30 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-page adoption, sub-sub-menus (use ContextMenu), type-ahead, mega-menu/multi-column layout (NavigationMenu in 11.388), trigger icons, portal-rendered dropdown panels. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-menubar. Worker auto-w369. Bump 1.11.405. |
| 11.388 | UI: navigation-menu primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.406 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/navigation-menu.tsx` ships `<NavigationMenu>` -- horizontal site nav with top-level direct links AND dropdown/mega-menu panels per item. Distinct from `<Menubar>` (11.387, application-style menus): NavigationMenu uses `<nav>` root + mixed `<button>` (sub-menu triggers) / `<a>` (direct links). Three sub-menu shapes: (1) `href` only -> direct anchor; (2) `sections: NavigationMenuSection[]` -> single-column list (1 section) or multi-column mega panel (2+ sections, with `data-is-mega="true"`); (3) `content: ReactNode` -> custom panel slot. NavigationMenuLink supports description, icon, external (auto target=_blank + rel + ExternalLink glyph). NavigationMenuSection groups links under an optional heading. Viewport-aware positioning via exported pure helper `computeNavPanelOffset(triggerLeft, panelWidth, viewportWidth)` -- shifts panel left when overflow + caps at leading edge; recomputes on window resize. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right between triggers (wrap, skip disabled), ArrowDown/Enter/Space opens sub-menu, Home/End jumps to first/last enabled, Escape closes + restores focus. Roving tabindex; hover-swap (once one panel open, hovering siblings auto-opens; hover without one open does NOT auto-open); click-outside dismisses. ARIA: <nav> + aria-label (default 'Site navigation'); sub-menu trigger has aria-haspopup=menu + aria-expanded + aria-controls; direct-link trigger has aria-disabled; panel has role=menu + aria-orientation=vertical + aria-labelledby. New data attrs throughout (data-section "nav-menu" / "-item" / "-trigger" / "-panel" / "-mega" / "-panel-list" / "-panel-content" / "-section" / "-section-heading" / "-link" / "-chevron"; data-nav-menu-item/-trigger/-link/-section/-panel + data-nav-menu-open; data-is-mega). 32 new test cases in navigation-menu.test.tsx (3 computeNavPanelOffset + 29 component); 32/32 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-page adoption, mobile/hamburger sheet variant, portal-rendered panels, multi-row mega with embedded forms, focus-on-open inside panel, sub-sub-menus. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-nav-menu. Worker auto-w370. Bump 1.11.406. |
| 11.389 | UI: pagination primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.407 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). `<Pagination>` (11.264/v1.11.282) already shipped the entire dispatched contract: page list with ellipsis truncation (buildPageItems), prev/next buttons, jump-to-page input (showJumpToPage), ARIA navigation role + aria-label, aria-current="page" on active, First/Last buttons (showFirstLast), sibling count. This patch adds ergonomic gaps: (1) `boundaryCount: number` (default 1, byte-identical) -- controls always-visible pages at each leading/trailing boundary; boundaryCount=2 produces "1, 2, ..., page, ..., N-1, N". (2) `pageLabelFormatter: (page) => string` callback overrides the per-page aria-label (default 'Page <n>'); throw-safe + empty-safe falls back to legacy default so assistive tech always gets a label. (3) `disabled: boolean` (default false) -- disables every interactive control (page buttons / prev / next / first / last / jump input + Go) + makes jump-form submit a no-op; mirrors on data-disabled="true|false" on the root nav. (4) Pure helper `buildPaginationItems(page, totalPages, siblingCount, boundaryCount=1)` exported for tests + alternate hosts. (5) New ellipsis data-section attr `data-section="pagination-ellipsis"` (legacy data-testid retained). 17 new test cases in pagination.test.tsx (43 total: 26 legacy + 17 new = 6 buildPaginationItems + 11 component); 43/43 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Out of scope (documented): per-page adoption, page-size selector, total-items count display, cursor-based pagination, compact mobile variant. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-pagination. Worker auto-w371. Bump 1.11.407. |
| 11.390 | UI: drawer-resize primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.408 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/drawer-resize.tsx` ships `<DrawerResize>` -- resizable side panel with draggable inner-edge handle. Controlled (`width` + `onWidthChange`) or uncontrolled (`defaultWidth`, default 280) modes. Width clamps to `[minWidth=200, maxWidth=600]` (overridable). Optional localStorage persistence via `storageKey` -- initial mount reads stored value (clamped on read), every commit writes back. Pointer drag uses pointerdown/move/up + setPointerCapture; primary button only; pointermove commits live width (no per-move persistence); pointerup writes final value to localStorage. Side semantics: `side="right"` (default) docks handle to panel's left edge, drag-left grows; `side="left"` docks to right edge, drag-right grows. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right (default keyboardStep=16, sign-aware per side), PageUp/PageDown (default pageStep=80), Home (min), End (max); all clamped. ARIA: handle role=separator + aria-orientation=vertical + aria-valuemin/now/max + configurable aria-label (default 'Resize panel'); tabIndex=0 for keyboard nudge. Exported pure helper `clampDrawerWidth(value, min, max)` for tests + alternate hosts; returns min for NaN / inverted bounds. | 11.391 | UI: split-view primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.409 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). `<SplitPane>` (11.274/v1.11.292) already shipped horizontal/vertical orientation, draggable divider with ARIA `role="separator"` + aria-orientation/valuemin/now/max, keyboard nav (Arrow+Home/End+Enter), localStorage persistence + cross-tab storage event sync, snap zones (collapseThreshold/expandThreshold). This patch closes the remaining dispatched bullets: (1) `collapseOnDoubleClick: boolean` (default false) -- dblclick on divider toggles between current open ratio and 0; `lastOpenRatioRef` remembers most recent non-zero ratio for restore; falls back to defaultRatio when no prior open size; collapse uses skipSnap so it reaches 0 regardless of min/max clamp; persists to localStorage; new data-collapse-on-double-click attr on divider. (2) `defaultSizePx: number` -- pixel-based initial size; on mount measures container via getBoundingClientRect() and converts to ratio using width (horizontal) or height (vertical); clamps to [0, 1]; storageKey ratio wins if present; horizontal/vertical orientation-aware. (3) `onSizeChange(pixels)` callback fires alongside `onRatioChange(ratio)` on every commit; computes px from current container; skipped during initial mount race. (4) New `web/src/components/ui/split-view.tsx` re-exports `SplitPane` as `SplitView` (+ type aliases SplitViewProps, SplitViewOrientation) so callers can use the dispatch-style name at the canonical import path. 16 new test cases in split-view.test.tsx (2 alias + 6 collapseOnDoubleClick + 5 defaultSizePx + 3 onSizeChange); 43/43 pass across split-pane + split-view (27 legacy split-pane unchanged + 16 new); TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-page adoption swap, three-or-more-pane composition (use Resizable in 11.392), touch-gesture collapse, animated collapse transition, pixel-mode min/max. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-split-view. Worker auto-w373. Bump 1.11.409. |
| 11.392 | UI: resizable layout primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.410 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/resizable.tsx` ships the N-pane resizer that pairs with `<SplitView>` (11.391, 2-pane). API: `panels: ResizablePanelConfig[]` (id/content/defaultSize?/minSize?/maxSize?/ariaLabel?), `direction: horizontal|vertical` (default horizontal), `storageKey?`, `keyboardStep?` (default 0.025), `ariaLabel?`, `handleAriaLabel?(prev,next)`, `className?`, `onSizesChange?(sizes)`. Boundary-local drag: only adjacent panels resize; siblings stay put (canonical multi-pane contract). Per-panel `[minSize, maxSize]` clamping during pointer drag + keyboard (whichever cap binds first stops the boundary). Pointer drag uses `setPointerCapture` + ratio math (delta = (coord - startCoord) / containerSize); pointerdown only honors button=0. Keyboard nav direction-aware: ArrowRight/Down grow start panel, ArrowLeft/Up shrink, Home pushes start panel to minSize, End to maxSize. localStorage persistence opt-in via `storageKey` (JSON-serialized size array, length+finite validation, fall back to defaults on mismatch / bad JSON), with `window` `storage` event listener for cross-tab sync. ARIA: root role=group + aria-orientation + ariaLabel; panel container role=group + aria-label; handle role=separator + aria-orientation (cross-axis per separator spec) + aria-valuemin/now/max (percent int). Two pure helpers exported for tests + adopters: `normalizeResizableSizes(raw, mins, maxs)` (NaN -> minSize, scales to sum=1, falls back to equal split on sum=0 / length mismatch, distributes slack to last panel within 1e-9 tol) and `applyResizableDelta(sizes, i, delta, mins, maxs)` (boundary-local, clamp on whichever pair-side cap binds). Data attrs: data-section=resizable + data-direction + data-panel-count on root; data-section=resizable-panel + data-panel-id + data-panel-index per panel; data-section=resizable-handle + data-handle-index + data-dragging per handle. 36 new test cases in resizable.test.tsx (6 normalizeResizableSizes + 6 applyResizableDelta + 24 component); 36/36 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-page adoption, imperative size set/get, collapse-on-double-click (ambiguous in N-pane; SplitView covers binary case), animated transitions, drag-anywhere-in-panel resize, pixel-mode sizing. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-resizable. Worker auto-w374. Bump 1.11.410. |
| 11.393 | UI: toaster utility | done | SHIPPED v1.11.411 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/lib/toaster.ts` ships the programmatic `toast` namespace (`.success` / `.error` / `.info` / `.warning` / `.promise` / `.dismiss` / `.clear`) plus an opt-in store factory `createToaster(config?)` and facade builder `createToastApi(store)`. Pure non-react module -- any code path (hooks, plain modules, route loaders, network handlers) can `import { toast } from '@/lib/toaster'` and push without owning a React context. Module-level singleton lives behind the `toast` export; hosts (e.g., `<ToastProvider>` 11.280) subscribe via `subscribeToaster(listener)` to get the full entry snapshot on subscribe + every mutation. Queue management: `push(kind, message, opts?)` returns id (monotonic from `now()*1000 + counter` so rapid calls never collide); `opts.id` reuse replaces the existing entry in place (powers `promise()` morphing); `visibleLimit` (default 100, floor 1) drops oldest with FIFO timer cancellation. Auto-dismiss: default 5000ms; error kind overrides to 8000ms so fail-states aren't missed on a busy screen; explicit `durationMs: Infinity` / 0 / negative is sticky; finite positive uses that. `dismiss(id)` / `clear()` cancel per-entry / all timers. `update(id, patch)` mutates entry contents (timer reschedules when `durationMs` is in the patch). `toast.promise(p, messages)` pushes a sticky info loading toast, awaits, then replaces in place with `success` (using `messages.success(data)` if function) or `error` (`messages.error(err)` if function) -- returns the inner value or rethrows; `messages.durationMs` threads into the final entry. Test helper `resetToaster()` clears the singleton between tests. Constants exposed: DEFAULT_TOAST_DURATION_MS=5000, DEFAULT_TOAST_VISIBLE_LIMIT=100. Timer host injectable via `config.now` / `setTimer` / `clearTimer` for deterministic tests. 41 new test cases in toaster.test.ts (26 store + 9 facade + 6 singleton); 41/41 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Out of scope (documented): rendering host (`<Toaster>` adapter that subscribes + portals -- existing `<ToastProvider>` covers the visual layer), position config, `toast.custom(node)`, cross-tab sync (per-tab is canonical for sonner / hot-toast), react-router clear-on-navigate, mass migration of legacy `useToast()` call sites. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-toaster. Worker auto-w375. Bump 1.11.411. |
| 11.394 | UI: theme-customizer primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.412 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/theme-customizer.tsx` ships `<ThemeCustomizer>` -- runtime CSS-variable editor with three canonical knobs (radius / hue / contrast), live preview, copy-to-clipboard export, opt-in localStorage persistence. Three sliders matching arps-design-system-v1/tokens.css: radius (0..24 px, drives --radius-{sm,md,lg,xl,2xl} ladder via sm=base*0.25 / md=base*0.5 / lg=base*0.75 / xl=base / 2xl=base*1.5), hue (0..360, threads into --brand / --brand-hover / --brand-pressed / --brand-subtle while preserving canonical S+L values 80%/65%, 80%/72%, 75%/58%, 50%/22%), contrast (0..100, linear lightness ramp for --text-primary 75..100%, --text-secondary 55..85%, --text-tertiary 40..65%, --border-default 18..38%). Two host modes: `target='scope'` (default) applies via inline style on root div so multiple instances can co-exist without bleeding; `target='root'` writes to document.documentElement.style.setProperty for whole-document re-skin (reversible via exported `clearThemeCustomizerRoot()`). Initial state precedence: localStorage[storageKey] JSON -> initialConfig -> DEFAULT_THEME_CONFIG; malformed/null/missing all degrade cleanly. Persistence opt-in via storageKey writes JSON on every change (quota / privacy mode write failures swallowed). Export button serializes as CSS `:root { ... }` block (default) or 2-space JSON (`exportFormat='json'`), fires `onExport(text, format)` regardless of clipboard support, writes to `navigator.clipboard.writeText` when available, flips label to "Copied!" for `copyFeedbackMs` (default 1500ms). Reset button restores DEFAULT_THEME_CONFIG (8 / 264 / 50). onChange does NOT fire on initial mount (caller already knows initialConfig); fires after every state change with the normalized config; latest-handler-wins via ref. Pure helpers exported: normalizeThemeConfig (clamp + NaN -> min), themeConfigToCssVars (13-key map matching tokens.css HSL-triplet shape "H S% L%"), serializeThemeConfigCss, serializeThemeConfigJson, clearThemeCustomizerRoot; DEFAULT_THEME_CONFIG / THEME_CONFIG_BOUNDS / THEME_CUSTOMIZER_DEFAULT_STORAGE_KEY constants exposed. ARIA: root role=region + aria-label; sliders use native `<input type="range">` with per-axis aria-label; export button aria-label adapts to format ("Copy CSS to clipboard" / "Copy JSON to clipboard"); reset button aria-label="Reset to defaults". Data attrs: data-section + data-target + data-radius/hue/contrast on root; data-section + data-control-key per control row; data-control-input + data-control-value per slider; data-section per preview element; data-copied on export button. 44 new test cases in theme-customizer.test.tsx (7 normalizeThemeConfig + 5 themeConfigToCssVars + 2 serialize + 1 clearRoot + 29 component); 44/44 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): saturation control, light/dark theme toggle, per-component overrides, import-from-clipboard parser, cross-tab storage sync, per-page adoption sweep (token-using components already consume the vars so target=root re-skins the app immediately), animated transitions between config changes. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-theme-customizer. Worker auto-w376. Bump 1.11.412. |
| 11.395 | UI: command-bar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.413 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/command-bar.tsx` ships `<CommandBar>` -- bottom-anchored quick action bar with multi-selection support, contextual actions, batch operations, full ARIA toolbar pattern. Host owns selection state (`selectedCount: number`); bar auto-hides when count=0 (override via `visible: boolean`). `actions: CommandBarItem[]` flat array of either `CommandBarAction { id, label, onClick, icon?, variant?, disabled?, shortcut?, ariaLabel? }` or `CommandBarSeparator { id, type: 'separator' }`. ARIA toolbar contract: root `<div role="toolbar" aria-orientation="horizontal" aria-label>`; single-tabstop pattern (exactly one action has tabIndex=0 at a time, rest have tabIndex=-1); Arrow keys move active tabstop (ArrowRight next, ArrowLeft wraps, Home -> first, End -> last); disabled actions + separators skipped in focus cycle; Escape -> onClearSelection callback (one-handed dismissal). Three variants per action: default / primary / destructive (each maps to canonical token-based classes); `disabled: true` sets native disabled + data-disabled + strips click + adds opacity/cursor-not-allowed; icon and shortcut slots optional (shortcut rendered as `<kbd>`). Three positions: 'bottom' (default, `fixed left-1/2 bottom-4 -translate-x-1/2 z-40`), 'top' (mirror at top edge), 'static' (inline, `align` controls mx-auto/mr-auto/ml-auto). Selection label: `defaultSelectionLabel(count)` returns "No selection" / "1 selected" / "<n> selected"; override via `selectionLabel: (count) => ReactNode`. Clear button renders when `onClearSelection` supplied AND `showClearButton !== false`; click + Escape both trigger same callback; `clearLabel` overrides default "Clear selection". `motionSafe` (default true) adds motion-safe:animate-in + fade-in + slide-in-from-bottom-4 ladder; disable via `motionSafe={false}` for static captures. Pure helpers exported: `defaultSelectionLabel(count)` + `isCommandBarSeparator(item)` type guard. Data attrs: data-section + data-position + data-align + data-selected-count on root; data-section + data-action-id + data-action-variant + data-disabled per action; data-section per icon/label/shortcut sub-nodes; data-section per separator/selection-label/clear. forwardRef forwarded to root toolbar div. 47 new test cases in command-bar.test.tsx (4 defaultSelectionLabel + 2 isCommandBarSeparator + 41 component); 47/47 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): drag-to-reorder, overflow menu when actions exceed bar width, per-page adoption sweep, animated count-up, multi-selection-state mode (union vs intersection), aria-keyshortcuts auto-binding (kbd is decorative; global hotkey binding is caller's responsibility). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-command-bar. Worker auto-w377. Bump 1.11.413. |
| 11.396 | UI: snapshot diff viewer | done | SHIPPED v1.11.414 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/snapshot-diff.tsx` ships `<SnapshotDiff>` -- side-by-side or unified text diff renderer with line numbers, fold unchanged hunks, prev/next change navigation, optional renderText hook for syntax highlighting. Owns: pure LCS-based line diff `computeLineDiff(before, after) -> DiffLine[]` (`{ type: 'equal'|'add'|'remove', oldLineNumber, newLineNumber, text }`; empty strings yield `[]` not `['']`); change-block grouping `findDiffChangeBlocks(lines) -> {startIndex, endIndex}[]` (consecutive non-equal runs = one block, which is the navigation unit); hunk grouping `groupDiffHunks(lines, contextLines=3) -> DiffHunk[]` (folds equal runs > 2*contextLines, keeps contextLines anchor on each side of each change block, no-anchor edges collapse so an all-equal diff folds entirely); side-by-side row generator `pairSideBySide(lines)` (pairs consecutive remove + add into one row, excess goes to its own row with the opposite side null). Navigation: Prev/Next buttons in header (cycle through change blocks, wrap at ends); keyboard `n` / `Alt+ArrowDown` next, `p` / `Alt+ArrowUp` prev, plain Arrow keys fall through to scroll, Ctrl/Cmd+n/p no-op; counter shows `<idx+1> / <N>` ("1 / 2") or "0 / 0" when no changes (buttons disabled). Controlled `activeChangeIndex` + `onActiveChangeIndex(idx)` or uncontrolled `defaultActiveChangeIndex=0`; both modes fire onActiveChangeIndex. Fold rendering: one button per fold ("... <N> unchanged lines (click to expand)") with aria-label "Expand <N> unchanged lines"; per-hunk expand state (expanding one fold leaves others collapsed); `defaultExpandedFolds=true` mounts with everything expanded. Syntax highlighting NOT bundled -- pass `renderText: (text, language) => ReactNode` to plug in Prism/Highlight.js/Shiki; default renders plain monospace pre-wrap. ARIA: root `role="region"` + tabIndex=0 + aria-label; fold button + nav buttons all have descriptive aria-labels; data attrs throughout (data-section + data-mode + data-language + data-change-count + data-active-change-index on root; data-line-type + data-line-index + data-active per row; data-side + data-line-type on side-by-side cells; data-fold-id + data-fold-count on fold row). forwardRef forwarded to region root. 52 new test cases in snapshot-diff.test.tsx (7 computeLineDiff + 4 findDiffChangeBlocks + 5 groupDiffHunks + 5 pairSideBySide + 31 component); 52/52 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): bundled highlighter (use renderText), word/character-level intra-line diff, three-way merge diff, Patience/Myers-O(ND) algorithm (LCS is correct + simple for v1), side-by-side empty-row alignment across multi-line adds, copy/share-link buttons (belong in the audit host). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-snapshot-diff. Worker auto-w378. Bump 1.11.414. |
| 11.397 | UI: tree-view primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.415 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/tree-view.tsx` ships `<TreeView>` -- hierarchical tree with expand/collapse, full WAI-ARIA tree keyboard pattern, HTML5 drag-and-drop reorder, lazy children loading, per-row disabled / icon / custom render slots. Host owns nodes array (`TreeNode { id, label, children?, isLeaf?, disabled?, icon?, data? }`); component owns visibility (expansion), selection, focus, and drag state, with controlled-or-uncontrolled mode for each. Keyboard (WAI-ARIA tree pattern): ArrowDown next visible row, ArrowUp prev, ArrowRight expands collapsed / moves to first child if already expanded, ArrowLeft collapses expanded / moves to parent if collapsed, Home first, End last visible, Enter/Space toggle expansion + select. Drag-and-drop: `enableDrag` flips draggable on every non-disabled row; drop position computed via pure helper `computeDropPosition(y, height, canHaveChildren)` (can-have-children: top quarter 'before' / middle 'inside' / bottom quarter 'after'; leaf: top half 'before' / bottom half 'after'); `onReorder(sourceId, targetId, position)` fires on drop with the user intent (host performs the mutation); self-drops and descendant-drops blocked at primitive level. Lazy load: node without `children` and without `isLeaf: true` is lazy; expanding fires `onLoadChildren(node)` and renders `loadingLabel` (default "Loading...") while the promise resolves; data-tree-loading="true" flips during the load. Pure helpers exported: `flattenTree(nodes, expandedIds) -> FlatTreeRow[]` (depth + parentId + hasChildren + expanded per row), `findNodePath(nodes, id) -> string[] | null`, `updateNodeChildren(nodes, id, children)` immutable deep replace (returns same array if id missing), `computeDropPosition(y, height, canHaveChildren) -> DropPosition`. ARIA: root `role="tree"` + aria-label; each row `role="treeitem"` + aria-level=depth+1 + aria-expanded (omitted on leaves) + aria-selected + aria-disabled; toggle button has dynamic aria-label "Expand" / "Collapse". Data attrs throughout: data-section + data-node-count on root; data-section + data-tree-id + data-tree-depth + data-tree-expanded (true/false/leaf) + data-tree-selected + data-tree-focused + data-tree-loading + data-drop-position per row; data-section on each sub-node (toggle, spacer, icon, label, loading, empty). forwardRef forwarded to root tree div. 55 new test cases in tree-view.test.tsx (7 flattenTree + 3 findNodePath + 2 updateNodeChildren + 6 computeDropPosition + 37 component); 55/55 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): multi-selection (single-id model for v1; follow-on can add selectedIds + shift/ctrl click), virtualized rendering for huge trees, custom drag preview / ghost element, touch-gesture drag (HTML5 drag does not fire from touch without polyfills), inline rename / cut / paste, cross-tree DnD (v1 same-tree only). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-tree-view. Worker auto-w379. Bump 1.11.415. |
| 11.398 | UI: cmd-history component | done | SHIPPED v1.11.416 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/cmd-history.tsx` ships `<CmdHistory>` -- terminal command history list with substring search (across command/output/cwd, case-insensitive, whitespace-trimmed), ANSI color rendering, per-row copy-to-clipboard (command/output/both), opt-in scroll restoration via storageKey, keyboard navigation (ArrowDown/Up/Home/End). Entry shape `{ id, command, output?, timestamp?, exitCode?, durationMs?, cwd? }`. Controlled-or-uncontrolled query (`query`/`defaultQuery`/`onQueryChange`) and selection (`selectedId`/`defaultSelectedId`/`onSelectedIdChange`). Counter shows `<filtered> / <total>` next to the search box. Exit-code badges: `data-status="ok"` (0) / `"fail"` (non-zero); hidden via `showExitCodes={false}` or when entry has no exitCode. Timestamps rendered as `HH:MM:SS` from ms epoch; hidden via `showTimestamps={false}`. Per-row buttons: Cmd (always), Out + All (only when entry.output exists); click writes via navigator.clipboard.writeText AND fires `onCopy(entry, target)` regardless of clipboard support (reliable side-channel for tests + non-https hosts). Serialization: `command` -> entry.command; `output` -> entry.output ?? ''; `both` -> command + '\n---\n' + output. Scroll restoration: on every scroll persists scrollTop to localStorage[`cmd-history-scroll:<key>`]; restores via useLayoutEffect on mount (no flash); read/write failures swallowed. ANSI parser `parseAnsi(text)` walks once with `\x1b\[([0-9;]*)m` pattern, maintains rolling style, emits AnsiSegment[] (`{ text, style }`). Supported SGR codes: 0 reset, 1 bold, 2 dim, 3 italic, 4 underline, 7 inverse, 9 strikethrough, 22/23/24/27/29 turn-offs, 30-37 fg, 39 default fg, 40-47 bg, 49 default bg, 90-97 bright fg, 100-107 bright bg. Unsupported codes (256-color, truecolor, OSC) ignored silently. `ansiStyleToClassName(style)` maps to Tailwind utility classes (text-red-500, bg-emerald-500/30, font-bold, opacity-60, italic, underline, line-through, invert). Pure helpers exported: parseAnsi, ansiStyleToClassName, filterCmdHistory(entries, query), formatCmdHistoryClipboard(entry, target). ARIA: root `role="region"` + tabIndex=0 + aria-label; per-row `role="listitem"` + aria-label="Command: ..."; copy buttons have aria-label "Copy command/output/both"; search input has aria-label "Search command history". Data attrs throughout (data-section + data-entry-count + data-filtered-count on root; data-section + data-entry-id + data-selected + data-exit-code per row; data-section + data-status on exit-code badge; data-section per timestamp/command/cwd/output and per-segment output-segment). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 56 new test cases in cmd-history.test.tsx (12 parseAnsi + 3 ansiStyleToClassName + 6 filterCmdHistory + 4 formatCmdHistoryClipboard + 31 component); 56/56 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.399 | UI: diff editor primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.417 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/diff-editor.tsx` ships `<DiffEditor>` -- Monaco-flavoured diff editor with per-hunk accept/reject buttons, inline edit mode (toggle -> textarea), hunk navigation (Prev/Next + keyboard n/p + Alt+ArrowUp/Down), optional syntax highlighting via renderText prop, fold unchanged regions. Reuses the diff engine `computeLineDiff` / `findDiffChangeBlocks` / `groupDiffHunks` from `<SnapshotDiff>` (11.396) so the two primitives stay strictly in sync (any future engine upgrade flows through both). API: `before`/`after` strings + `onAfterChange(next)`; `language`/`contextLines`/`showLineNumbers`/`renderText`; controlled-or-uncontrolled `activeHunkIndex` + `decisions: Map<number, 'accept'|'reject'>`; `onAcceptHunk(range)` / `onRejectHunk(range)` per-block callbacks; `onDecisionsChange(map)` for batched persistence; `readOnly`/`defaultEditMode`/`defaultExpandedFolds` flags; configurable labels (`acceptLabel`/`rejectLabel`/`editLabel`/`doneLabel`). Per-hunk Accept + Reject buttons attached to the LAST line of every change block; rejected rows render with line-through + opacity-60 + data-decision="reject". Counter shows `<idx+1> / <N>` ("1 / 2") or "0 / 0" when no changes. Pure helper `applyHunkDecisions(before, after, decisions): string` projects the decision Map onto the after string -- equal lines verbatim, add lines included on accept (default) / excluded on reject, remove lines excluded on accept / included on reject (restoring before-side). Lines outside any block default to accept. Helpers `nextHunkIndex(current, total)` + `prevHunkIndex(current, total)` exported for hosts building custom nav. Edit mode: textarea bound to `after`, fires `onAfterChange(next)` on typing; diff recomputes on every render of before/after. readOnly hides Edit + Accept + Reject. ARIA: root `role="region"` + tabIndex=0 + aria-label; textarea aria-label="After content"; per-button aria-label "{Accept|Reject} hunk N" / "Previous hunk" / "Next hunk" / "Edit"|"Done"; fold buttons aria-label "Expand N unchanged lines". Data attrs throughout (data-section + data-language + data-change-count + data-active-hunk-index + data-edit-mode + data-read-only on root; data-section + data-line-type + data-line-index + data-block-index + data-decision + data-active per row; data-section per accept/reject/fold sub-nodes). forwardRef forwarded to region root. 49 new test cases in diff-editor.test.tsx (8 applyHunkDecisions + 5 nextHunkIndex/prevHunkIndex + 36 component); 49/49 pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.400 | UI: markdown renderer primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.418 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/markdown-renderer.tsx` ships `<MarkdownRenderer>` -- a secure markdown-to-React renderer with URL sanitization, fenced-code routed through `<CodeBlock>` (11.379) for syntax highlighting, optional GFM checkbox lists, custom anchor click hook. Block grammar: ATX headings 1..6, fenced code (` ``` ` or ` ```lang `), blockquote (`> ` lines), horizontal rule (`---`/`***`/`___`), unordered list (`-`/`*`/`+`), ordered list (`1. `), checkbox list (`- [ ]`/`- [x]`/`[X]`), paragraph (blank-line separated). Inline grammar: `` `code` ``, `**bold**`, `*italic*`/`_italic_`, `~~strikethrough~~`, `[label](url)` with URL sanitization, bare `http(s):` autolink. URL sanitization via exported pure helper `safeUrl(url): string | null`: allows http/https/mailto/tel/relative-path/fragment/no-scheme-relative; blocks empty/whitespace/javascript:/data:/vbscript:/file:/any-unknown-scheme (safer fallback). When a `[label](url)` link sanitizes to null the anchor is dropped but the label remains as plain text. Override via `sanitizeUrl` prop to allow app schemes (e.g. `myapp://`). Anchor rendering: `linkTarget` (default '_blank') with `rel="noopener noreferrer"` auto-applied when blank, omitted for self; `onAnchorClick(href, event)` fires with SANITIZED href; raw URL preserved on `data-href-raw` attr for tests + analytics. Checkbox lists: contiguous `- [ ]`/`- [x]` runs render as `<input type="checkbox">` list; `data-checkbox-index` is FLAT across whole document for stable cross-list addressing; `data-checked` mirrors state; `onCheckboxChange(flatIdx, checked)` fires on toggle; read-only when no handler supplied; `enableCheckboxes={false}` collapses to plain ul with `data-checkbox-disabled="true"`. Code-block integration: fenced code blocks delegate to existing `<CodeBlock>` primitive (11.379) so the markdown renderer inherits syntax highlighting + copy button + line numbers + theme without duplicating logic; wrapper marked `data-section="markdown-code-block"` for test locality; `language` prop provides fallback for un-tagged fences. Pure helpers exported: `safeUrl(url)`, `parseMarkdownBlocks(source) -> MarkdownBlock[]`, type `MarkdownBlockType` union. ARIA: root `role="region"` + aria-label; checkbox inputs aria-labelled with item text; safe link rel-noopener-noreferrer when target=blank. Data attrs throughout (data-section + data-block-count on root; data-section + data-level per heading; data-checkbox-index + data-checked per checkbox-item; data-href-raw per link; data-section per inline-code/bold/italic/strike/autolink). forwardRef forwarded to root region. 52 new test cases in markdown-renderer.test.tsx (8 safeUrl + 11 parseMarkdownBlocks + 33 component); 52/52 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): GFM tables (pipe-table parsing non-trivial; follow-on), HTML pass-through (intentionally sanitized; raw HTML denied by omission), footnotes/definitions/reference-style links, image rendering (CORS + referrer-policy concerns; follow-on), math/LaTeX, smart-typography (curly quotes, em-dash), adoption sweep through existing pages (legacy lib/markdown.tsx continues to drive Plan + Morning until separate migration dispatch). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-markdown-renderer. Worker auto-w382. Bump 1.11.418. |
| 11.401 | UI: list-virtualizer primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.419 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/list-virtualizer.tsx` ships `<ListVirtualizer>` -- generalised virtual list with dynamic per-row heights, smooth scroll, sticky headers, keyboard navigation. Distinct from `<VirtualList>` (11.197, fixed-height) and `<VirtualTable>` (11.375, tabular). API: `items: ListVirtualizerItem<T>[]` (`{ id, data, type?: 'row'|'header', estimatedHeight?, disabled? }`); `renderItem(item, ctx)` slot; controlled-or-uncontrolled `activeIndex`; `stickyHeaders` flag; `scrollBehavior` default; `onEndReached` + `endReachedThreshold`; `enableKeyboardNav` toggle; imperative handle `{ scrollToIndex(idx, behavior?), scrollToTop(behavior?), getScrollTop() }`. Dynamic heights: ref-callback on every rendered row captures `getBoundingClientRect().height` on mount; measurement Map feeds back into cumulative offset array; stale measurements drop when items.length shrinks; per-item `estimatedHeight` shadows prop-level `estimatedRowHeight` (default 48). Smooth scroll: `scrollBehavior` prop drives auto-scroll-into-view + imperative API; per-call override supported. Sticky headers: items with `type: 'header'` render in body alongside rows; when `stickyHeaders={true}` the LAST header whose offset <= scrollTop pins to top via `position: sticky` + `translateY(scrollTop)`; sticky copy carries `data-sticky="true"`, body copy at that position omitted to avoid duplicates; offset math unaffected. Keyboard: ArrowDown/Up +/- 1; PageDown/Up +/- viewport/estimate items (min 1); Home -> 0; End -> last; active row auto-scrolls into view; disabled via `enableKeyboardNav={false}` (also flips root tabIndex to -1). End-reached: on every scroll computes `scrollHeight - scrollTop - clientHeight`; when <= `endReachedThreshold` (default 64 px) fires `onEndReached()`. ResizeObserver re-measures viewport on container resize (graceful fallback when unavailable). Pure helpers exported: `computeItemOffsets(items, measured, defaultHeight) -> offsets array (length items.length+1)`, `findVisibleRange(offsets, scrollTop, viewportHeight, overscan) -> {start, end}` (binary search by scrollTop + forward walk + overscan clamp), `findStickyHeaderIndex(items, offsets, scrollTop) -> index|null` (last header at or above scrollTop). ARIA: root `role="region"` + `tabIndex` (0 or -1 per enableKeyboardNav) + aria-label. Data attrs throughout (data-section + data-item-count + data-active-index + data-sticky-headers on root; data-section + data-item-id + data-item-index + data-item-type + data-active + data-disabled per row; data-section + data-sticky-index on sticky overlay; data-sticky=true on inner sticky item). forwardRef returns `ListVirtualizerHandle` imperative API. 42 new test cases in list-virtualizer.test.tsx (5 computeItemOffsets + 6 findVisibleRange + 4 findStickyHeaderIndex + 27 component); 42/42 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): horizontal virtualization (single column only), adaptive overscan from scroll velocity, anchored/pinned scroll on prepend (chat-window), row recycling pool (React reconciliation already covers), primitive-level onRowClick/onRowHover (host attaches via renderItem), role=list/listitem on every row (region role chosen since grouped rows + headers do not always map cleanly to a list). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-list-virtualizer. Worker auto-w383. Bump 1.11.419. |
| 11.402 | UI: skeleton primitives | done | SHIPPED v1.11.420 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/skeleton-set.tsx` ships `<SkeletonSet>` -- predefined skeleton compositions for the four canonical page silhouettes (`card` / `list` / `table` / `detail-page`) with shimmer animation, reduced-motion respect. Higher-level composition built on top of existing per-shape primitives in `skeleton.tsx` (Skeleton.Card / Skeleton.List / Skeleton.Table / Skeleton.Text from 11.135/11.174/11.208/11.255) so the new primitive inherits the canonical token colour + pulse rhythm without re-implementing silhouettes. Variants: `card` renders responsive grid of N `<Skeleton.Card>` (default 3; 1/2/3 cols on phone/sm/lg via Tailwind responsive grid; configurable via `count`); `list` delegates to `<Skeleton.List>` (default 6 rows + 2 lines/row + no avatar; configurable via `rows`/`showAvatar`/`linesPerRow`); `table` delegates to `<Skeleton.Table>` (default 5 body rows + header, 4 cols; configurable via `rows`/`cols`); `detail-page` renders hero header (title + subtitle bars rendered locally with shared shimmer) over 2-col body (main: `<Skeleton.Text lines=3>` + `<Skeleton.Card>`; side: 2 `<Skeleton.Card>`s). Reduced motion: reads `useReducedMotion()` (media `(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)`); when true, pulse animation drops and root flips `data-motion-reduced="true"` so tests + downstream styles branch. Sanity guards: count/rows/cols clamp to >=0 and floor to integer (negative or non-finite -> 0); linesPerRow clamps to >=1. ARIA: root `role="status"` + `aria-busy="true"` + `aria-label` (default `"Loading <variant>"`). Data attrs throughout (data-section + data-variant + data-motion-reduced on root; data-section per variant container; data-card-count on cards wrapper; data-skeleton-set-card-index per card; data-skeleton-detail "title"/"subtitle" on detail header bars). forwardRef forwarded to root + extra HTMLAttributes spread. 28 new test cases in skeleton-set.test.tsx (per-variant default count + override + clamp + structure; reduced-motion matchMedia; role/aria-busy/aria-label; forwardRef; className; data attrs); 28/28 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): per-card content slot (avatar/thumbnail variants -- richer per-card belongs in follow-on), form skeleton variant (field silhouettes do not match card/list/table/detail axis), stat dashboard variant (StatCardShape covers single tiles; bundling into dashboard composition is separate), adoption sweep through existing loading states (SuspenseWrapper + per-page custom skeletons still ship their own; SkeletonSet is canonical surface for new adopters). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-skeleton-set. Worker auto-w384. Bump 1.11.420. |
| 11.403 | UI: rich-text editor primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.421 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/rich-text-editor.tsx` ships `<RichTextEditor>` -- a Slate-flavoured contract over native contentEditable + document.execCommand (project's zero-new-dep budget preserved -- no Slate/Lexical/ProseMirror runtime dependency; surface contract `value: string` HTML stays portable for a future structured backend). Toolbar: 6 buttons (Bold/Italic/Underline/Bullet list/Numbered list/Link) drive execCommand bold/italic/underline/insertUnorderedList/insertOrderedList/createLink; after each command innerHTML propagates via onChange. Link insertion: Link button calls `onLinkRequest()` if supplied else falls back to window.prompt('Link URL'); URL passes through pure helper `safeRichTextHref` (allows http/https/mailto/tel/relative/fragment; blocks javascript/data/vbscript/file/unknown scheme; null returns silently drop the operation). Paste sanitization: onPaste intercepts clipboard, reads text/html (falls back to text/plain), strips disallowed tags + attrs via pure helper `sanitizeHtmlForRichText`, inserts cleaned HTML via execCommand('insertHTML'), fires `onPaste(sanitized, raw)` for metrics. Sanitizer behavior: tags NOT in `allowedTags` are inline-stripped (children survive, wrapper removed -- script/iframe/style collapse); attrs NOT in `allowedAttrs[tag]` are dropped (onclick/onload/style evaporate); `<a href="...">` runs through safeRichTextHref (rejects -> href omitted); survivors gain defensive `rel="noopener noreferrer"` + `target="_blank"`. Controlled HTML: editor mirrors `value` into contentEditable innerHTML only when it differs from current DOM (preserves caret during typing). readOnly flips contentEditable=false, disables toolbar, sets aria-readonly=true + data-read-only=true, short-circuits paste. Placeholder: serializes to data-placeholder on content; data-empty flips on root when value is empty/`<br>`/`<p></p>`; consumers style via `[data-empty="true"]::before { content: attr(data-placeholder) }`. Pure helpers exported: `safeRichTextHref`, `sanitizeHtmlForRichText`, `extractRichTextLinks`, DEFAULT_RICH_TEXT_ALLOWED_TAGS + DEFAULT_RICH_TEXT_ALLOWED_ATTRS constants, RICH_TEXT_TOOLBAR_COMMANDS array (canonical command order). ARIA: root wrapper data-section + data-read-only + data-empty; toolbar role=toolbar + aria-label='Formatting' + per-button aria-label + data-section + data-command; content role=textbox + aria-multiline=true + aria-readonly (when readOnly) + data-section + data-placeholder. forwardRef forwarded to content textbox div. 46 new test cases in rich-text-editor.test.tsx (6 safeRichTextHref + 8 sanitizeHtmlForRichText + 3 extractRichTextLinks + 1 RICH_TEXT_TOOLBAR_COMMANDS + 28 component); 46/46 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): true Slate/Lexical/ProseMirror backend (execCommand is canonical native API for v1; migration to structured doc model is larger follow-on; surface contract portable), mention/hashtag autocomplete (host layer), image/file uploads, tables, undo/redo on top of native browser undo (belongs in structured backend follow-on), collaborative editing (OT/CRDT out of scope), adoption sweep through existing comment/chat composers (canonical surface for new adopters; existing ad-hoc textareas ship until migration dispatch). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-rich-text. Worker auto-w385. Bump 1.11.421. |
| 11.404 | UI: search-input primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.422 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/search-input.tsx` ships `<SearchInput>` -- input with search icon, clear button, debounced onChange, optional keyboard shortcut display, optional recent-searches dropdown. Debounced onChange: typing reflects locally synchronously (responsive UX) but external onChange callback debounced by debounceMs (default 200); debounceMs<=0 or non-finite fires immediately; pending timers cleared on unmount/clear/Enter+submit/recent-select (those paths emit immediately so host sees authoritative value). Clear button: renders when showClearButton!==false AND value non-empty AND not disabled/readOnly; click clears value + cancels pending debounce + fires onChange('') immediately + refocuses input; clearLabel overrides default 'Clear search'. Shortcut hint: when shortcut prop supplied AND value empty AND input not focused, decorative `<kbd>` badge renders on right edge (kbd is decorative; host binds the actual hotkey -- documented as out of scope). Recent searches dropdown: when recentSearches non-empty AND input focused AND not disabled/readOnly, dropdown opens below input; entries filter against current value via pure helper `filterRecentSearches` (case-insensitive substring with trimmed query, duplicates collapsed first-occurrence-kept, empty/whitespace-only entries dropped, capped at maxRecent default 8); keyboard nav ArrowDown/Up cycle wrap; Escape closes; Enter on highlight fires onSelectRecent(entry) + onChange(entry) immediately (bypasses debounce). Submit: Enter without highlight fires onSubmit(query) + flushes debounce. Controlled-or-uncontrolled via value/defaultValue + onChange. Disabled/readOnly disable input + hide clear + close dropdown; data-disabled/data-read-only mirror on root. autoFocus forwarded to native input. ARIA: input role=searchbox + aria-label + aria-autocomplete=list (when recents exist) + aria-expanded (when dropdown open); dropdown role=listbox + aria-label='Recent searches'; items role=option + aria-selected; clear button + shortcut kbd accessible. Data attrs throughout (data-section + data-has-value + data-focused + data-disabled + data-read-only on root; data-section per icon/input/clear/shortcut/recent/recent-item; data-active + data-recent-index per recent item). forwardRef forwarded to native input. 41 new test cases in search-input.test.tsx (7 filterRecentSearches + 34 component); 41/41 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented): binding shortcut to global hotkey (host responsibility; kbd is decorative), async suggestionsLoader (only static recentSearches for v1; future follow-on adds promise loader), arbitrary object entries (only strings), sticky trending/popular divider in dropdown, inline search-while-typing/command-palette semantics (belongs to command-palette primitive). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/auto-ui-search-input. Worker auto-w386. Bump 1.11.422. |

New data attrs: data-size + data-collapse-actions on root; data-section per inner block (page-header-lead, page-header-text, page-header-title, page-header-subtitle, page-header-actions); legacy data-testid attrs on actions / breadcrumbs / back button retained byte-identical for back-compat. 12 new test cases in page-header.test.tsx (32 total: 20 legacy + 12 new -- root data attrs, default flex-col md:flex-row when actions present, false flag keeps flex-row, responsive classes only on actions presence, w-full + md:w-auto + md:shrink-0 on actions row, shrink-0 stays when collapse disabled, size sm/md/lg title + subtitle classes, data-size mirrors prop on rerender, data-section on title/subtitle/lead/text/actions inner blocks); 32/32 pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Legacy 20 tests pass byte-identical (no surface breakage).
