| 11.455 | UI: chart-gantt primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.473 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-gantt.tsx` ships `<ChartGantt>` -- pure-SVG horizontal Gantt chart. Each row is a task bar stretched between `start` and `end`; optional progress fill shades the completed portion. Dependency arrows route from one task's end to another task's start with an elbow path + arrowhead marker. A `today` marker line highlights the current date when supplied + in range. Per-task tooltip surfaces label, start, end, and optional progress percent. Per-task click handler. Date parsing accepts both ISO strings and epoch numbers; unparseable-date tasks are silently skipped so the chart never crashes. API: `tasks: ChartGanttTask[]` ({id, label, start: string|number, end: string|number, progress?: 0..1, color?, group?, dependencies?: string[]}); `width?` (default 720) / `height?` (default 280); `rowHeight?` (default 20) / `rowGap?` (default 6); `labelWidth?` (default 120); `startDate?` / `endDate?` (overrides); `today?: string|number`; `showToday?` / `showDependencies?` / `showLabels?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showProgress?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Gantt chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatDate?`; `tickCount?` (default 5); `defaultBarColor?` ('#2563eb') / `todayColor?` ('#dc2626'); `onTaskClick({task, index})`. Chart height auto-expands when tasks * (rowHeight + rowGap) exceeds the configured height. Dependency arrows use an elbow at max(fromX+6, midpoint) so they always sit to the right of the source. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_GANTT_WIDTH/HEIGHT/ROW_HEIGHT/ROW_GAP/LABEL_WIDTH/TICK_COUNT/BAR_COLOR/TODAY_COLOR`; `parseGanttDate(d)` -- string/number -> epoch ms; null for non-finite/unparseable; `getGanttDateBounds(tasks, startOverride?, endOverride?)` -- min/max; ignores unparseable; override wins; empty (0,1); collapsed expands; `getGanttRangeRatio(value, min, max)` -- clamps [0,1]; collapsed -> 0; `getGanttTaskColor(task, defaultColor)` -- per-task wins; `getGanttTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive; collapsed -> [min]; min count 2; `formatGanttDate(epoch, formatter?)` -- formatter wins; default YYYY-MM-DD; non-finite -> ''; `buildGanttDependencyPath(fromX, fromY, toX, toY)` -- M + 3 L elbow path; `describeGanttChart(tasks, formatDate?)` -- ARIA summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-bar role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-bar aria-label '<label>: <start> to <end>'. | 11.456 | UI: chart-pareto primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.474 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-pareto.tsx` ships `<ChartPareto>` -- pure-SVG Pareto chart. Categories sort by value descending (component auto-sorts regardless of input order) and render as bars on the left axis; a cumulative percentage line + dot markers overlay on the right axis (0..100%). A dashed threshold reference line (default 80%, clamped to [0, 1]) marks the Pareto principle boundary; bars at or below that line are tagged as "vital few" via data-vital-few. Per-bar tooltip shows label + value + cumulative percent + vital-few hint where applicable. Per-bar click handler. API: `categories: ChartParetoCategory[]` ({id, label, value, color?}); `width?` (default 600) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 40) / `barGap?` (default 6); `paretoThreshold?` (default 0.8); `showBars?` / `showLine?` / `showThreshold?` / `showLabels?` / `showLeftAxis?` / `showRightAxis?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Pareto chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?` / `formatPercent?`; `defaultBarColor?` ('#2563eb') / `lineColor?` ('#dc2626') / `thresholdColor?` ('#f59e0b'); `tickCount?` (default 5); `onBarClick({category, index, cumulativePercent})`. Drops non-positive/non-finite values during sort; total = positive sum; cumulative percents clamped [0,1]. Dual axes: left = value (0->max), right = percent (0->100%). Vital-few classification: bars whose cumulative crosses threshold are vital. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_PARETO_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/BAR_GAP/THRESHOLD/TICK_COUNT/BAR_COLOR/LINE_COLOR/THRESHOLD_COLOR`; `sortParetoCategoriesDesc(categories)` -- non-mutating desc sort; drops non-positive/non-finite; `getParetoTotal(categories)` -- positive sum; `getParetoCumulative(categories)` -- running totals; non-positive does not advance; `getParetoCumulativePercent(categories)` -- clamped [0,1]; all zeros for zero total; `findParetoThresholdIndex(cum, threshold)` -- first cross; threshold clamped [0,1]; -1 for no-cross or non-finite; `getParetoTicks(max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; non-positive -> [0]; min count 2; `describeParetoChart(categories, threshold, fv?, fp?)` -- ARIA summary with vital-few labels. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-bar role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-bar aria-label '<label>: <value>, cumulative <pct>'. | 11.457 | UI: chart-boxplot primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.475 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-boxplot.tsx` ships `<ChartBoxplot>` -- pure-SVG box-and-whisker plot (Tukey). Each series renders as one box from Q1 to Q3 (IQR) with a median line; whiskers extend to the lowest and highest non-outlier values using the configurable IQR fence multiplier (default 1.5); outlier values beyond the fences plot as dots. Optional dashed mean marker inside the box. Hovering a box opens a tooltip with the five-number summary (min, Q1, median, Q3, max) plus mean and outlier count. Per-box click handler. API: `series: ChartBoxplotSeries[]` ({id, label, data: number[], color?}); `width?` (default 560) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 40) / `boxGap?` (default 16); `outlierMultiplier?` (default 1.5); `showLabels?` / `showOutliers?` / `showMean?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Box plot') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `defaultBoxColor?` ('#2563eb'); `tickCount?` (default 5); `onBoxClick({series, index, stats})`. Box width = 60% of slot width; median = horizontal line across box; mean = dashed horizontal line; whiskers = vertical lines + horizontal caps; outliers = small filled dots with white stroke. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_BOXPLOT_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/BOX_GAP/OUTLIER_MULTIPLIER/TICK_COUNT/BOX_COLOR`; `getBoxplotQuantile(sorted, q)` -- linear interpolation R-7/Excel; empty -> 0; single -> value; q clamped [0,1]; `getBoxplotStats(data, outlierMultiplier?)` -- drops non-finite, sorts, computes 5-number summary + mean + whiskers + outliers in one pass; empty -> zero record; tighter multiplier yields more outliers; `getBoxplotBounds(series)` -- min/max across data; non-finite ignored; empty (0,1); collapsed +/-0.5; `getBoxplotTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive endpoints; collapsed -> [min]; min count 2; `describeBoxplotChart(series, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary 'Box plot with N series. <label> median <m> IQR <q1>-<q3>, ...'. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-box role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-box aria-label '<label>: median <m>, Q1 <q1>, Q3 <q3>'. | 11.458 | UI: chart-violin primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.476 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-violin.tsx` ships `<ChartViolin>` -- pure-SVG violin plot. Each series renders as a violin silhouette mirrored around a vertical axis; the width at every y-position is proportional to the local kernel density estimate (Gaussian kernel + Silverman bandwidth by default). A median dot marks the centre; an optional inner mini-boxplot overlay (IQR box + min/max whisker line) overlays on the same axis. Density is normalised per-series against its own peak so each violin uses the full slot width regardless of absolute sample count. Hover tooltip surfaces median, IQR, range, and sample count. Per-violin click handler. API: `series: ChartViolinSeries[]` ({id, label, data: number[], color?}); `width?` (default 560) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 40) / `violinGap?` (default 16); `bandwidth?` (override Silverman) / `resolution?` (default 64); `showMedian?` / `showInnerBox?` / `showLabels?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Violin plot') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `defaultViolinColor?` ('#2563eb'); `tickCount?` (default 5); `onViolinClick({series, index, stats})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_VIOLIN_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/GAP/RESOLUTION/TICK_COUNT/COLOR`; `gaussianKernel(u)` -- standard normal density; peaks at 0; non-finite -> 0; `getViolinStdDev(data)` -- population std dev; empty -> 0; drops non-finite; `silvermanBandwidth(data)` -- 1.06 * sigma * n^(-1/5); empty/single/zero-sigma -> 1; `computeKDE(data, evalPoints, bandwidth)` -- Gaussian KDE; empty data -> zeros; non-positive bandwidth fallback 1; `getViolinEvalPoints(min, max, resolution?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive endpoints; collapsed -> [min]; non-finite -> []; min res 2; `getViolinStats(data, options?)` -- median/Q1/Q3/min/max/mean/count/bandwidth/density/maxDensity; honours bandwidth + resolution + rangeMin + rangeMax options; `getViolinBounds(series)` -- min/max; non-finite ignored; empty (0,1); collapsed +/-0.5; `getViolinTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive; collapsed -> [min]; `buildViolinPath(density, centerX, halfWidth, maxDensity, yFor)` -- closed mirror polygon; empty -> ''; zero maxDensity collapses to centre; `describeViolinChart(series, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary. Re-exports `getBoxplotStats` from `<ChartBoxplot>` for host composition. | 11.459 | UI: chart-step primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.477 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-step.tsx` ships `<ChartStep>` -- pure-SVG step chart (staircase plot). Adjacent points are connected by right-angle segments, never interpolated. Three step variants: `after` (classic staircase, default; horizontal first then vertical), `before` (jump y at the previous x, then hold horizontally), `middle` (jump at the midpoint between samples). Hover surfaces a dot indicator at the closest sample + tooltip with x label and y value. Optional area fill below the step line. Per-point click handler. API: `series: ChartStepSeries[]` ({id, label, data: {x, y}[], color?}) with x as number or string; `width?` (default 560) / `height?` (default 280) / `padding?` (default 36); `stepType?: 'after'\|'before'\|'middle'` (default 'after'); `showDots?` / `showGrid?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showLabels?` / `showLegend?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `showArea?` (default false) + `areaOpacity?` (default 0.18); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Step chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatX?` / `formatY?`; `tickCount?` (default 5); `strokeWidth?` (default 1.75); `legendPlacement?: 'right'\|'bottom'` (default 'right'); `onPointClick({series, point, index, seriesIndex})`. X axis: unique ordered set of x values across all series; missing values in any series align with the others. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_STEP_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/AREA_OPACITY/TYPE`; `getStepYBounds(series)` -- min/max; empty (0,1); collapsed +/-0.5; `getStepXLabels(series)` -- unique first-seen order; numeric + string supported; `buildStepPath(points, stepType)` -- empty -> ''; single point -> Move only; covers all three variants with explicit L segments; `buildStepAreaPath(points, stepType, baselineY)` -- reuses step path + closes to baseline with Z; `findStepHitIndex(positions, screenX, maxDistance=24)` -- closest sample by horizontal distance only; -1 when out of range; `getStepTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive endpoints; collapsed -> [min]; min count 2; `describeStepChart(series, formatY?)` -- ARIA summary; empty series report 'empty'. | 11.460 | UI: chart-mosaic primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.478 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-mosaic.tsx` ships `<ChartMosaic>` -- pure-SVG mosaic plot for 2D contingency tables. Each column's width is proportional to its marginal total; within each column, row cells stack with heights proportional to the conditional counts. Cell fill encodes the standardized chi-square residual `(O - E) / sqrt(E)` -- blue ('#1d4ed8') for positive (more than expected), red ('#b91c1c') for negative (less than expected), neutral ('#f1f5f9') for zero; configurable `residualClamp` (default 3) caps colour saturation. Hover tooltip surfaces count + expected + residual + percent of total. Per-cell click handler. Per-cell role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0. API: `cells: ChartMosaicCell[]` ({row, column, count}); `rowOrder?` / `columnOrder?` (default: first-seen order); `width?` (default 540) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 36) / `cellGap?` (default 1); `showLabels?` / `showRowLabels?` / `showColumnLabels?` / `showResidualLegend?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Mosaic plot') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatCount?` / `formatPercent?` / `formatResidual?`; `positiveColor?` / `negativeColor?` / `neutralColor?`; `residualClamp?` (default 3); `onCellClick({row, column, cell, count, expected, residual})`. Empty columns skipped entirely; empty rows recorded with zero geometry. In-cell count label only renders when cell is >32px wide and >14px tall. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_MOSAIC_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/CELL_GAP/POSITIVE_COLOR/NEGATIVE_COLOR/NEUTRAL_COLOR/RESIDUAL_CLAMP`; `getMosaicFirstSeen(cells, field)` -- first-seen rows/cols; `getMosaicTotals(cells)` -- {rows, columns, grand}; drops non-finite/non-positive; `getMosaicExpectedCount(R, C, N)` -- (R*C)/N; non-positive N -> 0; `getMosaicResidual(O, E)` -- (O-E)/sqrt(E); non-positive E or non-finite -> 0; `buildMosaicLayout(cells, rows, cols, w, h, ox, oy, gap)` -- canonical layout pass; empty grand -> []; empty cols skipped; empty rows zero-geometry; `getMosaicResidualColor(r, p, n, neu, clamp?)` -- interpolates via interpolateColor; |r|>clamp collapses to clamp colour; `describeMosaicChart(cells, formatCount?)` -- ARIA summary; empty/all-zero -> 'No data'. Reuses `interpolateColor` from `<ChartFunnel>` for the residual gradient. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-cell role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-cell aria-label '<row> x <column>: count <n>, expected <e>, residual <r>'. | 11.461 | UI: chart-parallel primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.479 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-parallel.tsx` ships `<ChartParallel>` -- pure-SVG parallel coordinates plot. Each dimension becomes a vertical axis; each row becomes a polyline crossing every axis at the value for that dimension. Drag on an axis (within its 16-px hit-rect) to brush a y-range -- rows whose values fall within every active brush stay visible; the rest fade to 0.08 opacity but still render. Hovering a row highlights it and dims the others. Double-click an axis to clear its brush. Brushes are fully controllable via `brushes` + `onBrushesChange` for host-driven filter state; `defaultBrushes` for uncontrolled initial state. API: `dimensions: ChartParallelDimension[]` ({id, label, min?, max?, format?}); `rows: ChartParallelRow[]` ({id, label?, values: Record<string, number>, color?, category?}); `width?` (default 640) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 36); `brushes?` (controlled) + `defaultBrushes?` (uncontrolled) + `onBrushesChange(brushes)`; `showAxisLabels?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showTooltip?` / `highlightOnHover?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Parallel coordinates plot') / `ariaDescription?`; `defaultLineColor?` ('#2563eb') / `lineOpacity?` (default 0.45) / `strokeWidth?` (default 1.2); `tickCount?` (default 5); `onRowClick({row, index})`. Rows missing a dimension value snap to that axis's centre so the polyline stays continuous. Brushes AND-combine; rows with non-finite values for any brushed dimension fail the check. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_PARALLEL_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/LINE_OPACITY/STROKE_WIDTH/LINE_COLOR`; `getParallelDimensionBounds(dim, rows)` -- explicit min/max wins; else data range; empty/non-finite (0,1); collapsed +/-0.5; `isRowInBrushes(row, brushes)` -- empty -> true; AND of every brush; non-finite values fail brushed dimensions; `applyBrushFilter(rows, brushes)` -- empty -> shallow copy; else filter; `buildParallelRowPath(points)` -- M + L segments; empty -> ''; `getParallelTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive endpoints; collapsed -> [min]; `describeParallelChart(dimensions, rows, brushes?)` -- ARIA summary with optional 'N after brush' suffix. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-line role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-line aria-label = row.label or row.id. Data attrs throughout (chart-parallel / -aria-desc / -svg / -row / -line / -axis / -axis-hit / -axis-line / -axis-tick / -axis-tick-label / -axis-label / -brush / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-row / -tooltip-filtered; root mirrors data-dimension-count / -row-count / -brush-count / -filtered-count / -animate; rows mirror data-row-id / -row-index / -row-passes / -row-category / -hovered; axes mirror data-dimension-id / -dimension-index / -axis-min / -axis-max / -has-brush; brushes mirror data-dimension-id / -brush-min / -brush-max). 50 vitest cases (4 getParallelDimensionBounds + 4 isRowInBrushes + 2 applyBrushFilter + 2 buildParallelRowPath + 3 getParallelTicks + 3 describeParallelChart + 1 constants + 31 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.461-ui-chart-parallel.md): axis reordering by drag (host re-renders with new order), adaptive line bundling (host pre-aggregates), mouse-wheel zoom on axes (brush-only v1), animated transitions on data change (snap v1; mount fade only). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w425. Bump 1.11.479. |
| 11.462 | UI: chart-chord primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.480 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-chord.tsx` ships `<ChartChord>` -- pure-SVG chord diagram. Categories sit as arcs around a ring; ribbons inside the ring connect pairs whose mutual flow value sets each ribbon's width at both endpoints. Ribbon fill colour encodes the source category. Hovering a ribbon highlights it and dims the others; hovering a category highlights every ribbon that touches it. Per-category + per-ribbon click handlers fire with full payloads. API: `categories: ChartChordCategory[]` ({id, label, color?}); `flows: ChartChordFlow[]` ({source, target, value}); `width?` (default 380) / `height?` (default 380) / `padding?` (default 36); `arcWidth?` (default 16) / `arcGapDegrees?` (default 2); `ribbonOpacity?` (default 0.55); `showLabels?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` / `highlightOnHover?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Chord diagram') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `onCategoryClick({category, total})` + `onFlowClick({flow, source, target})`. Layout: first arc at 12 o'clock, sweep clockwise; sub-arcs sized per flow value (deterministic order: source asc, target asc); ribbons use closed cubic-bezier with both control points at chart centre. Self-loops contribute once. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_CHORD_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/ARC_WIDTH/ARC_GAP/RIBBON_OPACITY/CATEGORY_COLOR`; `getChordCategoryTotals(categories, flows)` -- undirected sum; self-loop once; drops non-finite/non-positive/unknown-ids; initialises 0; `chordPolarToCartesian(cx, cy, r, angle)` -- standard SVG polar mapping; `buildChordArcPath(cx, cy, innerR, outerR, startAngle, endAngle)` -- closed annular arc (M+A+L+A+Z); collapsed -> ''; inner>=outer -> ''; largeArc for sweeps>pi; `buildChordRibbonPath(cx, cy, innerR, sStart, sEnd, tStart, tEnd)` -- closed bezier ribbon (M+A+Q+A+Q+Z); zero radius/collapsed -> ''; `buildChordLayout(categories, flows, gapDeg)` -- skips zero-total categories; drops flows with unknown ids; arc sizes proportional; sub-arcs within parent arc bounds; `describeChordChart(categories, flows, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-arc + per-ribbon role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-arc aria-label '<label>: total <t>'; per-ribbon aria-label '<src> to <tgt>: <value>'. Data attrs throughout (chart-chord / -aria-desc / -svg / -arc / -arc-path / -arc-label / -ribbon / -ribbon-path / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-total / -ribbon-tooltip / -ribbon-tooltip-label / -ribbon-tooltip-value; root mirrors data-category-count / -flow-count / -arc-count / -ribbon-count / -animate; arcs mirror data-category-id / -category-total / -category-color / -arc-start / -arc-end / -hovered / -highlighted; ribbons mirror data-ribbon-index / -source-id / -target-id / -ribbon-value / -ribbon-color / -hovered / -highlighted). 52 vitest cases (5 getChordCategoryTotals + 3 chordPolarToCartesian + 4 buildChordArcPath + 3 buildChordRibbonPath + 6 buildChordLayout (incl. layout invariants: arc sizes proportional to totals, ribbon sub-arcs within parent arcs) + 3 describeChordChart + 1 constants + 27 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.463 | UI: chart-arc-diagram primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.481 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-arc-diagram.tsx` ships `<ChartArcDiagram>` -- pure-SVG arc diagram. Nodes sit on a horizontal baseline, each rendered as a dot whose radius can be scaled by `node.weight`. Edges paint as semicircular arcs above (or below) the baseline between the two node xs; the radius is half the horizontal distance and stroke width encodes the edge weight. Self-edges render as small loops near the node. Hover a node to highlight every connected edge + neighbour; hover an edge to focus that single connection. Per-node + per-edge click handlers fire with full payloads. API: `nodes: ChartArcDiagramNode[]` ({id, label, weight?, color?, group?}); `edges: ChartArcDiagramEdge[]` ({source, target, weight?, color?}); `width?` (default 560) / `height?` (default 240) / `padding?` (default 36); `nodeRadius?` (default 5); `baselineY?` (default: leaves room for labels); `arcsBelowBaseline?` (default false); `defaultNodeColor?` ('#2563eb') / `defaultEdgeColor?` ('#94a3b8'); `edgeOpacity?` (default 0.45); `showLabels?` / `showTooltip?` / `highlightOnHover?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Arc diagram') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `onNodeClick({node, index, degree})` + `onEdgeClick({edge, source, target})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_ARC_DIAGRAM_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/NODE_RADIUS/EDGE_OPACITY/NODE_COLOR/EDGE_COLOR`; `getArcDiagramNodePositions(nodes, innerWidth, originX)` -- evenly-spaced; one-node -> centre; empty -> []; `getArcDiagramNodeRadius(node, defaultRadius)` -- sqrt(weight); floor 2; fallback for invalid weight; `computeArcDiagramNodeDegree(nodeId, edges)` -- incident-edge count; `buildArcDiagramEdgePath(x1, x2, baselineY, above)` -- M+A semicircle path; non-finite -> ''; orders left-to-right; self-edge renders small loop; `describeArcDiagram(nodes, edges, formatValue?)` -- top-5 by degree summary. Edges referencing unknown source/target ids silently dropped. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-node-circle + per-edge-path role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltips role=tooltip; per-node aria-label '<label>: <degree> edges'; per-edge aria-label '<src> - <tgt>: <weight>'. Data attrs throughout (chart-arc-diagram / -aria-desc / -svg / -baseline / -node / -node-circle / -label / -edge / -edge-path / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-degree / -tooltip-group / -edge-tooltip / -edge-tooltip-label / -edge-tooltip-weight; root mirrors data-node-count / -edge-count / -arcs-below / -animate; node groups mirror data-node-id / -node-group / -node-degree / -node-color / -hovered / -highlighted; edge groups mirror data-edge-index / -source-id / -target-id / -edge-weight / -edge-color / -hovered / -highlighted). 45 vitest cases (3 getArcDiagramNodePositions + 3 getArcDiagramNodeRadius + 2 computeArcDiagramNodeDegree + 5 buildArcDiagramEdgePath + 3 describeArcDiagram + 1 constants + 28 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.464 | UI: chart-radar-spider primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.482 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-radar-spider.tsx` ships `<ChartRadarSpider>` -- pure-SVG spider/radar variant distinct from `<ChartRadar>` (11.445). Where ChartRadar renders one filled polygon per series (colour-by-series), ChartRadarSpider decomposes each series's polygon into per-axis wedges: each wedge is the triangle from chart centre through the data point at axis N to the data point at axis N+1, coloured by axis. The result emphasises the per-axis contribution rather than the per-series silhouette. Optional outline polygon connects the per-axis points to retain the silhouette shape on top of the wedges. Per-axis 8-colour palette `DEFAULT_CHART_RADAR_SPIDER_AXIS_PALETTE` distinct from per-series palettes so the two primitives are visually distinguishable. API: `axes: ChartRadarSpiderAxis[]` ({id, label, max?, color?}); `series: ChartRadarSpiderSeries[]` ({id, label, data: number[], outlineColor?}); `size?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 48) / `levels?` (default 4) / `maxValue?`; `showGrid?` / `showAxisLabels?` / `showLegend?` / `showTooltip?` / `showPoints?` / `showOutline?` / `animate?` (all default true); `wedgeOpacity?` (default 0.28) / `outlineOpacity?` (default 0.85); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Spider chart') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `legendPlacement?: 'right' \| 'bottom'` (default 'right'); `onWedgeClick({series, axis, seriesIndex, axisIndex, value})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_RADAR_SPIDER_SIZE/PADDING/LEVELS/WEDGE_OPACITY/OUTLINE_OPACITY/AXIS_PALETTE`; `getDefaultRadarSpiderAxisColor(i)` -- 8-palette modulo; negative -> [0]; `getRadarSpiderAngle(i, total)` -- axis 0 at -90deg, clockwise; total=0 short-circuits; `getRadarSpiderMax(axes, series, override?)` -- override > axis.max > data max; fallback 1; `getRadarSpiderRatio(value, max)` -- clamp [0,1]; non-finite/non-positive -> 0; `getRadarSpiderPoint(i, total, ratio, cx, cy, r)` -- cartesian via polarToCartesian; ratio clamped; `buildRadarSpiderWedgePath(cx, cy, pa, pb)` -- closed triangle M+L+L+Z; non-finite -> ''; `buildRadarSpiderGridPolygon(axisCount, ratio, cx, cy, r)` -- SVG polygon points string; `describeRadarSpiderChart(axes, series, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary. Reuses `polarToCartesian` from `<ChartRadialBar>`. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-wedge role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-wedge aria-label '<series.label> / <axis.label>: <value>'. Data attrs throughout (chart-radar-spider / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid-level / -spoke / -axis-label / -series / -wedge / -outline / -point / -tooltip / -tooltip-series / -tooltip-axis / -tooltip-value / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label; root mirrors data-axis-count / -series-count / -animate; wedges mirror data-series-id / -axis-id / -axis-index / -wedge-color / -hovered). 56 vitest cases (3 getRadarSpiderAngle + 3 getDefaultRadarSpiderAxisColor + 5 getRadarSpiderMax + 4 getRadarSpiderRatio + 4 getRadarSpiderPoint + 2 buildRadarSpiderWedgePath + 2 buildRadarSpiderGridPolygon + 3 describeRadarSpiderChart + 1 constants + 29 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.465 | UI: chart-dot-plot primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.483 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-dot-plot.tsx` ships `<ChartDotPlot>` -- pure-SVG dot plot for categorical-numeric data. Each category gets a vertical slot; every data point renders as a circle at the value's y position. Optional deterministic jitter (via seeded mulberry32-style PRNG) spreads overlapping dots horizontally; identical seed + inputs always produce the same layout so snapshots / E2E tests never flap. Optional median tick draws a short horizontal segment at each category's median (reuses `getBoxplotQuantile` from `<ChartBoxplot>` so the median aligns exactly with the boxplot primitive when both render). Hover a dot to surface category + value; per-dot click handler fires full payload. API: `categories: ChartDotPlotCategory[]` ({id, label, values: number[], color?}); `width?` (default 520) / `height?` (default 320) / `padding?` (default 36); `dotRadius?` (default 3.5); `jitter?` (default 0.35) / `jitterSeed?` (default 1); `showMedianTick?` (default true) + `medianTickWidth?` (default 0.65); `showLabels?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `showLegend?` (default false); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Dot plot') / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `defaultDotColor?` ('#2563eb') / `dotOpacity?` (default 0.7); `tickCount?` (default 5); `legendPlacement?: 'right'\|'bottom'`; `onDotClick({category, categoryIndex, value, valueIndex})`. Non-finite values dropped at render. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_DOT_PLOT_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/DOT_RADIUS/JITTER/JITTER_SEED/DOT_COLOR/DOT_OPACITY/MEDIAN_TICK_WIDTH/TICK_COUNT`; `getDotPlotBounds(categories)` -- chart-wide min/max; drops non-finite; empty (0,1); collapsed +/-0.5; `getDotPlotCategoryMedian(values)` -- linear interp median via shared getBoxplotQuantile; empty -> null; `getDotPlotPseudoRandom(seed, index)` -- mulberry32 PRNG in [0,1); deterministic; non-finite seed -> 0; `getDotPlotJitterOffset(seed, index, jitter, slotWidth)` -- bounded +/- (jitter * slotWidth / 2); zero-jitter / zero-width / non-finite -> 0; deterministic; `getDotPlotTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced inclusive endpoints; collapsed -> [min]; `describeDotPlot(categories, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary 'Dot plot with N categories. <label> n=<count>, median <m>, ...'. Reuses `getBoxplotQuantile` from `<ChartBoxplot>`. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-dot role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-dot aria-label '<label>: <value>'. Data attrs throughout (chart-dot-plot / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -axis-y / -tick / -tick-label / -category / -median / -dot / -label / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label; root mirrors data-category-count / -jitter / -jitter-seed / -animate; category groups mirror data-category-id / -category-index / -category-color / -category-count / -category-median; dots mirror data-category-id / -value-index / -value / -hovered). 54 vitest cases (4 getDotPlotBounds + 3 getDotPlotCategoryMedian + 5 getDotPlotPseudoRandom + 5 getDotPlotJitterOffset + 3 getDotPlotTicks + 3 describeDotPlot + 1 constants + 30 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.466 | UI: chart-stacked-area primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.484 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-stacked-area.tsx` ships `<ChartStackedArea>` -- pure-SVG stacked area chart with a toggleable absolute / percentage mode and clickable legend interaction for hiding individual series. Distinct from `<ChartArea>` (11.441) in that the mode toggle (small `%`/`#` button in the corner) and the legend-driven visibility filter are first-class. Every legend entry is a focusable `<button aria-pressed>` that hides / shows its series; percentage mode normalises every column to total = 1. API: `series: ChartStackedAreaSeries[]` ({id, label, data: number[], color?}); `xLabels?`; `width?` (default 560) / `height?` (default 280) / `padding?` (default 36); `mode?` (controlled) + `defaultMode?` (default 'absolute') + `onModeChange(mode)`; `hiddenSeries?` (controlled) + `defaultHiddenSeries?` + `onHiddenSeriesChange(hidden)`; `showModeToggle?` / `showLegend?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showGrid?` / `showTooltip?` / `showAxisLabels?` / `smooth?` / `animate?` (all default true); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?` / `formatPercent?` / `formatXLabel?`; `tickCount?` (default 5); `legendPlacement?: 'right'\|'bottom'` (default 'bottom'); `onSeriesClick({series, index, hidden})`. Series 0 sits at the bottom of the stack; series 1 above; layer boundary invariant upperY[i] == lowerY[i+1]. Smooth interpolation uses Catmull-Rom-to-cubic-Bezier on both upper + lower edges; < 3 pts degrades to polyline. Tooltip surfaces raw value + column total + optional percent of total (percentage mode only) + optional x label. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_STACKED_AREA_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/MODE`; `getStackedAreaTotalAt(series, hidden, index)` -- visible sum; non-finite/non-positive -> 0; `getStackedAreaMaxTotal(series, hidden)` -- largest column sum; empty/zero-length/all-non-finite -> 1; `computeStackedAreaLayout(series, hidden, mode, w, h, padX, padY)` -- canonical layout pass; percentage normalises columns to 1; hidden layers collapse to baseline; absolute mode preserves boundary invariant; `buildStackedAreaBandPath(points, smooth)` -- closed band; Catmull-Rom smoother on both edges; < 3 pts polyline fallback; `getStackedAreaTicks(max, mode, count?)` -- absolute 0..max or percentage 0..1; non-positive max -> [0]; min count 2; `describeStackedAreaChart(series, hidden, mode, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary including mode + visible count. Reuses `getDefaultBarColor` from `<ChartBar>`. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; mode button + legend buttons real `<button>` elements with aria-label / aria-pressed; per-band role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; per-band aria-label = series.label. | 11.467 | UI: chart-grouped-bar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.485 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-grouped-bar.tsx` ships `<ChartGroupedBar>` -- pure-SVG grouped bar chart. Each category gets its own horizontal slot; within the slot, every visible series renders its bar side-by-side. Distinct from `<ChartBar>` (11.438) in that this primitive emphasises multi-series side-by-side grouping + clickable legend toggle. Hidden series collapse the slot so the visible bars expand. API: `categories: string[]`; `series: ChartGroupedBarSeries[]` ({id, label, data: number[], color?}); `width?` (default 560) / `height?` (default 280) / `padding?` (default 36); `groupGap?` (default 16) / `barGap?` (default 2); `hiddenSeries?` (controlled) + `defaultHiddenSeries?` + `onHiddenSeriesChange(hidden)`; `showLegend?` / `showAxisTicks?` / `showGrid?` / `showLabels?` / `showTooltip?` / `animate?` (all default true); `showValues?` (default false); `className?` / `ariaLabel?` / `ariaDescription?`; `formatValue?`; `tickCount?` (default 5); `legendPlacement?: 'right'\|'bottom'` (default 'bottom'); `onBarClick({series, seriesIndex, category, categoryIndex, value})` + `onSeriesClick({series, index, hidden})`. Layout: slot width = (innerWidth - groupGap * (n-1)) / n; bar width = (slotWidth - barGap * (m-1)) / m where m = visible series count. Non-finite / non-positive values clamp to 0 height. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_GROUPED_BAR_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/GROUP_GAP/BAR_GAP/TICK_COUNT`; `getGroupedBarMaxValue(series, hidden)` -- largest visible positive finite; empty/all-non-finite -> 1; `computeGroupedBarLayout(categories, series, hidden, w, h, padX, padY, groupGap, barGap)` -- canonical layout; empty inputs -> []; hidden series skipped; bars side-by-side; `getGroupedBarTicks(max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced 0..max; non-positive -> [0]; min count 2; `describeGroupedBarChart(categories, series, hidden, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary with visible-count + per-series sums. Reuses `getDefaultBarColor` from `<ChartBar>`. ARIA: region root + role=img svg + sr-only auto-description span; per-bar role=graphics-symbol + tabIndex 0 (focus opens tooltip via onFocus); tooltip role=tooltip; legend entries real `<button aria-pressed>`; per-bar aria-label '<category> / <series.label>: <value>'. | 11.468 | UI: chart-stacked-bar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.486 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-stacked-bar.tsx` ships `<ChartStackedBar>` -- pure-SVG stacked bar chart. Each category renders a single bar subdivided into colored segments stacked per series. Distinct from `<ChartGroupedBar>` (11.467) in that bars stack within a category rather than placed side-by-side, and distinct from `<ChartStackedArea>` (11.466) in that this primitive uses discrete bars per category rather than continuous areas across an x axis. Orientation toggles between vertical (stack grows upward from the baseline; series 0 at the bottom) and horizontal (stack grows rightward from the left axis; series 0 on the left); both controlled (`orientation` + `onOrientationChange`) and uncontrolled (`defaultOrientation`, default `'vertical'`). A small button in the top-right corner toggles between the two; suppressed via `showOrientationToggle=false`. Hidden-series legend toggle: every entry is a focusable `<button aria-pressed>` that toggles its series's visibility; controlled (`hiddenSeries` + `onHiddenSeriesChange`) and uncontrolled (`defaultHiddenSeries`). Tooltip on segment hover surfaces category + series label + formatted value + the category total of the visible series. Optional `showValueLabels` paints a formatted-value caption inside each segment whose smaller dimension exceeds 18 px so cramped segments stay readable. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `categories: readonly string[]` / `series: readonly ChartStackedBarSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly number[], color?}) / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (36) / `barGap?` (8) / `orientation?` / `defaultOrientation?` / `onOrientationChange?` / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showOrientationToggle?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showValueLabels?` (false) / `showAxisTicks?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showLabels?` (true; category labels) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Stacked bar chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `tickCount?` (5) / `legendPlacement?` ('right'\|'bottom', default 'bottom') / `onSegmentClick?({series, seriesIndex, category, categoryIndex, value})` / `onSeriesClick?({series, index, hidden})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_STACKED_BAR_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/BAR_GAP/TICK_COUNT/ORIENTATION`; `getStackedBarCategoryTotal(series, hidden, categoryIndex)` -- sum visible-series values for the category; non-finite + non-positive clamp to 0; `getStackedBarMaxTotal(categories, series, hidden)` -- largest visible category total; empty / all-zero / all-non-finite fallback to 1; `computeStackedBarLayout(categories, series, hidden, orientation, innerW, innerH, padX, padY, barGap)` -- canonical layout pass returning `{seriesId, seriesIndex, category, categoryIndex, value, color, x, y, w, h}[]`; vertical bars stack upward from baseline (`a.y + a.h == baseline; a.y == b.y + b.h`); horizontal bars stack rightward from left axis (`a.x == 0; a.x + a.w == b.x`); zero-value segments dropped to keep the array compact; segment lengths proportional to value at max-total category equal the inner extent; `getStackedBarTicks(max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced from 0 to max; non-positive max -> [0]; min count 2; `describeStackedBarChart(categories, series, hidden, orientation, formatValue?)` -- default ARIA summary including orientation + visible-count + per-series sums; empty -> 'No data'. ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-stacked-bar-aria-desc"` span; per-segment `<rect role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<category> / <series.label>: <value>"`; orientation button `aria-label="Switch to <next> orientation"`; legend `<button aria-pressed>` per series. data-section on every node (chart-stacked-bar / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -orientation-toggle / -orientation-button / -axis-value / -tick / -tick-label / -segment / -rect / -value / -category-label / -tooltip / -tooltip-category / -tooltip-series / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-total / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-orientation, data-category-count, data-series-count, data-visible-count, data-segment-count, data-animate; segment groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-category, data-category-index, data-segment-value, data-segment-color, data-hovered; legend items mirror data-series-id, data-series-hidden. 55 vitest cases (3 getStackedBarCategoryTotal + 5 getStackedBarMaxTotal + 7 computeStackedBarLayout + 4 getStackedBarTicks + 3 describeStackedBarChart + 1 constants + 32 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.468-ui-chart-stacked-bar.md): percentage (100%) mode toggle (absolute-only v1; use `<ChartStackedArea>` percentage mode + host discretisation when needed); negative values stacked below the baseline (non-positive clamp to 0; host normalises); drag-to-reorder series within stack (host owns array); animated reflow on data / orientation change (snap v1; mount fade only). | 11.469 | UI: chart-donut primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.487 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-donut.tsx` ships `<ChartDonut>` -- pure-SVG donut chart (pie variant with a center hole). Each slice paints an annular arc; the hollow center hosts a configurable two-line label group (primary value + smaller secondary line). Distinct from `<ChartPie>` (11.440) in that this primitive introduces a first-class center slot with a default visible-total readout, a configurable `thicknessRatio` (clamped to [0, 1]; default 0.32) that drives the inner radius (= `outerRadius * (1 - thicknessRatio)`), optional `padAngle` (default 0.012 rad) deducted between consecutive arcs (only when more than one slice is visible), and optional `cornerRadius` for rounded arc ends. Default `startAngle = -pi/2` so the first slice begins at 12 o'clock. Hover/focus on an arc sets the hovered id and opens a tooltip with label, formatted value, and formatted percent; `onArcClick({slice, arc})` fires on click. Legend interaction: every entry is a focusable `<button aria-pressed>` per slice; controlled (`hiddenSlices` + `onHiddenSlicesChange`) and uncontrolled (`defaultHiddenSlices`). Hidden slices reproportion the visible ring; `onSliceToggle({slice, hidden})` fires with the next state. Center slot resolution: primary = `centerValue` > `centerContent.primary` > formatted visible total (suppressed via `showCenterTotal=false`); secondary = `centerLabel` > `centerContent.secondary`; if neither line resolves the group is omitted. `showCenter=false` removes the group entirely. Optional in-arc labels (`showLabels=true`) paint the formatted percent at the arc midpoint for slices whose fraction exceeds 5%. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per arc (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `slices: readonly ChartDonutSlice[]` ({id, label, value, color?}) / `width?` (320) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (24) / `thicknessRatio?` (0.32) / `padAngle?` (0.012) / `cornerRadius?` (0) / `startAngle?` (-pi/2) / `hiddenSlices?` / `defaultHiddenSlices?` / `onHiddenSlicesChange?` / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showCenter?` (true) / `showLabels?` (false) / `showCenterTotal?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `centerContent?` / `centerLabel?` / `centerValue?` / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Donut chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatPercent?` / `legendPlacement?` ('right'\|'bottom', default 'bottom') / `onArcClick?({slice, arc})` / `onSliceToggle?({slice, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_DONUT_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/THICKNESS_RATIO/PAD_ANGLE/CORNER_RADIUS/START_ANGLE/COLORS`; `getDonutDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; non-finite / negative -> color 0; `polarToCartesian(cx, cy, r, angle)` -- standard SVG-y-down convention; `getDonutTotal(slices)` / `getDonutVisibleTotal(slices, hidden)` -- non-finite + non-positive clamp to 0; `computeDonutArcs({slices, hidden, cx, cy, outerRadius, thicknessRatio, startAngle, padAngle, cornerRadius})` -- canonical layout pass returning `{ id, label, value, color, index, startAngle, endAngle, midAngle, innerRadius, outerRadius, path, fraction }[]`; empty / non-positive outer radius -> []; hidden + zero / non-finite skipped; visible arcs reproportioned to sum-of-visible-totals; arcs angularly contiguous when padAngle=0; padAngle introduces equal gaps between consecutive arcs; sole visible slice paints the full-ring (M+A+A+M+A+A+Z) path; per-slice color override beats palette; `describeDonutChart(slices, hidden, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Donut chart with N slices, total <total>. <label> <value> (P%) ...."; empty / all-hidden -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-donut-aria-desc"` span; per-arc `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<label>: <value> (<percent>%)"`; legend `<button aria-pressed>` per slice + per-slice `aria-label="Toggle <label>"`. data-section on every node (chart-donut / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -arcs / -arc / -path / -label / -center / -center-primary / -center-secondary / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-percent / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-slice-count, data-visible-count, data-hidden-count, data-animate, data-thickness-ratio; arc groups mirror data-slice-id, data-slice-index, data-arc-value, data-arc-color, data-arc-fraction, data-hovered; legend items mirror data-slice-id, data-slice-hidden. 60 vitest cases (1 constants + 3 getDonutDefaultColor + 3 polarToCartesian + 3 getDonutTotal/Visible + 16 computeDonutArcs + 4 describeDonutChart + 30 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.469-ui-chart-donut.md): drag-to-reorder slices around ring (host owns order); animated reflow on data change (snap v1; mount fade only); drill-down (host handles via onArcClick); multi-ring concentric donuts (v1 is single ring; host nests if needed). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w425. Bump 1.11.487. |
| 11.470 | UI: chart-bubble primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.488 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-bubble.tsx` ships `<ChartBubble>` -- pure-SVG bubble chart encoding three numeric dimensions per datum: `x` (x-axis position), `y` (y-axis position), and `size` (drives bubble radius via sqrt-area scaling between `minRadius`/`maxRadius`). Optional per-point `category` drives palette-based color encoding (`getBubbleCategoryColor` maps category -> palette index via first-seen order across the data); per-point `color` override beats the palette. Distinct from `<ChartScatter>` (11.444) in that bubbles have a 3rd encoded variable (size) instead of uniform dot radius, and distinct from `<ChartDotPlot>` (11.465) in that the x axis is numeric here rather than categorical. Layout: `computeBubbleLayout` drops non-finite-x / non-finite-y entries, skips hidden category/id, then projects `(x, y)` into the inner canvas with SVG-y-down convention (yMax at top, yMin at bottom). Bounds: auto-derived via `getBubbleBounds`; collapsed x/y range expands by +/-0.5; non-finite x/y ignored; controlled via `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax` props. Size encoding: sqrt-area interpolation; collapsed size range falls back to `(min+max)/2`; non-finite/negative -> 0 -> `minRadius`. Hover/focus on a bubble sets the hovered id and opens a tooltip with label, category (when present), x, y, size (each formatted). Legend (rendered only when at least one point has a category): focusable `<button aria-pressed>` per category; controlled (`hiddenCategories` + `onHiddenCategoriesChange`) and uncontrolled (`defaultHiddenCategories`); `onCategoryToggle({category, hidden})` fires on click. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per bubble (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `data: readonly ChartBubblePoint[]` ({id, label?, x, y, size, category?, color?}) / `width?` (560) / `height?` (360) / `padding?` (40) / `minRadius?` (4) / `maxRadius?` (28) / `tickCount?` (5) / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `hiddenCategories?` / `defaultHiddenCategories?` / `onHiddenCategoriesChange?` / `showLegend?` (true; auto-suppressed when no categories) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showAxisTicks?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showXLabel?` (true) / `showYLabel?` (true) / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Bubble chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatSize?` / `legendPlacement?` ('right'\|'bottom', default 'bottom') / `onBubbleClick?({point, layout})` / `onCategoryToggle?({category, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_BUBBLE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/MIN_RADIUS/MAX_RADIUS/COLOR/PALETTE`; `getBubbleDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; non-finite/negative -> color 0; `getBubbleBounds(points)` -- min/max for x/y/size; empty -> (0..1, 0..1, 0..0); collapsed expansion; non-finite skipped; `getBubbleRadius(size, sizeMin, sizeMax, minR, maxR)` -- sqrt-area interpolation; collapsed range -> (min+max)/2; `getBubbleCategories(points)` -- unique non-empty in first-seen order; `getBubbleCategoryColor(category, categories)` -- palette lookup; unknown/null -> default color; `getBubbleTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> [min]; `computeBubbleLayout({points, hidden, categories, bounds, innerW, innerH, padX, padY, minRadius, maxRadius})` -- canonical layout returning `{ id, label, category, color, cx, cy, r, x, y, size, index }[]`; `describeBubbleChart(points, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Bubble chart with N bubbles[ across M categories]. x range <xMin> to <xMax>; y range <yMin> to <yMax>."; empty / all-invalid -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-bubble-aria-desc"` span; per-circle `role="graphics-symbol"` + `tabIndex={0}` + aria-label `"<label>: x <x>, y <y>, size <size>"`; legend `<button aria-pressed>` per category + per-category `aria-label="Toggle <cat>"`. data-section on every node (chart-bubble / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -bubbles / -point / -circle / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-category / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-size / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-bubble-count, data-visible-count, data-category-count, data-animate; bubble groups mirror data-point-id, data-point-index, data-point-x, data-point-y, data-point-size, data-point-color, data-point-category, data-point-r, data-hovered; legend items mirror data-category, data-category-hidden. 65 vitest cases (1 constants + 3 getBubbleDefaultColor + 5 getBubbleBounds + 5 getBubbleRadius + 2 getBubbleCategories + 2 getBubbleCategoryColor + 3 getBubbleTicks + 10 computeBubbleLayout + 5 describeBubbleChart + 29 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.470-ui-chart-bubble.md): pan/zoom on the canvas (host owns viewport); animated reflow on data change (snap v1; mount fade only); quadrant overlays / mean lines / regression lines (host wraps with custom SVG layer using exported scale helpers); density / hexbin variant for very large data sets (v1 paints one circle per point; host pre-bins if needed). | 11.471 | UI: chart-calendar-heatmap primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.489 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-calendar-heatmap.tsx` ships `<ChartCalendarHeatmap>` -- pure-SVG GitHub-style year calendar heatmap. Each day paints as a small rounded square; columns are weeks; rows are days of the week. Color encodes intensity via a configurable 5-step palette plus a distinct emptyColor for zero / non-positive / non-finite days. Month labels render above the grid at the first column that touches each new month (one label per month visible in the requested range); a sparse DOW label axis renders on the left (3 labels by default, weekStart-aware). Distinct from `<ChartHeatmap>` (11.442) in that this primitive is *time-aware*: it knows about ISO dates, week boundaries, and months -- callers hand it `[{date, value}]` and either a `year` prop (default = current UTC year) or explicit `startDate` / `endDate`, and get the full layout for free. Range resolution: when both `startDate` + `endDate` are present they are used verbatim; otherwise `year` (or the current UTC year) materialises Jan 1 -> Dec 31 via `getYearRange`. Layout: `computeCalendarHeatmap` pads the start of the grid back to the previous `weekStart` boundary so every day falls on the correct row; days outside the requested range (the pre-pad days in the first column) are not emitted. Color: zero / non-finite / negative values paint with `emptyColor` (level 0); non-zero values map via `ceil(ratio * paletteLength)` so the smallest positive value still gets palette[0] rather than the empty color; ratios over 1 clamp to the top step. Hover/focus on a cell opens a tooltip with formatted date + value; per-cell click handler. ARIA / keyboard: every cell is `role="graphics-symbol"` + `tabIndex={0}` so the whole year is keyboard-tabbable. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per cell (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `values: readonly ChartCalendarHeatmapValue[]` ({date: string YYYY-MM-DD, value: number}) / `startDate?` / `endDate?` / `year?` / `weekStart?` (0=Sun, 1=Mon; default 0) / `cellSize?` (12) / `cellGap?` (3) / `topPad?` (18) / `leftPad?` (28) / `rightPad?` (8) / `bottomPad?` (22) / `palette?` (5-step green) / `emptyColor?` ('#e5e7eb') / `maxValue?` / `showMonthLabels?` (true) / `showDowLabels?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `monthLabels?` / `dowLabels?` / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Calendar heatmap') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatDate?` / `onCellClick?(cell)` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_CALENDAR_HEATMAP_CELL_SIZE/CELL_GAP/TOP_PAD/LEFT_PAD/RIGHT_PAD/BOTTOM_PAD/EMPTY_COLOR/PALETTE/MONTH_LABELS/DOW_LABELS`; `toISODate(d)` / `parseISODate(s)` -- UTC formatting + parsing, rejects malformed + impossible dates (e.g. 2024-02-30); `addDays(d, n)` -- month + year crossing; `getYearRange(year)` -- Jan 1 -> Dec 31 UTC; `getCalendarHeatmapColor(value, max, palette?, emptyColor?)` -- returns {color, level}; level 0 = empty; 1..palette.length = palette step; `computeCalendarHeatmap(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ weeks, cells, monthLabels, width, height, max, weekStart, cellSize, cellGap, topPad, leftPad }`; invalid / inverted range -> empty result; `describeCalendarHeatmap(values, start, end, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Calendar heatmap from <start> to <end>. N active days, total <sum>, peak <peak>."; invalid range -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-calendar-heatmap-aria-desc"` span; per-cell `<rect role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<formatted date>: <formatted value>"`. data-section on every node (chart-calendar-heatmap / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -months / -month-label / -dow / -dow-label / -cells / -cell / -tooltip / -tooltip-date / -tooltip-value / -legend / -legend-low / -legend-high / -legend-swatch); root mirrors data-cell-count, data-week-count, data-week-start, data-start-date, data-end-date, data-max, data-animate; cells mirror data-cell-date, data-cell-value, data-cell-level, data-cell-color, data-cell-col, data-cell-row, data-hovered; month labels mirror data-month-index, data-month-col; DOW labels mirror data-dow-row; legend swatches mirror data-legend-level. 52 vitest cases (1 constants + 3 toISODate/parseISODate + 2 addDays + 1 getYearRange + 5 getCalendarHeatmapColor + 12 computeCalendarHeatmap + 3 describeCalendarHeatmap + 25 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.471-ui-chart-calendar-heatmap.md): multi-year stacking (host stacks instances); localised month/day names (host passes monthLabels/dowLabels); click-drag range selection (v1 supports per-cell click + hover only); animated reflow on data change (snap v1; mount fade only). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w425. Bump 1.11.489. |
| 11.472 | UI: chart-error-bars primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.490 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-error-bars.tsx` ships `<ChartErrorBars>` -- pure-SVG bar / scatter chart with vertical and (in scatter mode) horizontal error-bar overlays for confidence intervals. Each datum carries a required `y` value and optional `lower`/`upper` (or a single symmetric `error`) for the y-axis CI; in scatter mode it can also carry `x` plus optional `xLower`/`xUpper`/`xError` for the x-axis CI. Error bars render as T-shaped whiskers: a stem connecting `lower` to `upper` plus a short cap at each end. Mode toggles between bar (categorical-x with vertical T whiskers above/below the bar) and scatter (numeric-x, numeric-y with whiskers in either or both axes). CI resolution per axis: if both `lower` + `upper` are finite numbers they are used verbatim; else fall back to symmetric `+/- error` (only when error is finite + non-negative); else `hasError=false` and CI = `[value, value]`. Swap when lower > upper. Non-finite y skipped from the layout; non-finite / negative error ignored. Bar mode pulls `yMin` down to 0 when all values are positive so bars render from the baseline; scatter mode does not. Hover/focus on a mark sets the hovered id and opens a tooltip with label, the value (or `(x, y)` in scatter mode), and the formatted y/x CI ranges when present. Per-point click handler fires with `{point, layout}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per mark group (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `data: readonly ChartErrorBarsPoint[]` ({id, label?, x?, y, category?, lower?, upper?, error?, xLower?, xUpper?, xError?, color?}) / `mode?` ('bar'\|'scatter'; default 'bar') / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `tickCount?` (5) / `pointRadius?` (4) / `whiskerLength?` (6) / `barGap?` (12) / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showAxisTicks?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showCategoryLabels?` (true; bar mode) / `showXErrorBars?` (true; scatter mode) / `showYErrorBars?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Error bar chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `primaryColor?` ('#2563eb') / `errorColor?` ('#1e40af') / `formatValue?` / `formatCategory?` / `onPointClick?({point, layout})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_ERROR_BARS_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/BAR_GAP/POINT_RADIUS/WHISKER_LENGTH/PRIMARY_COLOR/ERROR_COLOR`; `getDefaultErrorBarColor(index)` -- returns primary color (single-series v1); `getErrorBarCIRange(point)` / `getErrorBarXCIRange(point)` -- canonical CI resolution returning `{lower, upper, hasError}`; `getErrorBarBounds(data, mode)` -- bar mode 0-baseline + CI-expanded y range, scatter mode CI-expanded x + y range; `getErrorBarTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> [min]; `computeErrorBarLayout({data, mode, bounds, innerW, innerH, padX, padY})` -- canonical layout returning `{ id, label, index, color, cx, cy, baselineY, yLowerY, yUpperY, hasY, xLowerX, xUpperX, hasX, value, yLower, yUpper, xValue, xLower, xUpper, category }[]`; `describeErrorBarChart(data, mode, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Error bar chart (<mode>) with N points, M with confidence intervals. y range <yMin> to <yMax>."; empty/all-non-finite -> "No data". | 11.473 | UI: chart-histogram primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.491 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-histogram.tsx` ships `<ChartHistogram>` -- pure-SVG histogram with configurable bin count, count/density y-axis modes, an optional Gaussian-KDE density-curve overlay, and per-bar tooltips. Accepts a flat `number[]` of raw values; auto bin count defaults to Sturges' rule `ceil(log2(n) + 1)`. Distinct from `<ChartBar>` (11.438) which paints categorical bars and from `<ChartBoxplot>` (11.455) which summarises distributions instead of plotting the full bin frequencies. Bin range is auto-derived from finite values (collapsed range expands by +/-0.5); explicit `xMin` / `xMax` clamp the rendered range and drop out-of-range values. Non-finite values dropped before binning; the last bin is closed on the right edge so the maximum value still counts. y-axis modes: `count` (bar height proportional to `bin.count` over the visible peak) and `density` (`count / (totalFinite * step)` so the rendered area sums to 1 when range covers every value). KDE overlay: Gaussian kernel; bandwidth defaults to Silverman's rule (`1.06 * std * n^-0.2`; falls back to 1 when std <= 0 or n < 2); explicit `bandwidth` overrides. The curve is scaled back to the bar y-axis so it visually fits the histogram regardless of `yMode` -- in `count` mode the kernel density is multiplied by `totalFinite * binWidth` to match bar height. Hover/focus on a bar sets the hovered index and opens a tooltip with bin range, count, and density (each formatted). Per-bar click handler fires with `{bin, layout}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per bar group (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `values: readonly number[]` / `binCount?` / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMode?` ('count'\|'density'; default 'count') / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `binGap?` (1) / `tickCount?` (5) / `showDensityCurve?` (false) / `densitySamples?` (64) / `bandwidth?` / `barColor?` ('#2563eb') / `densityColor?` ('#dc2626') / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showAxisTicks?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showXLabel?` (true) / `showYLabel?` (true) / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Histogram') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatRange?` / `onBinClick?({bin, layout})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_HISTOGRAM_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/BIN_GAP/DENSITY_SAMPLES/BAR_COLOR/DENSITY_COLOR`; `getHistogramFiniteValues(values)` -- keeps finite numbers only; `getHistogramSturgesBinCount(n)` -- `ceil(log2(n) + 1)`; >= 1 for tiny / invalid input; `getHistogramBounds(values)` -- empty -> (0..1); collapsed range +/-0.5 expansion; `computeHistogramBins({values, binCount?, xMin?, xMax?})` -- canonical bin pass returning `{ index, start, end, count, density }[]`; empty -> []; sum of counts == finite-count when range covers all values; density sum * step ~= 1; clamps explicit binCount to >= 1; drops out-of-range values when xMin/xMax provided; `silvermanBandwidth(values)` -- 1 for tiny / non-finite / std=0; positive for varied input; `computeKernelDensity({values, xMin, xMax, samples?, bandwidth?})` -- returns `{ x, density }[]` evenly-spaced across [xMin, xMax]; non-positive bandwidth or `xMin == xMax` -> []; non-negative density; `getHistogramTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> [min]; `computeHistogramLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ index, start, end, count, density, x, y, width, height, centerX, midValue }[]`; non-positive inner -> []; bar height scales with count or density (yMode-driven); `describeHistogram(values, bins, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Histogram of N values across M bins, range <min> to <max>. Peak bin <peakStart> to <peakEnd> with K values."; empty -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-histogram-aria-desc"` span; per-bar `<rect role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"Bin <range>: <count> values"` (count mode) / `"Bin <range>: density <density>"` (density mode). data-section on every node (chart-histogram / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -bars / -bar / -rect / -density / -tooltip / -tooltip-range / -tooltip-count / -tooltip-density); root mirrors data-value-count, data-bin-count, data-y-mode, data-density-overlay, data-animate; bar groups mirror data-bin-index, data-bin-start, data-bin-end, data-bin-count, data-bin-density, data-hovered. 61 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getHistogramFiniteValues + 2 getHistogramSturgesBinCount + 3 getHistogramBounds + 9 computeHistogramBins + 2 silvermanBandwidth + 4 computeKernelDensity + 3 getHistogramTicks + 5 computeHistogramLayout + 3 describeHistogram + 27 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.473-ui-chart-histogram.md): adaptive / unequal-width bins (Bayesian Blocks, Freedman-Diaconis variable-width); multi-series / overlay histograms (host stacks instances); pre-binned input (v1 always re-bins); cumulative / step / ridge histogram variants; live streaming updates with incremental binning (v1 re-runs the bin pass per render). | 11.474 | UI: chart-ridge primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.492 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-ridge.tsx` ships `<ChartRidge>` -- pure-SVG ridgeline (joy plot) chart stacking multiple Gaussian-KDE density curves vertically with configurable overlap. Each input series produces a smoothed density curve; the curves are arranged top-to-bottom with optional overlap so neighbouring rows visually overlap to highlight distribution shape differences. Distinct from `<ChartViolin>` (11.456) -- violin paints a mirrored density per category as side-by-side vertical "violins", whereas ridge stacks one-sided densities vertically for multi-series visual comparison along a shared x axis. Density estimation: Gaussian KDE per series (`samples` evenly-spaced points across the rendered x range; default 64); bandwidth defaults to Silverman's rule (`1.06 * std * n^-0.2`; falls back to 1 when std=0 or n<2); explicit `bandwidth` overrides. Normalisation: per-row peak by default (every ridge fills its rowHeight regardless of absolute density, good for shape comparisons); `globalPeak=true` shares the maximum peak across rows so taller curves carry larger areas (good for absolute-density comparisons). Layout: `rawStride = innerH / N` so all rows fit; `rowHeight = rawStride * (1 + overlap)` (overlap clamped [0, 0.95]); `baselineY` walks down by rawStride and the curve paints from baseline upward (`baselineY - normalised * rowHeight`). Rows are painted in reverse-z order (last series first; series 0 sits visually on top); data attributes preserve original index for tests + callbacks. x range: auto-derived via `getRidgeBounds` with 4% padding on each side; collapsed range expands by +/-0.5; explicit `xMin`/`xMax` props override. Hover/focus on a row sets the hovered id, dims every other row to opacity 0.25, and opens a tooltip with label + finite-value count + peak density (formatted). Per-row click handler fires with `{series, layout}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per row group (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartRidgeSeries[]` ({id, label, values: readonly number[], color?}) / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `labelWidth?` (80) / `overlap?` (0.6) / `samples?` (64) / `bandwidth?` / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `tickCount?` (5) / `fillOpacity?` (0.45) / `globalPeak?` (false) / `showLabels?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showAxisTicks?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Ridgeline chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `onRowClick?({series, layout})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_RIDGE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/LABEL_WIDTH/OVERLAP/DENSITY_SAMPLES/TICK_COUNT/FILL_OPACITY/PALETTE`; `getRidgeDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; non-finite/negative -> color 0; `getRidgeFiniteValues(values)` -- keeps finite numbers only; `silvermanBandwidth(values)` -- 1 for tiny / collapsed; positive for varied input; `computeRidgeDensity({values, xMin, xMax, samples?, bandwidth?})` -- returns `{x, density}[]` evenly-spaced; tiny/collapsed -> []; non-negative density; `getRidgeBounds(series, padFactor?)` -- min/max across all series; empty -> (0..1); collapsed +/-0.5; padFactor expansion; `getRidgePeakDensity(density)` -- max density (empty -> 0); `getRidgeTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> [min]; `computeRidgeLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ id, label, color, index, baselineY, topY, rowHeight, peakDensity, count, density, fillPath, linePath }[]`; non-positive inner / empty / collapsed -> []; `describeRidgeChart(series, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Ridgeline chart with N series, K values total. x range <xMin> to <xMax>."; empty/all-non-finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-ridge-aria-desc"` span; per-line `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<label>: density curve over <count> values"`. data-section on every node (chart-ridge / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -rows / -row / -fill / -line / -baseline / -labels / -label / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-count / -tooltip-peak); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-count, data-overlap, data-global-peak, data-animate; row groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-count, data-hovered. 53 vitest cases (1 constants + 3 getRidgeDefaultColor + 1 getRidgeFiniteValues + 2 silvermanBandwidth + 4 getRidgeBounds + 4 computeRidgeDensity + 2 getRidgePeakDensity + 3 getRidgeTicks + 9 computeRidgeLayout + 3 describeRidgeChart + 21 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.474-ui-chart-ridge.md): adaptive bandwidth per row (v1 honours a single shared bandwidth via Silverman's rule for visual comparability; override via prop); animated transitions on data/overlap change (snap v1; mount fade only); reorderable rows via drag (host owns ordering); color encoding by a third numeric dimension per row (v1 uses a single color per series). | 11.475 | UI: chart-marimekko primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.493 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-marimekko.tsx` ships `<ChartMarimekko>` -- pure-SVG Marimekko chart (variable-width stacked bars). Each column's *width* is proportional to its share of the grand total (`columnWidth = (columnTotal / grandTotal) * widthBudget`, where `widthBudget = innerW - (N - 1) * columnGap`); within each column, every visible series stacks vertically with cell heights proportional to the series's share of *that column's* total. Optional percentage labels render inside cells whose pixel area exceeds `labelMinArea` (default 280 px^2). Distinct from `<ChartStackedBar>` (11.468) which uses uniform column widths, and from `<ChartMosaic>` (11.457) which is similar but typically treats the data as a contingency table -- Marimekko emphasises composition across categories where the x axis is itself a value dimension. Non-positive / non-finite values are skipped from the layout entirely (they contribute neither width nor height nor a cell). Hidden series (controlled via `hiddenSeries` + `onHiddenSeriesChange` or uncontrolled via `defaultHiddenSeries`) drop their cells everywhere; column widths reproportion themselves to the remaining visible totals. `onSeriesToggle({series, hidden})` fires on legend click. Percentage labels paint at the cell center when `showPercentageLabels=true` AND the cell's pixel area >= `labelMinArea`; cells too small for a readable label automatically hide their text. `cellGap` is split half above + half below the cell so neighbours have a thin divider. Hover/focus on a cell sets the hovered key (`columnId::seriesId`) and opens a tooltip with the column + series labels, the formatted value, the share within the column, and the share of the overall grand total. Per-cell click handler fires with `{cell}`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` per cell group (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `columns: readonly ChartMarimekkoColumn[]` ({id, label, values: readonly number[]}) / `series: readonly ChartMarimekkoSeries[]` ({id, label, color?}) / `width?` (560) / `height?` (360) / `padding?` (36) / `cellGap?` (1) / `columnGap?` (2) / `labelMinArea?` (280) / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showPercentageLabels?` (true) / `showColumnLabels?` (true) / `showColumnTotals?` (false) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Marimekko chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatPercent?` / `legendPlacement?` ('right'\|'bottom', default 'bottom') / `onCellClick?({cell})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_MARIMEKKO_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/CELL_GAP/COLUMN_GAP/LABEL_MIN_AREA/PALETTE`; `getMarimekkoDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; non-finite/negative -> color 0; `getMarimekkoColumnTotal(column, hiddenIndices)` -- positive-finite sum; respects hidden; `getMarimekkoGrandTotal(columns, hiddenIndices)` -- sum across columns; `computeMarimekkoLayout({columns, series, hiddenSeries, innerW, innerH, padX, padY, cellGap, columnGap})` -- canonical layout returning per-column `{ id, index, label, total, share, x, y, width, height, cells }` where each cell is `{ columnId, columnIndex, seriesId, seriesIndex, value, columnTotal, columnShare, cellShare, overallShare, x, y, width, height, color, label, seriesLabel, columnLabel }`; non-positive inner / zero grand total / empty -> []; `describeMarimekkoChart(columns, series, hiddenSeries, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Marimekko chart with C columns and V visible series. Total <grand>."; empty / zero -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-marimekko-aria-desc"` span; per-cell `<rect role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<columnLabel> / <seriesLabel>: <value> (<cellShare>% of column)"`; legend `<button aria-pressed>` per series + per-series `aria-label="Toggle <label>"`. data-section on every node (chart-marimekko / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -columns / -column / -cell / -rect / -cell-label / -column-label / -column-total / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-column / -tooltip-overall / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-column-count, data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-cell-count, data-grand-total, data-animate; column groups mirror data-column-id, data-column-index, data-column-total, data-column-share, data-column-width; cell groups mirror data-column-id, data-series-id, data-series-index, data-cell-value, data-cell-color, data-cell-share, data-column-share, data-overall-share, data-hovered; legend items mirror data-series-id, data-series-hidden. 57 vitest cases (1 constants + 3 getMarimekkoDefaultColor + 3 getMarimekkoColumnTotal + 2 getMarimekkoGrandTotal + 14 computeMarimekkoLayout + 4 describeMarimekkoChart + 30 component) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.475-ui-chart-marimekko.md): true mosaic / contingency table variant with row bands spanning columns (use `<ChartMosaic>`); animated transitions on data / hidden-series changes (snap v1; mount fade only); 100%-stacked variant with uniform column widths (use `<ChartStackedBar>`); negative values (Marimekko requires positive shares; non-positive values skipped).
