| 11.506 | UI: chart-line-marker primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.524 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-marker.tsx` ships `<ChartLineMarker>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **configurable per-point markers**. Four built-in shapes ship out of the box (`'circle'`, `'square'`, `'triangle'`, `'diamond'`) plus `'none'` to omit the marker entirely. All five are exported in the `LINE_MARKER_SHAPES` canonical array. Series declare a default shape via `series.marker`; individual points override the series default via `point.marker`. Resolution order (first match wins): `point.marker` -> `series.marker` -> `'circle'` fallback. `'none'` is honoured verbatim at either layer (the marker `<path>` is suppressed entirely). All four real shapes emit closed `M ... Z` SVG path strings via `buildLineMarkerShapePath(shape, cx, cy, size)`: `circle` uses two semicircular arcs (`M cx-r cy A r r 0 1 0 cx+r cy A r r 0 1 0 cx-r cy Z`); `square` uses 4 axis-aligned vertices; `triangle` is an equilateral pointing up with apex at `(cx, cy - size)` and base at `cy + size/2` (base half-width = `size * sqrt(3) / 2`); `diamond` is a 4-cardinal-point rhombus. Non-positive `size`, non-finite center, or `'none'` -> empty string. The four real shapes always produce distinct path strings (asserted in tests). Markers render via `<path>` so they fill, stroke, and animate uniformly via SVG attributes. Distinct from `<ChartLine>` and other line variants which paint markers as a fixed circle; chart-line-marker parametrises the marker shape per series and per point. Distinct from `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505), `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` (11.504), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502), `<ChartLineMulti>` (11.500), `<ChartLineZoom>` (11.501), `<ChartLineDashed>` (11.499), `<ChartLineSmooth>` (11.498), `<ChartLineStep>` (11.497) which all focus on other dimensions of line chart customisation. Marker fill respects `series.markerFill` if set, otherwise falls back to `series.color` -- this separation lets adopters give the line stroke and marker fill different colours (e.g. coloured line with white-filled markers for contrast). Tooltip adds a `marker:` row identifying the shape of the hovered marker; per-marker `data-marker-shape` exposes the shape to tests. Legend swatches show a tiny line plus the series's default marker shape so the combination is unmistakable. Hover/focus on a marker dims every other series stroke + marker to ~30%. Per-marker `onPointClick({series, point})`. Legend toggles series visibility (controlled + uncontrolled). Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartLineMarkerSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly ChartLineMarkerPoint[], color?, marker?, markerFill?}) where `ChartLineMarkerPoint = {x, y, marker?}` / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `tickCount?` (5) / `strokeWidth?` (1.75) / `markerSize?` (5) / `lineOpacity?` (1) / `markerOpacity?` (1) / `markerStrokeWidth?` (1) / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showMarkers?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Line chart with markers') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatX?` / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `onPointClick?({series, point})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_MARKER_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/MARKER_SIZE/LINE_OPACITY/MARKER_OPACITY/MARKER_STROKE_WIDTH/DEFAULT_SHAPE/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `LINE_MARKER_SHAPES` (canonical shape array `['circle', 'square', 'triangle', 'diamond', 'none']`); `getLineMarkerDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `getLineMarkerFinitePoints(points)` -- drops non-finite x/y; non-array -> []; `getLineMarkerBounds(series, hidden?)` -- per-axis bounds; empty -> unit square; collapsed +/- 0.5; `getLineMarkerTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `buildLineMarkerLinePath(points)` -- `M x y L x y ...`; empty -> ''; single -> M only; `resolveLineMarkerShape(point, seriesDefault)` -- canonical resolution per the order above; honours 'none' verbatim; `buildLineMarkerShapePath(shape, cx, cy, size)` -- canonical closed SVG path; non-positive size / non-finite center / 'none' -> ''; four real shapes always distinct; `computeLineMarkerLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight }`; per-series `{ id, label, index, color, markerFill, defaultShape, points, finiteCount, totalCount, linePath }`; per-point `{ index, x, y, px, py, shape, markerPath }`; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty; drops non-finite points but keeps totalCount; preserves originalIndex through hidden-series filter; respects custom markerSize; `describeLineMarkerChart(series, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with shape markers: N series and K points (label1 (shape1), label2 (shape2), ...). x range ..."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-marker-aria-desc"` span; per-line-path `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series>: line with K points"`; per-marker `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series>: x=<x>, y=<y> (<shape>)"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-marker / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -marker / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-shape / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-marker-size, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-marker (default shape), data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; markers mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-marker-shape, data-x, data-y, data-hovered; legend items mirror data-series-marker. 74 vitest cases (1 constants + 1 LINE_MARKER_SHAPES + 2 getLineMarkerDefaultColor + 2 getLineMarkerFinitePoints + 3 getLineMarkerBounds + 2 getLineMarkerTicks + 3 buildLineMarkerLinePath + 4 resolveLineMarkerShape (no point + no default fallback, series default, per-point wins, none honoured) + 7 buildLineMarkerShapePath (none, non-positive size, non-finite center, circle path, square path, triangle apex, diamond cardinal points, 4 distinct paths) + 13 computeLineMarkerLayout (incl. default shape attaches per series, per-point override, markerPath built, none -> empty markerPath, hidden filter, custom markerSize) + 4 describeLineMarkerChart + 34 component (incl. per-point override respected in data attr, series default carried through to non-overridden points, marker='none' disables all markers, per-point 'none' override works, all 4 shapes render distinct data attrs in a 4-series fixture)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.506-ui-chart-line-marker.md): image / sprite markers (only built-in vector shapes + 'none' v1); per-series stroke dash (use `<ChartLineDashed>`); curved line between markers (use `<ChartLineSmooth>` or `<ChartLineStep>`); per-shape size override (single markerSize for the chart); filled area under line (use `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` / `<ChartLineAreaStacked>`); log-scale axes (linear only). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w488. Bump 1.11.524. |
| 11.507 | UI: chart-line-segment primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.525 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-segment.tsx` ships `<ChartLineSegment>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **colours each line segment based on threshold matching**. The canonical "SLO-coloured" line pattern: line goes red where the metric exceeds the critical threshold, yellow at warning, and neutral elsewhere. Each series carries a sorted `thresholds: [{value, color, label?}]` list plus a `classifyBy: 'max' | 'min' | 'avg' | 'start' | 'end'` (default 'max') that reduces each segment's two endpoint y values to a single representative value. `classifyLineSegmentValue(startY, endY, by)` is the canonical reducer: 'max' returns the larger, 'min' the smaller, 'avg' the arithmetic mean, 'start'/'end' the respective endpoint y; non-finite inputs collapse to 0. `pickLineSegmentColor(value, thresholds, fallback)` walks the sorted-by-value thresholds top to bottom; the first threshold whose value is `<= effectiveValue` wins (exact equality counts as crossed); empty / no-match -> the `fallback` colour; non-finite value -> always fallback; drops thresholds with non-finite values or non-string colours before sorting; returns `{ color, thresholdLabel, thresholdValue }`. The picked threshold's label + value are recorded on the segment so the tooltip and aria-label can surface "you crossed `critical` at 80". `buildLineSegmentPath(points, thresholds, classifyBy, fallback)` walks consecutive points pairwise, classifies each segment, and merges consecutive same-colour segments into a single SVG sub-path so the DOM stays small even for long series with infrequent transitions; a colour transition closes the current sub-path at the transition point and opens a new sub-path that starts at the transition point so the line stays visually continuous (no gap). Edge cases: empty input or single point -> [] (no segments); two points -> exactly one segment; N same-colour points -> 1 segment; N alternating-colour points -> N-1 segments. Distinct from `<ChartLineDashed>` (11.499) which paints one stroke and varies dash patterns per segment (chart-line-segment varies the *colour* per segment based on threshold classification), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503) which paints horizontal threshold rules + zone shading (chart-line-segment paints the line itself in the threshold colour), `<ChartLineMarker>` (11.506) (per-point marker shape encoding), `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505), `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` (11.504), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502), `<ChartLineZoom>` (11.501), `<ChartLineMulti>` (11.500), `<ChartLineSmooth>` (11.498), `<ChartLineStep>` (11.497) which all focus on other dimensions. Hover/focus on a dot dims every other series stroke to ~30%; tooltip shows series label + formatted x + formatted y + (when the point's segment crosses a threshold) a coloured `threshold:` row identifying the band by label and value. Per-segment `onSegmentClick({series, segment})` callback (in addition to per-dot `onPointClick({series, point})`) so adopters can react to band hits at the segment level. Legend toggles series visibility (controlled + uncontrolled); legend also renders one tiny coloured swatch per threshold so the colour-to-label mapping is part of the legend (thresholds themselves are not toggleable). Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartLineSegmentSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly {x, y}[], color?, thresholds?, classifyBy?}) where `ChartLineSegmentThreshold = {value, color, label?}` / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `tickCount?` (5) / `strokeWidth?` (1.75) / `dotRadius?` (3) / `lineOpacity?` (1) / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showDots?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Threshold-coloured line chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatX?` / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `onPointClick?({series, point})` / `onSegmentClick?({series, segment})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_SEGMENT_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/CLASSIFY_BY/FALLBACK_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineSegmentDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `getLineSegmentFinitePoints(points)` -- drops non-finite x/y; non-array -> []; `getLineSegmentBounds(series, hidden?)` -- per-axis bounds; empty -> unit square; collapsed +/- 0.5; `getLineSegmentTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `classifyLineSegmentValue(startY, endY, by?)` -- segment reduction per classifyBy; non-finite -> 0; default 'max'; `pickLineSegmentColor(value, thresholds, fallback)` -- canonical threshold matcher; sorts descending; first match wins; empty / no match / non-finite value -> fallback; drops thresholds with non-finite values; `buildLineSegmentPath(points, thresholds, classifyBy, fallback)` -- canonical segment builder; empty / single -> []; merges same-colour consecutive segments; splits at colour transitions with continuous line; records value + thresholdLabel + thresholdValue per segment; `computeLineSegmentLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight }`; per-series `{ id, label, index, fallbackColor, classifyBy, thresholds, points, segments, finiteCount, totalCount }`; per-segment `{ index, startIndex, endIndex, color, thresholdLabel, thresholdValue, value, path }`; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty; drops non-finite points but keeps totalCount; preserves originalIndex through hidden-series filter; segment startIndex/endIndex correspond to indices in the original data array; `describeLineSegmentChart(series, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Threshold-coloured line chart: N series, K points, M threshold band[s]. x range ..."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-segment-aria-desc"` span; per-segment `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series> segment <startIndex> to <endIndex> (<thresholdLabel>)"`; per-dot `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series>: x=<x>, y=<y>"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-segment / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-threshold / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-threshold / -legend-threshold-swatch / -legend-threshold-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-total-segments, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-fallback-color, data-series-classify-by, data-series-segment-count, data-series-threshold-count, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; paths mirror data-series-id, data-segment-index, data-segment-start, data-segment-end, data-segment-color, data-segment-value, data-segment-threshold-label, data-segment-threshold-value; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-hovered; grid lines + ticks mirror data-axis (x/y), data-tick-value. 78 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getLineSegmentDefaultColor + 2 getLineSegmentFinitePoints + 3 getLineSegmentBounds + 2 getLineSegmentTicks + 6 classifyLineSegmentValue (max default, min, avg, start, end, non-finite collapse) + 8 pickLineSegmentColor (empty, undefined, below all, top-down match, exact match, label exposure, drop non-finite, non-finite value -> fallback) + 9 buildLineSegmentPath (empty, single, two points, merge same-color, split on threshold cross, value recorded, classifyBy=avg, M+L commands, max=90 4-segment cross-over, min=10 collapses) + 9 computeLineSegmentLayout (incl. classifyBy + threshold count recorded, segment splits at threshold crossings, hidden filter, fallback color, startIndex/endIndex from original data) + 5 describeLineSegmentChart + 31 component (incl. multi-segment paths when thresholds split, segment color + threshold attrs exposed, threshold swatches in legend, segment click handler, segment aria-label with threshold info)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.507-ui-chart-line-segment.md): per-point colour (only per-segment via threshold classification); gradient transitions across thresholds (hard colour cut at the point that crosses; adopters use SVG `<linearGradient>` directly for smooth fades); threshold animation on value crossing (snap; mount fade only); log-scale axes (linear only); crossing-point interpolation (v1 does not subdivide a segment at the exact x where y crosses the threshold). | 11.508 | UI: chart-line-discontinuous primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.526 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-discontinuous.tsx` ships `<ChartLineDiscontinuous>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **explicitly breaks the line at `null` / `undefined` data points**. The canonical "data outage" pattern for monitoring dashboards. Unlike every other line primitive which drops non-finite points silently, this one distinguishes `null` / `undefined` y (an explicit gap marker) from `NaN` (a dropped point) and surfaces the gap visually with a dashed gap-marker rule under the x axis between bracketing finite points. Classifiers: `isFiniteDiscontinuousPoint(point)` true only when both x is finite AND y is a finite number; `isLineDiscontinuousGap(point)` true for `y === null` or `y === undefined` (NaN is NOT a gap marker -- it is a dropped point). This distinction lets adopters use `NaN` for "no data ever recorded" and `null` for "recorded but the metric was unavailable". `buildLineDiscontinuousRuns(points, connectGaps)` walks an ordered sequence of layout points (with optional `isGap: true` markers) and returns: `runs[]` (contiguous arrays of finite-y points; each run owns an `M ... L ...` path; single-finite-point runs render as a lone M) and `gaps[]` (one record per gap that sits between two bracketing finite points; exposes startIndex, endIndex from original data, startX, endX, width in pixels). Leading and trailing gaps (no bracketing finite point on one side) record no gaps entry. `connectGaps=true` collapses the runs into a single run that spans across the gaps; the gap records are still preserved so adopters who want to visually mark "the data was nulled here even though we connected through it" can still do so. Distinct from `<ChartLineSegment>` (11.507) (threshold-coloured per-segment line; no gap semantics), `<ChartLineMarker>` (11.506) (per-point marker shape), `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505), `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` (11.504), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502), `<ChartLineZoom>` (11.501), `<ChartLineMulti>` (11.500), `<ChartLineDashed>` (11.499), `<ChartLineSmooth>` (11.498), `<ChartLineStep>` (11.497). `getLineDiscontinuousBounds` includes gap-marker x positions in the x range so the dashed gap rule below the axis stays visible even when the gap is at the edge of the data. Per-series `gapCount`, `runs.length`, `finiteCount`, `totalCount` exposed via both layout + data attrs. Dots render only at finite-y points (gap markers do NOT render a dot). Hover/focus on a dot dims every other series to ~30%; tooltip shows series label + formatted x + formatted y. Per-dot `onPointClick({series, point})` callback. Legend toggles series visibility (controlled + uncontrolled). Per-gap dashed horizontal rule renders just under the x axis between bracketing finite points so adopters can see exactly where the gap lives; suppressed by `showGapMarkers=false` or by `series.connectGaps=true`. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartLineDiscontinuousSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly ChartLineDiscontinuousPoint[], color?, connectGaps?}) where `ChartLineDiscontinuousPoint = {x: number, y: number | null | undefined}` / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `tickCount?` (5) / `strokeWidth?` (1.75) / `dotRadius?` (3) / `lineOpacity?` (1) / `gapMarkerOpacity?` (0.45) / `gapMarkerDash?` ('2 3') / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showDots?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showGapMarkers?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Discontinuous line chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatX?` / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `onPointClick?({series, point})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_DISCONTINUOUS_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/GAP_MARKER_OPACITY/GAP_MARKER_DASH/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineDiscontinuousDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `isFiniteDiscontinuousPoint(point)` -- classifier; `isLineDiscontinuousGap(point)` -- gap classifier; `getLineDiscontinuousFinitePoints(points)` -- returns `{point, originalIndex}[]`; non-array -> []; `getLineDiscontinuousGapCount(points)` -- count of null/undefined markers (NaN not counted); non-array -> 0; `getLineDiscontinuousBounds(series, hidden?)` -- per-axis bounds (includes gap x positions); empty -> unit square; collapsed +/- 0.5; `getLineDiscontinuousTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `buildLineDiscontinuousRuns(points, connectGaps)` -- canonical run/gap builder; empty -> {runs: [], gaps: []}; single finite -> 1 run; gap between finite points -> N+1 runs + N gap records; leading/trailing gaps don't record gap entries; connectGaps=true collapses runs but preserves gap records; `computeLineDiscontinuousLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight }`; per-series `{ id, label, index, color, connectGaps, points, runs, gaps, finiteCount, gapCount, totalCount }`; per-run `{ index, startIndex, endIndex, pointCount, path }`; per-gap `{ index, startIndex, endIndex, startX, endX, width }`; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty; dots only at finite points; preserves originalIndex through hidden-series filter; `describeLineDiscontinuousChart(series, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Discontinuous line chart with N series, K points, and G gap marker[s]. x range ..."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-discontinuous-aria-desc"` span; per-run `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series> run <startIndex> to <endIndex> (N points)"`; per-dot `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"<series>: x=<x>, y=<y>"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-discontinuous / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -gap-markers / -gap-marker / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-total-gaps, data-total-runs, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-connect-gaps, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-gap-count, data-series-run-count, data-hovered; run paths mirror data-series-id, data-run-index, data-run-start, data-run-end, data-run-point-count; gap markers mirror data-series-id, data-gap-index, data-gap-start, data-gap-end, data-gap-width; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-hovered; grid lines + ticks mirror data-axis (x/y), data-tick-value. 78 vitest cases (1 constants + 4 isFiniteDiscontinuousPoint + 3 isLineDiscontinuousGap + 1 getLineDiscontinuousDefaultColor + 2 getLineDiscontinuousFinitePoints + 3 getLineDiscontinuousGapCount + 3 getLineDiscontinuousBounds + 2 getLineDiscontinuousTicks + 11 buildLineDiscontinuousRuns (empty, single, no gaps, one gap split, gap span recorded, multiple gaps, leading gap, trailing gap, connectGaps collapses, M+L commands) + 11 computeLineDiscontinuousLayout (incl. gap split, connectGaps keeps gaps, consecutive gaps, dots only at finite, hidden filter, NaN x dropped as non-gap, gap pixel span) + 5 describeLineDiscontinuousChart + 28 component (incl. one path per run, run start/end/point-count data attrs, one dot per finite point, gap markers per gap, omits when showGapMarkers=false, connectGaps=true collapses to one path and suppresses gap markers, all-gap series renders nothing, per-series gap+run counts on data attrs)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.508-ui-chart-line-discontinuous.md): dashed line through gaps (use connectGaps=true + `<ChartLineDashed>` overlay); inferred null points from sample-rate detection (caller passes explicit nulls); animated reveal at gap edges (snap v1; mount fade only); log-scale axes (linear only); per-gap onClick handler (the dashed marker is decorative; adopters derive callbacks from `gaps[]` layout output). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w490. Bump 1.11.526. |
| 11.509 | UI: chart-line-annotated primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.527 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-annotated.tsx` ships `<ChartLineAnnotated>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **vertical annotation lines + text labels at specific x values**. The canonical "annotated event" pattern for monitoring dashboards: metric over time with vertical reference lines marking deploys, incidents, releases, holidays, or any other moment-in-time event. Each annotation owns its own colour, label position, and dash pattern. Annotation spec: `ChartLineAnnotatedAnnotation = { id, x, label, color?, position?, dashArray? }`; `x` (required, finite); `label` (required) renders above/below/inside the plot at that x; `color` (default `'#64748b'`) drives both the vertical line stroke and the label fill; `position` (default `'top'`) is `'top'` (label above plot at `padding - 6`) / `'inline'` (label inside plot at `padding + 12`) / `'bottom'` (label below plot at `padding + innerHeight + 18`); `dashArray` (default `'4 3'`). `getLineAnnotatedFiniteAnnotations` drops malformed entries (non-string id, non-finite x) silently while preserving input order for adopter z-ordering. `getLineAnnotatedBounds` expands the x range to include every finite annotation x so the vertical lines always sit inside the active plot. Each annotation records `px` (pixel x position), `inRange` (true when annotation x is within active x bounds; rendering skips out-of-range annotations), `labelX/Y/Anchor` resolved via the canonical exported helper `resolveLineAnnotatedLabel(px, position, padding, innerHeight)`. Annotations live in an independent SVG `<g>` group *after* the series so the vertical rules render *on top of* the line stroke at intersections (annotation has visual priority). Per-annotation `onAnnotationClick({annotation})` callback (in addition to the standard per-dot `onPointClick({series, point})`) so adopters can react -- e.g. open a release-notes drawer, scroll to incident details. Annotation lines are focusable (`role="graphics-symbol"` + `tabIndex={0}`) with aria-labels like `"Annotation deploy v2.3 at x 2"`. Distinct from `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503) which paints horizontal threshold rules + zone shading (chart-line-annotated paints vertical event rules with text labels instead), `<ChartLineDiscontinuous>` (11.508) (null/undefined gap markers), `<ChartLineSegment>` (11.507) (per-segment threshold colour), `<ChartLineMarker>` (11.506), `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505), `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` (11.504), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502), `<ChartLineZoom>` (11.501), `<ChartLineMulti>` (11.500), `<ChartLineDashed>` (11.499), `<ChartLineSmooth>` (11.498), `<ChartLineStep>` (11.497) which all focus on other dimensions. Hover/focus on a dot dims every other series to ~30% and opens a tooltip with series label + formatted x + formatted y. Legend toggles series visibility (controlled + uncontrolled). Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartLineAnnotatedSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly {x, y}[], color?}) / `annotations?: readonly ChartLineAnnotatedAnnotation[]` ({id, x, label, color?, position?, dashArray?}) / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (48) / `tickCount?` (5) / `strokeWidth?` (1.75) / `dotRadius?` (3) / `lineOpacity?` (1) / `annotationOpacity?` (0.85) / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showDots?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showAnnotationLines?` (true) / `showAnnotationLabels?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Annotated line chart') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatX?` / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `onPointClick?({series, point})` / `onAnnotationClick?({annotation})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_ANNOTATED_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/ANNOTATION_OPACITY/ANNOTATION_DASH/ANNOTATION_COLOR/ANNOTATION_POSITION/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineAnnotatedDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `getLineAnnotatedFinitePoints(points)` -- drops non-finite; non-array -> []; `getLineAnnotatedFiniteAnnotations(annotations)` -- drops malformed entries; preserves input order; non-array -> []; `getLineAnnotatedBounds(series, annotations, hidden?)` -- per-axis bounds with annotation x expansion; empty -> unit square; collapsed +/- 0.5; falls back to y=(0..1) when only annotations exist; `getLineAnnotatedTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `buildLineAnnotatedPath(points)` -- `M x y L x y ...`; empty -> ''; single -> M only; `resolveLineAnnotatedLabel(px, position, padding, innerHeight)` -- canonical label coordinate resolver; non-finite px -> falls back to padding; clamps top labelY to >= 0; `computeLineAnnotatedLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, annotations, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight }`; per-series standard; per-annotation `{ id, index, originalIndex, x, px, label, color, position, dashArray, inRange, labelX, labelY, labelAnchor }`; degenerate canvas -> empty; emits annotations even when no series; preserves originalIndex through annotation filtering; honours per-annotation color/dash/position overrides; falls back to defaults otherwise; `describeLineAnnotatedChart(series, annotations?, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Annotated line chart: N series, K points, M annotation[s]. Annotations: <label> at <x>; ..."; with no annotations omits the annotation list; empty / no finite + no annotations -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-annotated-aria-desc"` span; per-line-path `<path role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>`; per-annotation-line `<line role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>` with aria-label `"Annotation <label> at x <x>"`; per-dot `<circle role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}>`. data-section on every node (chart-line-annotated / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -annotations / -annotation / -annotation-line / -annotation-label / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-annotation-count, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; annotations mirror data-annotation-id, data-annotation-index, data-annotation-x, data-annotation-px, data-annotation-color, data-annotation-position; annotation lines mirror data-annotation-id; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-hovered; grid lines + ticks mirror data-axis (x/y), data-tick-value. 75 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getLineAnnotatedDefaultColor + 2 getLineAnnotatedFinitePoints + 4 getLineAnnotatedFiniteAnnotations + 5 getLineAnnotatedBounds (incl. annotation expansion, annotations-only fallback, hidden filter) + 2 getLineAnnotatedTicks + 3 buildLineAnnotatedPath + 5 resolveLineAnnotatedLabel (top, inline, bottom, padding < 6 clamp, non-finite px fallback) + 13 computeLineAnnotatedLayout (incl. annotations-only layout, inRange flag, color/dash/position overrides, fallback defaults, pixel mapping, originalIndex recorded, hidden filter) + 5 describeLineAnnotatedChart + 33 component (incl. one annotation line per annotation, label text, data attrs exposed, onAnnotationClick callback, top label above + bottom label below, annotations-only chart still renders annotations, skips out-of-range annotations)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.509-ui-chart-line-annotated.md): range annotations (start..end x band; v1 is point annotations only; use `<ChartLineThreshold>` + custom zone or compose multiple annotations); auto-staggering of labels when annotations are close together (v1 paints them all at the same y per position; adopters vary `position` manually); annotation symbols/icons (text labels only); animated reveal at annotation x positions (snap; mount fade only); log-scale axes (linear only). Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w491. Bump 1.11.527. |
| 11.510 | UI: chart-line-baseline primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.528 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-baseline.tsx` ships `<ChartLineBaseline>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **an adjustable horizontal baseline reference** and per-point classification of whether each y value sits **above**, **below**, or **equal to** the baseline. Each dot is coloured by direction (green above, red below, neutral equal) when `colorDotsByDirection=true` (default); the tooltip surfaces the signed delta from baseline. The canonical "metric vs target" pattern for performance dashboards (delta from 0, delta from budget, delta from SLO). `classifyLineBaselinePoint(y, baseline, epsilon?)` returns `{ delta, direction }`: `delta = y - baseline` (signed); direction = 'above' when `delta > epsilon`, 'below' when `delta < -epsilon`, else 'equal'; non-finite -> `{0, 'equal'}`; `epsilon` widens the equality band for noise tolerance. `pickLineBaselineDotColor(direction, fallback, above, below, equal)` returns the appropriate colour; empty direction colour falls back to series fallback. `getLineBaselineBounds(series, hidden?, baseline?)` extends the y range to include the baseline so the reference rule is always visible without manual yMin/yMax. The baseline pixel `baselineY` is clamped to inside the inner plot so the rule stays visually meaningful even when the baseline is outside the active y range. Per-series direction counts (`aboveCount`, `belowCount`, `equalCount`) plus total counts at the root are exposed via data attrs for adopters who want to drive summary widgets. Distinct from `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` (11.504) which uses the baseline as the floor for a gradient-filled area (no above/below classification, no delta tooltips), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503) which paints multiple horizontal thresholds + zone shading (chart-line-baseline is one canonical reference + per-point classification), `<ChartLineAnnotated>` (11.509) (vertical event annotations), `<ChartLineDiscontinuous>` (11.508) (gap markers), `<ChartLineSegment>` (11.507), `<ChartLineMarker>` (11.506), `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502), `<ChartLineZoom>` (11.501), `<ChartLineMulti>` (11.500), `<ChartLineDashed>` (11.499), `<ChartLineSmooth>` (11.498), `<ChartLineStep>` (11.497). Baseline reference line renders as a prominent dashed horizontal rule with optional label at the right edge. Hover/focus on a dot dims other series strokes to ~30% and opens a tooltip with series label + formatted x + formatted y + a coloured **delta row** describing `+/- delta vs baseline` (using `formatDelta` formatter; defaults to `+/-N` sign-aware format). Legend includes "above" / "below" swatches when `colorDotsByDirection=true` (default). Per-dot `onPointClick({series, point})` callback. Mount fade via `motion-safe:animate-fade-in` (suppressed via `animate=false`). API: `series: readonly ChartLineBaselineSeries[]` ({id, label, data: readonly {x, y}[], color?}) / `baseline?` (0) / `baselineLabel?` / `baselineColor?` ('#64748b') / `baselineDash?` ('4 3') / `baselineWidth?` (1.5) / `aboveColor?` ('#16a34a') / `belowColor?` ('#dc2626') / `equalColor?` ('#94a3b8') / `colorDotsByDirection?` (true) / `epsilon?` (0) / `xMin?` / `xMax?` / `yMin?` / `yMax?` / `width?` (560) / `height?` (320) / `padding?` (40) / `tickCount?` (5) / `strokeWidth?` (1.75) / `dotRadius?` (3) / `lineOpacity?` (1) / `gridColor?` / `axisColor?` / `hiddenSeries?` / `defaultHiddenSeries?` / `onHiddenSeriesChange?` / `showAxis?` (true) / `showGrid?` (true) / `showDots?` (true) / `showLegend?` (true) / `showTooltip?` (true) / `showBaseline?` (true) / `showBaselineLabel?` (true) / `showDeltaInTooltip?` (true) / `animate?` (true) / `className?` / `ariaLabel?` (default 'Line chart with adjustable baseline') / `ariaDescription?` / `formatValue?` / `formatX?` / `formatDelta?` / `xLabel?` / `yLabel?` / `onPointClick?({series, point})` / `onSeriesToggle?({series, hidden})` / `style?`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_BASELINE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/BASELINE_VALUE/BASELINE_WIDTH/BASELINE_DASH/BASELINE_COLOR/ABOVE_COLOR/BELOW_COLOR/EQUAL_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineBaselineDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette modulo wrap; `getLineBaselineFinitePoints(points)` -- drops non-finite x/y; non-array -> []; `classifyLineBaselinePoint(y, baseline, epsilon?)` -- canonical point classifier; non-finite -> equal/0; `pickLineBaselineDotColor(direction, fallback, above, below, equal)` -- direction-to-colour; empty direction colour -> fallback; `getLineBaselineBounds(series, hidden?, baseline?)` -- per-axis bounds with baseline expansion both above and below the data; empty -> unit square; collapsed +/- 0.5; `getLineBaselineTicks(min, max, count?)` -- evenly-spaced; collapsed -> single tick; invalid range -> []; `buildLineBaselinePath(points)` -- `M x y L x y ...`; empty -> ''; single -> M only; `computeLineBaselineLayout(input)` -- canonical layout returning `{ series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, baseline, baselineY, innerWidth, innerHeight }`; per-series `{ id, label, index, color, points, finiteCount, totalCount, aboveCount, belowCount, equalCount, path }`; per-point `{ index, x, y, px, py, delta, direction }`; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty; preserves originalIndex through hidden-series filter; baselineY clamped to inside the inner plot; falls back to default baseline 0 when omitted; respects epsilon for equal classification; `describeLineBaselineChart(series, baseline, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with adjustable baseline at <baseline>: N series, K points (A above, B below, E equal)."; empty / no finite -> "No data". ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-baseline-aria-desc"` span; per-line-path + per-dot + per-baseline-line `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; per-dot aria-label `"<series>: x=<x>, y=<y>, <direction> baseline by <delta>"`; baseline aria-label `"Baseline at <value>: <label?>"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-baseline / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -reference / -reference-line / -reference-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-delta / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-direction / -legend-direction-swatch / -legend-direction-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-baseline, data-baseline-y, data-above-count, data-below-count, data-equal-count, data-animate; series groups mirror data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-above-count, data-series-below-count, data-series-equal-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-delta, data-direction, data-dot-color, data-hovered; baseline reference mirrors data-baseline-value, data-baseline-y; tooltip mirrors data-direction; grid lines + ticks mirror data-axis (x/y), data-tick-value. 74 vitest cases (1 constants + 2 getLineBaselineDefaultColor + 2 getLineBaselineFinitePoints + 5 classifyLineBaselinePoint (above, below, equal, epsilon, non-finite) + 4 pickLineBaselineDotColor + 5 getLineBaselineBounds (incl. baseline above + below data, hidden filter) + 2 getLineBaselineTicks + 3 buildLineBaselinePath + 11 computeLineBaselineLayout (incl. baseline + baselineY recorded, baselineY clamped when out of range, per-point direction + delta, above/below/equal counts, epsilon classification, hidden filter, default baseline 0) + 5 describeLineBaselineChart + 34 component (incl. baseline reference line, baseline label when provided, colour dots by direction, per-dot direction + delta data attrs, tooltip delta row, formatDelta usage, direction legend items, per-series direction counts)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for touched files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Out of scope (documented in docs/patches/11.510-ui-chart-line-baseline.md): per-series baseline (the baseline is chart-level; compose multiple instances if per-series needed); slanted baseline (linearly-changing target); animated baseline drag (baseline is a prop, not a draggable handle); log-scale axes (linear only); filled deviation area between line and baseline (use `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` with explicit baseline for that pattern). | 11.511 | UI: chart-line-comparison primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.529 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-comparison.tsx` ships `<ChartLineComparison>` -- pure-SVG line chart for **comparing two series via difference shading between two curves**. Renders both `primary` and `secondary` series as line paths and paints the polygon strip between them whose colour encodes **which curve is on top** at that segment: `primaryAboveColor` (default `#2563eb`) when `primary > secondary`, `primaryBelowColor` (default `#dc2626`) when `primary < secondary`. When the two curves cross inside a segment, the segment is split exactly at the crossing x via the absolute-delta proportion `x* = x1 + (x2 - x1) * abs(p1 - s1) / (abs(p1 - s1) + abs(p2 - s2))` and the two halves are emitted as separate polygons with opposite directions; degenerate cases (equal endpoint, zero-total delta, x1==x2, non-finite) report no crossing. Distinct from `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502; per-point upper/lower band around ONE series), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503; horizontal reference lines + zone shading), `<ChartLineAreaGradient>` (11.504; vertical gradient fill below ONE line), `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505; stacked series with absolute / percent modes), and `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510; per-point classification vs flat horizontal baseline). API: `primary: ChartLineComparisonSeries | null` / `secondary: ChartLineComparisonSeries | null` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?}`); `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax` bounds overrides (swapped if inverted, expanded +/- 0.5 on zero range); `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3) / `lineOpacity` (1) / `fillOpacity` (0.2); `primaryAboveColor` / `primaryBelowColor` / `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` (true) / `showGrid` (true) / `showDots` (true) / `showLegend` (true) / `showTooltip` (true) / `showRegions` (true) / `animate` (true); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Comparison line chart') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel` axis-label slots; `onPointClick({track, point})` / `onRegionClick({region})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_COMPARISON_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/FILL_OPACITY/PRIMARY_COLOR/SECONDARY_COLOR/PRIMARY_ABOVE_COLOR/PRIMARY_BELOW_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineComparisonDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color palette cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0, fractional floored; `getLineComparisonFinitePoints(points)` -- drops non-finite x / non-finite y, non-array input -> []; `buildLineComparisonXUnion(primary, secondary)` -- sorted unique x across both series, skips non-finite, [] when empty; `buildLineComparisonYLookup(series)` -- `Map<x, y>` of finite samples; `interpolateLineComparisonY(x, x1, y1, x2, y2)` -- linear (or y1 when x1==x2; y1 / 0 on non-finite); `findLineComparisonCrossing(x1, p1, s1, x2, p2, s2)` -- crossing x via absolute-delta proportion (null on same sign / exact zero delta / x1==x2 / non-finite); `computeLineComparisonLayout({primary, secondary, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?, primaryAboveColor?, primaryBelowColor?})` returns `{primary, secondary, regions, stats, xTicks, yTicks, xUnion, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight}`; regions carry `{index, startX, endX, primaryHigher, path, fillColor, area}` where `area = mean(abs(gap)) * abs(dx)`; stats aggregates `{primaryHigherCount, secondaryHigherCount, equalCount, maxPrimaryGap, maxSecondaryGap, crossingCount, xUnionCount}`; degenerate canvas / null series / inner area <= 0 -> empty layout; `describeLineComparisonChart(primary, secondary, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Comparison line chart between A and B across N x samples: P where A higher, S where B higher, E equal. Peak A gap <v>, peak B gap <v>." (No data when missing). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-comparison-aria-desc"` span; line paths and dots are `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}` with per-shape aria-label including label + (x, y). data-section on every node (chart-line-comparison / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -regions / -region / -tracks / -track-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-delta / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-region / -legend-region-swatch / -legend-region-label); root mirrors data-x-union-count, data-region-count, data-crossing-count, data-primary-higher-count, data-secondary-higher-count, data-equal-count, data-max-primary-gap, data-max-secondary-gap, data-animate; track group mirrors data-track ('primary' | 'secondary'), data-series-id, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; region mirrors data-region-index, data-region-start, data-region-end, data-region-primary-higher, data-region-fill-color, data-region-area. Tooltip surfaces the track label, x, y, and a coloured `vs <other label>: +/-<delta>` row when the other curve has a matching x sample. Legend renders both series swatches plus two direction swatches ("A higher" / "B higher") when both series present and showRegions=true. 74 vitest cases (5 defaults + 3 getLineComparisonDefaultColor + 3 getLineComparisonFiniteValues + 3 buildLineComparisonXUnion + 2 buildLineComparisonYLookup + 5 interpolateLineComparisonY + 6 findLineComparisonCrossing crossing math + 17 computeLineComparisonLayout (empty, sized, color, monotonic 1-direction, crossing splits to 2, missing pair, stats counts, equal counts, bounds overrides + zero-range + swap, color overrides on regions, area math, tick step count) + 4 describeLineComparisonChart + 25 component render (paths, regions, dots, ARIA, tooltip + delta + no-delta + hidden, legend, grid, axes, x/y labels, formatValue/formatX, onPointClick/onRegionClick, animate, className, ref, data-attr stats, displayName, non-finite drop)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w493. Bump 1.11.529. |
| 11.512 | UI: chart-line-trend primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.530 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-trend.tsx` ships `<ChartLineTrend>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **a linear regression trend line overlay** per series. Each series's trend rule is the ordinary least-squares best fit `y = m*x + b` of its finite samples, drawn from the smallest finite x to the largest finite x with a dashed stroke (`6 4` default; per-series override via `trendDashArray`, chart-level fallback via `trendDashArray` prop). The legend optionally shows `(slope / R^2)` next to each series label so adopters see the trend at a glance. Distinct from `<ChartLineMulti>` (11.500), `<ChartLineSmooth>` (11.498), `<ChartLineDashed>` (11.499), `<ChartLineStep>` (11.497), `<ChartLineMarker>` (11.506) (raw lines without regression); `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510) and `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503) (constant horizontal references, not sloped per-series); `<ChartLineComparison>` (11.511) (compares two curves directly); `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502) (per-point bounds, not regression). API: `series: readonly ChartLineTrendSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, trendColor?, trendDashArray?, hideTrend?}`); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange` for controlled+uncontrolled visibility; `xMin/xMax/yMin/yMax` (swapped if inverted, expanded +/- 0.5 on zero range); `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `trendStrokeWidth` (1.5) / `dotRadius` (3) / `lineOpacity` (1) / `trendOpacity` (0.85) / `trendDashArray` ('6 4'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showTrend` / `showTrendStats` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart with linear trend') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatSlope(s)` / `formatR2(r)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})` / `onSeriesToggle({series, hidden})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_TREND_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/TREND_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/TREND_OPACITY/TREND_DASH/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineTrendDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0, fractional floored; `getLineTrendFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `getLineTrendXRange(points)` -- `{min, max}` or null when empty / all non-finite; `computeLineTrendRegression(points)` -- canonical OLS via mean-centered moments returns `{slope, intercept, r2, sampleCount, ok, meanX, meanY}`; `ok=false` when n<2 or `sxx=0` (all x equal -> slope=0, intercept=meanY); `r2=1` when all y equal AND no residual (SS_tot=0); r2 clamps to [0,1]; non-finite samples dropped before fit; `predictLineTrendY(x, regression)` -- evaluates `slope*x + intercept`, intercept fallback on non-finite x; `computeLineTrendLayout({series, hiddenSeries?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?, defaultTrendDashArray?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series layout `{id, label, index (stable original index), color, trendColor, trendDashArray, hideTrend, points, path, trendPath, trendStartX, trendStartY, trendEndX, trendEndY, regression, finiteCount, totalCount}`; `trendPath=''` when regression not ok; honors hidden filter / color overrides / hideTrend per series; degenerate canvas / empty series / all-hidden -> empty layout; `describeLineTrendChart(series, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with linear trend across N series (K points). A: slope <m>, R2 <r2>; B: slope <m>, R2 <r2>." (No data when missing / no fit). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-trend-aria-desc"` span; per-line-path + per-trend-path + per-dot `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; trend aria-label includes slope and R^2. data-section on every node (chart-line-trend / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -trend / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-trend / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-slope, data-series-intercept, data-series-r2, data-series-regression-ok, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-hovered. Tooltip surfaces the series label, x, y, and a `trend: <predicted> (+/- <residual> resid)` row when the regression is ok. Legend toggles series visibility (controlled + uncontrolled), shows trend stats per series when `showTrendStats=true`. 69 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLineTrendDefaultColor + 3 getLineTrendFinitePoints + 3 getLineTrendXRange + 8 computeLineTrendRegression (perfect linear, noisy, flat, n<2, vertical all-x-equal, drops non-finite, clamps r2, meanX/meanY) + 2 predictLineTrendY + 14 computeLineTrendLayout (empty, degenerate, all hidden, paths + regression, trend path spans series, omits trend when not ok, bounds override + zero-range + swap, hidden filter, color overrides + hideTrend, tick step) + 4 describeLineTrendChart + 30 component render (paths + trends, hide-trend flag, dots, ARIA, custom label/desc, tooltip + residual, hide on leave, hide entirely, onPointClick payload, legend with stats, hide stats, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onSeriesToggle + onHiddenSeriesChange, hide legend, grid + axes, axis labels, formatValue/formatX, formatSlope/formatR2, animate flag + class, ref, displayName, drop non-finite preserves totalCount)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w494. Bump 1.11.530. |
| 11.513 | UI: chart-line-moving-avg primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.531 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-moving-avg.tsx` ships `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **a simple moving average overlay** computed per series with a configurable window. Each series renders a raw line (dimmed to opacity 0.55 by default so the smoothed SMA reads as the emphasized signal) plus a thicker SMA rule whose path breaks at every index where the SMA is not defined. Three modes -- `trailing` (canonical `out[i] = mean(values[i-W+1..i])` for `i >= W-1`, null otherwise), `centered` (`out[i] = mean(values[i-half..i+(W-1-half)])` where `half=floor((W-1)/2)`, valid only when both ends fit), `edge` (same as trailing but the leading positions fill the available partial window) -- let adopters trade off the "undefined edges" of trailing SMA against a partial-window fill or a centered alignment. Per-series `window`, `mode`, `maColor`, `maDashArray`, and `hideMa` overrides always beat chart-level defaults. Distinct from `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512; one global linear regression rule per series -- a straight line vs the SMA's local smoothing), `<ChartLineSmooth>` (11.498; visual Catmull-Rom / monotone curve interpolation -- no averaging), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510; flat horizontal reference), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503; horizontal thresholds + zones), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502; per-point bounds), and the raw line primitives (`<ChartLineMulti>` 11.500, `<ChartLineDashed>` 11.499, `<ChartLineMarker>` 11.506) which have no derived overlay. API: `series: readonly ChartLineMovingAvgSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, maColor?, maDashArray?, window?, mode?, hideMa?}`); chart-level `window` (default 5) / `mode` (default 'trailing'); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `maStrokeWidth` (2) / `dotRadius` (3); `lineOpacity` (0.55) / `maOpacity` (1) / `maDashArray` (''); `defaultMaColor` / `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showMa` / `showMaInTooltip` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart with simple moving average') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})` / `onSeriesToggle({series, hidden})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_MOVING_AVG_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/MA_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/MA_OPACITY/MA_DASH/WINDOW/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineMovingAvgDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineMovingAvgFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `normaliseLineMovingAvgWindow(window)` -- positive integer >= 1 (non-finite / non-numeric / <1 / string -> 1); `computeSimpleMovingAverage(values, window, mode?)` -- canonical SMA helper; returns same-length `(number | null)[]`; non-finite entries dropped from the moving sum; null only when the window cannot be filled (per mode) or every sample is non-finite; non-array -> []; empty -> []; window > length under trailing/centered -> all null; window<=0/non-finite -> 1 (passthrough); `buildLineMovingAvgPath(points)` -- builds path emitting one contiguous `M ... L ...` segment per run of consecutive non-null values (separated by spaces); single-point runs emit only the `M` so they still paint with stroke-linecap=round; non-finite px/py break the run; `computeLineMovingAvgLayout({series, hiddenSeries?, defaultWindow?, defaultMode?, defaultMaColor?, defaultMaDashArray?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original index), color, maColor, maDashArray, window, mode, hideMa, points, path, maPath, maValidCount, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, y, px, py, ma, maPy}`; y bounds expanded to include MA samples; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; `describeLineMovingAvgChart(series, hidden?, defaultWindow?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with simple moving average across N series (K points). A: window <W>; B: window <W>." (No data when missing). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-moving-avg-aria-desc"` span; raw line + SMA line + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; SMA aria-label includes window + valid-sample count. data-section on every node (chart-line-moving-avg / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -ma / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-ma / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-window, data-mode, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-ma-color, data-series-window, data-series-mode, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-ma-valid-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-ma, data-hovered. Tooltip surfaces series label, x, y, and an `SMA(W):` row with the moving-average value at that index (or `n/a` when the window is not filled). Legend toggles series visibility (controlled + uncontrolled) and shows the SMA window per series. 66 vitest cases (2 defaults + 2 getLineMovingAvgDefaultColor + 2 getLineMovingAvgFinitePoints + 3 normaliseLineMovingAvgWindow + 9 computeSimpleMovingAverage trailing (leading nulls, w=1 passthrough, w>n, non-array, empty, drops non-finite, all-non-finite -> null, invalid window normalises) + 2 centered (odd center + w=5 only middle) + 1 edge (partial leading windows) + 4 buildLineMovingAvgPath (empty, single run, break on null, skip non-finite) + 13 computeLineMovingAvgLayout (empty + degenerate, raw + MA paths, bounds expand to include MA, per-series window / mode / hideMa / hidden filter / all-hidden, bounds overrides, tick step, color/maColor overrides + maColor fallback) + 4 describeLineMovingAvgChart + 25 component (empty, paths + MA paths, showMa toggle, hideMa, dots, ARIA, custom label/desc, tooltip + n/a + hide row, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick, legend SMA window, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onSeriesToggle + onHiddenSeriesChange, grid + axes, axis labels, formatValue/formatX, animate flag + class, data-window + data-mode on root, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w495. Bump 1.11.531. |
| 11.514 | UI: chart-line-percentile primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.532 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-percentile.tsx` ships `<ChartLinePercentile>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart showing **percentile bands over time** (default p25/p50/p75). Each x-bucket carries multiple raw samples (`{x, values: number[]}`); at each x the chart computes lower (default p25), mid (default p50), and upper (default p75) percentiles using the R type-7 linear-interpolation formula and renders a shaded band between lower and upper with a solid median line through the middle. Optional min/max dashed whiskers when `showWhiskers=true`. Distinct from `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502; per-point upper/lower bounds supplied EXTERNALLY as fields on the series; percentile derives them from a sample group at each x), `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` (11.513; trailing/centered/edge SMA on a single y per x; percentile assumes MULTIPLE samples at each x), `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512; global linear regression line), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510; flat horizontal reference), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503; horizontal thresholds + zones), and `<ChartLineComparison>` (11.511; two-curve comparison). The canonical "distribution-over-time" view for latency p25/p50/p75 dashboards, A/B cohort spread, etc. API: `series: readonly ChartLinePercentileSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x, values: readonly number[]}[], color?, bandColor?}`); `percentiles?: [lower, mid, upper]` (default [25, 50, 75]; out-of-range clamps, non-finite slots default, sorts ascending); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (2) / `whiskerStrokeWidth` (1) / `dotRadius` (3); `bandOpacity` (0.18) / `whiskerOpacity` (0.6) / `whiskerDashArray` ('4 3'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showBand` (true) / `showWhiskers` (false) / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `animate` (all true except whiskers); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart with percentile band') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onBucketClick({series, bucket})` / `onSeriesToggle({series, hidden})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_PERCENTILE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/WHISKER_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/BAND_OPACITY/WHISKER_OPACITY/WHISKER_DASH/PERCENTILES/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLinePercentileDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `sortFiniteLinePercentileValues(values)` -- ascending finite-only; non-array / empty -> []; `computePercentileFromSorted(sorted, p)` -- canonical R-type-7 percentile (`rank = (p/100)*(n-1)`, linear interpolation between order statistics; p clamps to [0, 100]; empty -> NaN; n=1 returns lone value); `computeLinePercentile(values, p)` -- same but sorts first; `normaliseLinePercentiles([l, m, u])` -- clamps to [0, 100], defaults non-finite slots, sorts ascending; `buildLinePercentileBucket(sample, percentiles, index)` -- returns `{index, x, count, min, max, lower, mid, upper}` or null when x non-finite or every value non-finite; `computeLinePercentileLayout({series, percentiles?, hiddenSeries?, showWhiskers?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalBuckets, visibleSeriesCount, percentiles}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, bandColor, buckets (sorted ascending by x), midPath, bandPath (closed `M ... L ... Z` polygon walking upper forward then lower backward), minPath, maxPath, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-bucket layout `{...bucket, px, pyMin, pyMax, pyLower, pyMid, pyUpper}`; y range tightens to lower/upper envelope when whiskers off and spans min/max when whiskers on; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; honors hidden filter, custom percentiles, color overrides, dropped buckets; `describeLinePercentileChart(series, percentiles?, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with percentile band p<L>-p<U> (median p<M>) across N series (K buckets). A: p<M> ranges <v> to <v> across <k> buckets; ..." (No data when missing). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-percentile-aria-desc"` span; per-band path `role="graphics-symbol"`; per-whisker `role="graphics-symbol"`; per-mid path + per-dot `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node (chart-line-percentile / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -series / -series-group / -band / -whisker / -mid / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-mid / -tooltip-lower / -tooltip-upper / -tooltip-range / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-buckets, data-percentile-lower, data-percentile-mid, data-percentile-upper, data-show-whiskers, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-band-color, data-series-bucket-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-bucket-index, data-x, data-mid, data-lower, data-upper, data-min, data-max, data-count, data-hovered. Tooltip surfaces the series label, `x: <fmtX> (n=<count>)`, mid percentile in bold, lower + upper percentile rows, and (when whiskers on) a min/max range row. Legend toggles series visibility (controlled + uncontrolled) and shows the percentile triplet "(p<L>-p<M>-p<U>)" per series. 69 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLinePercentileDefaultColor + 4 sortFiniteLinePercentileValues + 9 computePercentileFromSorted (p0, p100, p50 odd, p50 even linear interpolation, empty -> NaN, lone value passthrough, clamp out-of-range, p25 / p75 of [1..5] match R type 7) + 3 computeLinePercentile + 4 normaliseLinePercentiles + 4 buildLinePercentileBucket + 12 computeLinePercentileLayout (empty, degenerate canvas, all hidden, mid + band paths, y range with whiskers vs tight without, bounds overrides, hidden filter, drops bad buckets, sorts by x, custom percentiles, tick step) + 4 describeLinePercentileChart + 24 component render (empty, mid + band per series, hide band, min/max whiskers when on, hide whiskers default, dots, hide dots, ARIA, custom percentiles via prop, tooltip rows + range row, hide tooltip on leave / via prop, onBucketClick payload, legend percentile triplet, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onSeriesToggle + onHiddenSeriesChange, grid + axes toggles, formatValue/formatX in tick labels, animate flag + class, ref, displayName, data-show-whiskers attr)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w496. Bump 1.11.532. |
| 11.515 | UI: chart-line-event primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.533 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-event.tsx` ships `<ChartLineEvent>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **event markers** on a dedicated horizontal track above the plot. Six canonical event kinds (release / incident / maintenance / milestone / info / custom) each ship default colour + shape (circle / triangle / square / star / diamond / cross). Faint dashed vertical rules drop from each icon through the plot to anchor the event in the time series. Each icon is independently focusable and clickable with tooltip showing title + kind + optional description + optional timestamp label. Distinct from `<ChartLineAnnotated>` (11.509; renders inline vertical reference + text labels without the kind-driven icon set or dedicated event track) -- chart-line-event introduces a kind taxonomy, a dedicated icon track above the plot, kind-driven default colours and shapes, an out-of-range guard (`inRange=false` events are skipped), a kind legend that toggles all events of a kind, and per-event interaction (`onEventClick`). API: `series: readonly ChartLineEventSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?}`); `events?: readonly ChartLineEventEvent[]` (`{id, x, title, description?, kind?, color?, icon?, timestampLabel?}`); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange` (series visibility); `hiddenKinds` / `defaultHiddenKinds` / `onHiddenKindsChange` (kind visibility); `iconRadius` (7) / `trackHeight` (22) / `trackGap` (4) / `trackBgColor` ('#f8fafc') / `ruleDashArray` ('3 3') / `ruleOpacity` (0.4); `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3) / `lineOpacity` (1); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showKindLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showEventTrack` / `showEventRule` / `showTrackBg` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart with event markers') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})` / `onEventClick({event})` / `onKindToggle({kind, hidden})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_EVENT_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TRACK_HEIGHT/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/RULE_OPACITY/RULE_DASH/ICON_RADIUS/TRACK_GAP/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/TRACK_BG/PALETTE/KINDS`; `ALL_CHART_LINE_EVENT_KINDS` (six-kind tuple); `getLineEventDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineEventKindDef(kind)` -- returns `{color, icon, label}` for known kinds; falls back to `custom` def for unknown / missing / null; `getLineEventFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `getLineEventValidEvents(events)` -- drops events with non-finite x, missing id, or missing title; preserves input order; non-array -> []; `buildLineEventIconPath(icon, cx, cy, r)` -- canonical SVG `d` string generator for all six icons; circle uses two half-arcs; cross emits two sub-paths via `M..L..M..L` (no Z); star emits 10 vertices alternating outer radius and inner (0.4x) radius; non-finite cx/cy/r or `r<=0` returns ''; `computeLineEventLayout({series, events?, hiddenSeries?, hiddenKinds?, iconRadius?, trackHeight?, trackGap?, showEventTrack?, showEventRule?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, events, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, trackTop, trackBottom, trackCenterY, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount, visibleEventCount}`; plot area shifts down by `trackHeight + trackGap` when `showEventTrack=true`; events expand x range so rules land inside plot; out-of-range events recorded with `inRange=false` and skipped from rendering; per-event color/icon overrides win; unknown kind falls back to custom def; honors hiddenSeries / hiddenKinds filters; `describeLineEventChart(series, events?, hiddenSeries?, hiddenKinds?)` -- ARIA summary; "Line chart with event markers across N series (K points) and M events: <title> (<kind>), ... and Q more." (No data when empty / all hidden; "No events." branch when events empty after filters). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-event-aria-desc"` span; line paths + dots + event icons `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; event icon aria-label `"Event <title> (<kind>) at x <x>"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-event / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -track-bg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -rules / -rule / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -track / -icon / -tooltip / -tooltip-title / -tooltip-kind / -tooltip-description / -point-tooltip / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -kind-legend / -kind-legend-item / -kind-legend-button / -kind-legend-swatch / -kind-legend-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-event-count, data-visible-event-count, data-total-points, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-hovered; event icon mirrors data-event-id, data-event-kind, data-event-icon, data-event-color, data-event-x, data-event-hovered; event rule mirrors data-event-id, data-event-kind. Tooltip on icon hover/focus shows title (bold), kind label + `x` (with optional `(timestampLabel)` suffix), and description row when present. Tooltip on dot hover shows series label + x + y (event tooltip takes precedence when both are hovered). Kind legend lists only kinds present in the data; toggling hides all events of that kind. 64 vitest cases (4 defaults + 2 getLineEventDefaultColor + 3 getLineEventKindDef + 2 getLineEventFinitePoints + 4 getLineEventValidEvents + 4 buildLineEventIconPath (non-finite, closed star/circle/triangle/square/diamond, cross 2 sub-paths, star 10 vertices) + 14 computeLineEventLayout (empty, degenerate, paths + events, icon path + rule, color/icon overrides, unknown kind, x bounds expanded, hidden series + hidden kinds, out-of-range inRange=false, track height toggle, bounds overrides, tick step) + 4 describeLineEventChart + 27 component render (empty, line paths, icons per event, rules per event, hide rule, hide track, track bg, hide track bg, dots, ARIA, event tooltip with title/kind/description, hide description, timestamp label, hide on leave, onEventClick + onPointClick, kind legend with only present kinds, uncontrolled + controlled kind toggle + onKindToggle + onHiddenKindsChange, omit kind legend when no events, series legend, hide series + kind legends, animate flag + class, ref, displayName, data-visible-event-count, skip out-of-range events)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w497. Bump 1.11.533. |
| 11.516 | UI: chart-line-band primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.534 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-band.tsx` ships `<ChartLineBand>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **horizontal reference bands** between two y-values, spanning the entire x range. Each band is a chart-wide rectangle anchored to `[yMin, yMax]` (not per-point) with a kind-driven default colour (safe `#16a34a` / warning `#f59e0b` / critical `#dc2626` / info `#0891b2` / neutral `#64748b` / custom `#94a3b8`) and optional dashed top + bottom borders. Multiple bands can stack or overlap (z-order by array index). Per-point band membership computed and surfaced via tooltip + `data-in-bands` attribute on every dot. The canonical "acceptable range" / "SLO target" / "tier zones" pattern for SRE / capacity-planning dashboards. Distinct from `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503; horizontal threshold LINES + zone shading above / below each threshold -- chart-line-band is band-first with the rectangle as the primary data and per-point membership), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510; adjustable horizontal baseline + above/below/equal classification -- band is a range, not a single line), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502; per-point upper/lower bounds around ONE series), `<ChartLinePercentile>` (11.514; percentile bands derived from sample groups at each x -- band is a constant), `<ChartLineEvent>` (11.515; vertical event markers on a top track -- band runs horizontally). API: `series: readonly ChartLineBandSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?}`); `bands?: readonly ChartLineBandSpec[]` (`{id, label, yMin, yMax, color?, kind?, opacity?, borderDashArray?, showBorder?, labelPosition?}`); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `hiddenBands` / `defaultHiddenBands` / `onHiddenBandsChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3) / `lineOpacity` (1) / `bandBorderOpacity` (0.7); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showBandLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showBandLabels` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart with reference band') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})` / `onBandClick({band})` / `onBandToggle({band, hidden})`. Label positions: `inside-top-left` (default), `inside-top-right`, `outside-right`, `outside-left`, `none`.
