Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_BAND_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/FILL_OPACITY/BORDER_OPACITY/BORDER_DASH/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE/KINDS`; `getLineBandDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineBandKindDef(kind)` -- returns `{color, label}`; falls back to `custom` for unknown / missing; `getLineBandFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `normaliseLineBandSpec(spec)` -- validates band spec; drops null, empty id, missing label, non-finite yMin or yMax; swaps yMin/yMax when inverted; defaults kind to 'custom', color to kind def, opacity to DEFAULT_FILL_OPACITY (clamped to [0,1]; non-finite -> default), showBorder to true, labelPosition to 'inside-top-left', borderDashArray to '4 3'; `isPointInLineBand(y, band)` -- inclusive `[yMin, yMax]` membership; non-finite y -> false; `getLineBandMembership(y, bands)` -- returns ids of bands containing y, in input order; non-finite y / non-array bands -> []; `computeLineBandLayout({series, bands?, hiddenSeries?, hiddenBands?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?, width, height, padding, tickCount?})` returns `{series, bands, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount, visibleBandCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, points, path, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, y, px, py, inBands}` (memberships against visible bands only); per-band `{originalIndex, spec, pyTop, pyBottom, pxLeft, pxRight, labelX, labelY, labelAnchor, inRange}`; y range expands to include band ranges; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; drops malformed bands silently; honors hidden filters; `describeLineBandChart(series, bands?, hiddenSeries?, hiddenBands?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with N series (K points) and M reference bands: Safe (safe) 0 to 100, ..., and Q more." (No data when empty; "No reference bands." branch). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-band-aria-desc"` span; band rect + line paths + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; band rect aria-label `"Band <label> (<kind>): <yMin> to <yMax>"`; dot aria-label includes in-band membership when non-empty. data-section on every node (chart-line-band / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -bands / -band / -rect / -border / -label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-bands / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -band-legend / -band-legend-item / -band-legend-button / -band-legend-swatch / -band-legend-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-band-count, data-visible-band-count, data-total-points, data-animate; bands mirror data-band-id, data-band-kind, data-band-color, data-band-y-min, data-band-y-max, data-band-hovered, data-band-in-range; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-in-bands (comma-separated), data-band-count, data-hovered. Tooltip surfaces series label + x + y + bands row (comma-joined labels of every containing band; `none` when outside all). Band legend toggles all events of a band (controlled + uncontrolled). 66 vitest cases (4 defaults + 2 getLineBandDefaultColor + 2 getLineBandKindDef + 2 getLineBandFinitePoints + 7 normaliseLineBandSpec (null / empty id / non-finite / swap inverted / default kind+color / overrides / opacity clamp + non-finite fallback / showBorder + labelPosition defaults) + 3 isPointInLineBand + 3 getLineBandMembership + 11 computeLineBandLayout (empty, degenerate, per-point inBands boundary inclusive, band layout + labels, expand y bounds, hiddenBands + hiddenSeries, drops malformed, label-position anchor mapping, bounds overrides, tick step) + 4 describeLineBandChart + 25 component render (empty, band rects per band, paths + dots, per-dot data-in-bands, band labels + hide + position none, ARIA, top + bottom borders + hide via spec, tooltip + bands row + none + hide on leave + hide via prop, onPointClick + onBandClick payloads, band legend, uncontrolled + controlled band toggle + onBandToggle + onHiddenBandsChange, omit band legend when no bands / showBandLegend false, series legend, hide series legend, animate flag + class, ref, displayName, data-visible-band-count)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w498. Bump 1.11.534. |
| 11.517 | UI: chart-line-min-max primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.535 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-min-max.tsx` ships `<ChartLineMinMax>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **min/max markers and connecting reference lines**. For each series the canonical min point (lowest y) and max point (highest y) are identified and rendered as triangle glyphs (downward triangle in red for min, upward triangle in green for max) at the actual data coordinates. Optional horizontal reference lines extend across the full x range at the min and max y-values; optional vertical drop-lines fall from each marker to the x-axis. The canonical "high/low water mark" visualisation for time-series monitoring -- "what was the peak / trough this week" / "how far above the baseline did we go". Distinct from `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503; external thresholds vs data-derived extrema), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510; single adjustable horizontal reference + classification vs two data-derived references per series), `<ChartLineBand>` (11.516; chart-wide rectangle between fixed y-values vs lines anchored at the actual extreme y values), `<ChartLinePercentile>` (11.514; percentile bands from sample groups at each x vs absolute min/max across the whole series), `<ChartLineMarker>` (11.506; configurable markers PER POINT vs only the two extremes). API: `series: readonly ChartLineMinMaxSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, minColor?, maxColor?}`); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3) / `markerRadius` (6); `lineOpacity` (1) / `refLineOpacity` (0.45) / `refLineDashArray` ('4 3') / `dropLineOpacity` (0.35) / `dropLineDashArray` ('2 3'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showMin` / `showMax` / `showRefLines` (all true by default) / `showDropLines` (FALSE by default) / `showMarkerLabels` (true by default) / `animate`; `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart with min/max markers') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})` / `onMarkerClick({series, marker})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_MIN_MAX_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/MARKER_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/REF_OPACITY/REF_DASH/DROP_OPACITY/DROP_DASH/MAX_COLOR/MIN_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineMinMaxDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineMinMaxFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `findLineMinMaxExtrema(points)` -- returns `{min: {index, x, y}, max: {index, x, y}}` or null when no finite samples; first occurrence wins on ties; indices are positions in the ORIGINAL array (so callers can map back to their own data structures, not in the filtered subset); `buildLineMinMaxMarkerPath(kind, cx, cy, r)` -- SVG `d` string for an upward triangle (max; apex above center) or downward triangle (min; apex below center) anchored at `(cx, cy)`; uses h=1.2r vertical + w=r horizontal proportions for visual emphasis; non-finite or `r<=0` returns ''; `computeLineMinMaxLayout({series, hiddenSeries?, showMin?, showMax?, markerRadius?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, minColor, maxColor, points, path, finiteCount, totalCount, minMarker, maxMarker}`; per-marker `{kind, seriesId, index, x, y, px, py, color, iconPath, refY1, refY2, dropX1, dropY1, dropX2, dropY2, labelX, labelY}` with dropY2 landing on the x-axis; per-point `{index, x, y, px, py, isMin, isMax}`; honors hidden filter / showMin / showMax / bounds overrides; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; null markers when series has no finite samples; `describeLineMinMaxChart(series, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with min and max markers across N series (K points). A: min <v> at x=<x>, max <v> at x=<x>; B: ..." (No data when missing / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-min-max-aria-desc"` span; line paths + dots + markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; marker aria-label `"<series>: <kind> <value> at x=<x>"`; dot aria-label includes ", min" or ", max" suffix when canonical. data-section on every node (chart-line-min-max / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -ref-lines / -ref-line / -drop-lines / -drop-line / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -markers / -marker / -marker-label / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-kind / -tooltip-x / -point-tooltip / -point-tooltip-tag / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-show-min, data-show-max, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-min-y, data-series-max-y, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-is-min, data-is-max, data-hovered; markers mirror data-series-id, data-extremum-kind ('min'|'max'), data-extremum-index, data-extremum-x, data-extremum-y, data-marker-color, data-hovered; ref-lines mirror data-series-id, data-extremum-kind, data-y-value. Marker tooltip surfaces the series label + kind+value coloured by marker colour + `at x = <fmtX>`. Point tooltip surfaces the series label + x + y + optional `min` / `max` tag when canonical. Marker tooltip takes precedence over point tooltip when both are hovered. Legend shows the (min .. max) range per series. 65 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLineMinMaxDefaultColor + 2 getLineMinMaxFinitePoints + 5 findLineMinMaxExtrema (null empty, null non-finite, finds min+max, first-occurrence ties, ORIGINAL indices, single sample) + 3 buildLineMinMaxMarkerPath (empty cases, max apex above, min apex below) + 13 computeLineMinMaxLayout (empty, degenerate, all hidden, markers + paths, showMin/showMax toggle, isMin/isMax flags, color overrides, hidden filter, bounds, tick step, drop endpoints on x-axis, null markers on empty series) + 5 describeLineMinMaxChart + 32 component render (empty, paths per series, min + max markers per series, hide min, hide max, reference lines + hide, drop lines off by default + on, marker labels + hide, data-is-min/max on canonical dots, dots, hide dots, ARIA, marker tooltip kind+value, point tooltip + min/max tag, hide tooltip on leave + via prop, onMarkerClick + onPointClick payloads, legend stats, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onHiddenSeriesChange, hide legend, animate flag + class, data-show-min/max attrs, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w499. Bump 1.11.535. |
| 11.518 | UI: chart-line-target primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.536 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-target.tsx` ships `<ChartLineTarget>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart with **a target reference line + over/under shading** between the data and the target. Each per-segment gap is painted with `overColor` (default green `#16a34a`) when the line is above target and `underColor` (default red `#dc2626`) when below; segments that straddle the target are split exactly at the crossing via the absolute-delta proportion `x* = x1 + (x2-x1) * |y1-target|/(|y1-target|+|y2-target|)`. Per-series goal-tracking stats (over count, under count, at count, peak over gap, peak under gap, percent over, total area) drive a legend progress badge ("3/6 over, 50%") and the auto-generated ARIA description. The canonical "did we beat the goal" / "SLO compliance" / "sales target progress" visualisation. Distinct from `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503; zone shading ABOVE/BELOW the threshold across the WHOLE CHART -- chart-line-target shades the GAP between line and target, not absolute regions), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510; per-point above/below/equal classification but NO AREA SHADING -- chart-line-target adds signed area + goal stats), `<ChartLineBand>` (11.516; chart-wide rectangle between two fixed y-values, no shading to data -- chart-line-target is a single goal line), `<ChartLineComparison>` (11.511; difference shading between TWO CURVES -- chart-line-target uses one curve + flat target), and `<ChartLineMinMax>` (11.517; data-derived extremes -- chart-line-target is user-supplied goal). API: `series: readonly ChartLineTargetSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, overColor?, underColor?}`); `target?` (default 0) / `epsilon?` (default 0; widens "at" equality band) / `targetLabel?` (default 'Target'); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `targetStrokeWidth` (2) / `dotRadius` (3); `lineOpacity` (1) / `fillOpacity` (0.18) / `targetDashArray` ('6 4'); `overColor` ('#16a34a') / `underColor` ('#dc2626') / `targetColor` ('#0f172a') / `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showOverUnderShading` / `showTargetLine` / `showTargetLabel` / `showProgress` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart vs target') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatDelta(n)` (sign-aware) / `formatPercent(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})` / `onRegionClick({series, region})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_TARGET_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/TARGET_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/FILL_OPACITY/TARGET_DASH/OVER_COLOR/UNDER_COLOR/TARGET_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/VALUE/EPSILON/PALETTE`; `getLineTargetDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineTargetFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `classifyLineTargetPoint(y, target, epsilon?)` -- returns `{delta, direction: 'over'|'under'|'at'}` where `delta=y-target`; non-finite y -> `{0, 'at'}`; non-finite target -> 0 fallback; epsilon widens "at" band; `findLineTargetCrossing(x1, y1, x2, y2, target)` -- crossing x via absolute-delta proportion or null on same-side / endpoint-on-target / x1==x2 / non-finite; `computeLineTargetStats(points, target, epsilon?)` -- returns `{overCount, underCount, atCount, maxOverGap, maxUnderGap, totalArea, finiteCount, percentOver, percentUnder, percentAt}`; drops non-finite silently; totalArea = sum((|delta_i|+|delta_{i+1}|)/2 * |dx|); `computeLineTargetLayout({series, target?, epsilon?, hiddenSeries?, showOverUnderShading?, overColor?, underColor?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, target, targetY, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, overColor, underColor, points, path, regions, stats, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, y, px, py, delta, direction}`; regions are closed `M ... L ... L ... L ... Z` polygons from segment endpoints down to the target line; y range expanded to include target; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; non-finite target falls back to 0; honors hidden filter / showOverUnderShading / bounds overrides; `describeLineTargetChart(series, target, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart vs target T across N series (K points). A: 3/6 over (50%), peak over 30, peak under 30; ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-target-aria-desc"` span; target line `role="graphics-symbol"` with aria-label "<targetLabel>: <value>"; line paths + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; dot aria-label includes direction + delta. data-section on every node (chart-line-target / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -regions / -region / -target / -target-line / -target-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-delta / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-progress); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-target, data-target-y, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-over-count, data-series-under-count, data-series-at-count, data-series-max-over-gap, data-series-max-under-gap, data-series-percent-over, data-series-total-area, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-direction, data-delta, data-hovered; regions mirror data-series-id, data-region-index, data-region-is-over, data-region-start-x, data-region-end-x, data-region-fill-color, data-region-area. Tooltip surfaces series label + x + y + a coloured "over|under|at <targetLabel.toLowerCase()>: +/-<delta>" row. Legend shows "(<overCount>/<finiteCount> over, <percent>%)" per series. 71 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLineTargetDefaultColor + 2 getLineTargetFinitePoints + 6 classifyLineTargetPoint (over/under/at, epsilon band, non-finite y, non-finite target) + 6 findLineTargetCrossing (midpoint, same-side null, endpoint-on-target null, degenerate null, non-finite null, biased crossing) + 7 computeLineTargetStats (empty, over/under counts, max gaps, percent, epsilon, drops non-finite, totalArea trapezoid) + 15 computeLineTargetLayout (empty, degenerate, paths + stats, y expansion, monotonic 1-direction, crossing split, hide shading, color overrides, hidden filter, targetY recorded, NaN target -> 0, bounds, tick step, per-point direction) + 5 describeLineTargetChart + 25 component render (empty, paths, regions, hide shading, target line + label + hide each, custom label, per-direction dot fill + data-direction, dots, hide dots, ARIA, tooltip direction + delta, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick + onRegionClick payloads, legend progress + hide, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onHiddenSeriesChange, hide legend, data-series-* stats attrs, animate flag + class, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w500. Bump 1.11.536. |
| 11.519 | UI: chart-line-forecast primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.537 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-forecast.tsx` ships `<ChartLineForecast>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **splits each series into a historical solid line and a forecast dashed extension** at a configurable `forecastFrom` cutoff (chart-level + per-series override). A vertical dashed reference line marks the cutoff x with a "Forecast" label. Optional `yLower` / `yUpper` bounds on forecast samples drive a translucent confidence-band polygon painted under the dashed extension. When the cutoff lands strictly inside a segment, a synthetic JOIN point at the interpolated `(cutoff, y)` is added as the LAST point of historical and the FIRST point of forecast so the two paths render seamlessly. The canonical "observed metric + predicted metric" view for capacity planning, financial projections, traffic forecasting. Distinct from `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502; per-point band spans the ENTIRE series -- chart-line-forecast paints the band ONLY on the forecast half), `<ChartLineDashed>` (11.499; per-segment dash styling -- chart-line-forecast is a strict before/after split with a single seam point), `<ChartLineComparison>` (11.511; two-curve comparison -- chart-line-forecast splits one curve into two phases), `<ChartLineAnnotated>` (11.509; vertical annotation rules with text labels -- chart-line-forecast adds a path styling split at the rule, not just an annotation), and all the horizontal-reference primitives (`<ChartLineThreshold>` 11.503 / `<ChartLineBaseline>` 11.510 / `<ChartLineBand>` 11.516 / `<ChartLineTarget>` 11.518) which are vertical references vs a horizontal time-axis split. API: `series: readonly ChartLineForecastSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x, y, yLower?, yUpper?}[], color?, forecastFrom?, forecastDashArray?}`); chart-level `forecastFrom?` / `forecastLabel?` (default 'Forecast'); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3); `lineOpacity` (1) / `forecastOpacity` (0.85) / `bandOpacity` (0.18); `forecastDashArray` ('6 4') / `cutoffDashArray` ('4 4') / `cutoffColor` ('#0f172a') / `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showBand` / `showCutoff` / `showCutoffLabel` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Line chart with forecast extension') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_FORECAST_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/FORECAST_OPACITY/BAND_OPACITY/DASH/CUTOFF_DASH/CUTOFF_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineForecastDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineForecastFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `isForecastPoint(point, cutoff)` -- true when `x >= cutoff` (cutoff exclusive on the left -- points with `x >= cutoff` are forecast); non-finite cutoff or point -> false; `splitLineForecastPoints(points, cutoff)` -- splits x-sorted finite series into `{historical: ChartLineForecastSplitPoint[], forecast: ChartLineForecastSplitPoint[], join: ChartLineForecastSplitPoint | null}`; each split point carries `{x, y, yLower?, yUpper?, originalIndex: number | null, isJoin: boolean}`; when the cutoff lands strictly inside a segment (`a.x < cutoff < b.x`), synthesises a join point at `(cutoff, a.y + (b.y - a.y) * t)` where `t = (cutoff - a.x) / (b.x - a.x)`, also interpolates yLower / yUpper when BOTH endpoints carry bounds; the join is the LAST point of historical AND the FIRST point of forecast (same reference -- the two arrays share it); cutoff exactly on a sample x -> that sample begins forecast, no synthetic join; non-finite cutoff -> everything historical, join null; non-array input -> all empty; drops non-finite samples silently before splitting; `buildLineForecastPath(points)` -- standard `M ... L ...` builder; empty -> ''; single point -> M only; skips non-finite px / py; `buildLineForecastBandPath(points)` -- closed polygon walking upper then lower; <2 paired bounds -> ''; skips points where either bound is missing while remaining closed; `computeLineForecastLayout({series, forecastFrom?, hiddenSeries?, showBand?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, defaultForecastFromX, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, forecastDashArray, points, historicalPath, forecastPath, bandPath, forecastFrom, forecastFromX, historicalCount (excludes synthetic join), forecastCount (excludes synthetic join), finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, y, px, py, phase: 'historical' | 'forecast'}`; x bounds expanded to include cutoff; y bounds include yLower/yUpper; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; honors hidden filter / showBand / bounds overrides; per-series forecastFrom always wins over chart-level; `describeLineForecastChart(series, forecastFrom?, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Line chart with forecast extension across N series (H historical, F forecast). A: H historical, F forecast (cutoff x=X); ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-forecast-aria-desc"` span; historical path + forecast path + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; band + cutoff line `role="graphics-symbol"`; dot aria-label includes phase. data-section on every node (chart-line-forecast / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -bands / -band / -cutoff / -cutoff-line / -cutoff-label / -series / -series-group / -historical / -forecast / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-phase / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-forecast-from, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-historical-count, data-series-forecast-count, data-series-forecast-from, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-phase, data-hovered. Tooltip surfaces series label + x + y + a `phase:` row. Legend shows "(<historicalCount> hist / <forecastCount> fcst)" per series. Forecast-half dots render with white fill + colored stroke to visually mark them as projections (vs solid-filled historical dots). 66 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLineForecastDefaultColor + 2 getLineForecastFinitePoints + 4 isForecastPoint + 8 splitLineForecastPoints (empty, non-finite cutoff -> all historical, inside-segment synthetic join with y + yLower/yUpper interpolation, exact-sample cutoff no join, all-historical after-last, all-forecast at/before-first, drops non-finite) + 4 buildLineForecastPath + 3 buildLineForecastBandPath + 12 computeLineForecastLayout (empty, degenerate, paths, band, hide band, per-series forecastFrom, hidden filter, x bounds include cutoff, defaultForecastFromX recorded / null, per-point phase, bounds overrides, tick step) + 4 describeLineForecastChart + 24 component render (empty, historical + forecast paths, forecast dasharray attr, band + hide, cutoff line + label + hide each, custom forecastLabel, dots + data-phase, hide dots, ARIA, tooltip with phase row, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick payload, legend stats, uncontrolled + controlled visibility, series data attrs, animate flag + class, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w501. Bump 1.11.537. |
| 11.520 | UI: chart-line-cumulative primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.538 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-cumulative.tsx` ships `<ChartLineCumulative>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **plots the running cumulative sum** of per-period increments. Each `{x, value}` sample is an increment; the chart computes `cumulative_i = baseline + sum(value_0 .. value_i)` and renders that as the line. Optional faint increment bars below the line show the per-period delta with a signed fill (positive grows downward toward baseline, negative grows upward); optional horizontal target line + crossing detection drives a "progress to target" % shown in the legend. The canonical "year-to-date" / "running total" / "progress to goal" visualisation for sales pipelines, fundraisers, build artefact size, cumulative downloads, capacity tracking. Distinct from `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` (11.513; windowed average -- DOES NOT accumulate), `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512; regression line -- not a running sum), `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505; stacks SERIES, not a running sum INSIDE one series), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510) / `<ChartLineTarget>` (11.518) (classification or shading against a reference -- cumulative is a TRANSFORM of the data, not a comparison), and `<ChartLineForecast>` (11.519; historical/forecast split on the time axis -- different concern). API: `series: readonly ChartLineCumulativeSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x, value}[], color?, baseline?}`); `target?` / `targetLabel?` (default 'Target'); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (2) / `incrementWidth` (6) / `dotRadius` (3); `lineOpacity` (1) / `incrementOpacity` (0.55); `targetDashArray` ('6 4') / `targetColor` ('#0f172a') / `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showIncrements` / `showBaseline` / `showTarget` / `showTargetLabel` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Running cumulative line chart') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatPercent(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_CUMULATIVE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/INCREMENT_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/INCREMENT_OPACITY/TARGET_DASH/TARGET_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/BASELINE/PALETTE`; `getLineCumulativeDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineCumulativeFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `computeRunningCumulative(values, baseline?)` -- same-length array of running sums; non-finite values treated as 0 (do NOT reset the sum); non-array -> []; non-finite baseline falls back to 0; `buildLineCumulativeRunningPoints(points, baseline?)` -- sorts finite samples by x ascending, returns `{index (original), x, value, cumulative}` per sample; non-array -> []; `computeLineCumulativeStats(running, baseline, target?)` -- returns `{finiteCount, totalValue, total, maxIncrement, minIncrement, baseline, reachedTarget, targetCrossingX, targetCrossingIndex, percentToTarget}`; crossings strictly inside a segment use linear interpolation in x; first-sample-exceeds case returns crossing at that sample's x; never-reached returns null crossings; percent clamped to [0, 1]; `computeLineCumulativeLayout({series, target?, hiddenSeries?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, baselineY, targetY, target, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, baseline, points, path, stats, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, value, cumulative, px, py, incrementY, incrementHeight}` (increment rect sits between cumulative and baseline, signed by value); y bounds expanded to include target; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; honors hidden filter / bounds overrides; per-series baseline always wins; `describeLineCumulativeChart(series, target?, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Running cumulative chart across N series (K points). A: cumulative T from baseline B, reached target G; ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-cumulative-aria-desc"` span; line paths + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; target line `role="graphics-symbol"`; dot aria-label includes value + cumulative. data-section on every node (chart-line-cumulative / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -increments / -increment / -baseline / -target / -target-line / -target-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-cumulative / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-target, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-total, data-series-baseline, data-series-percent-to-target, data-series-reached-target, data-series-target-crossing-x, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-value, data-cumulative, data-hovered; increments mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-value, data-increment-sign ('positive'|'negative'). Tooltip surfaces series label + x + `value: +/-<v>` (signed) + `cumulative: <v>` (bold). Legend shows "(total <total>, <percent>% [when target supplied])" per series. 65 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLineCumulativeDefaultColor + 2 getLineCumulativeFinitePoints + 5 computeRunningCumulative (baseline 0 + nonzero, non-finite treated as 0, non-array, non-finite baseline) + 4 buildLineCumulativeRunningPoints (sort + original indices, drops non-finite, empty/non-array, baseline) + 7 computeLineCumulativeStats (empty, totals + max/min, baseline preserved, target crossing index, linearly interpolated crossing within segment, first-sample-exceeds, never-reached, percent clamped) + 11 computeLineCumulativeLayout (empty, degenerate, paths + stats, y expansion, hidden, baseline/target/targetY recorded, negative increments, bounds overrides, tick step, increment rect height non-negative, target null when missing) + 4 describeLineCumulativeChart + 27 component render (empty, paths, increment rects + hide, data-increment-sign, dots + hide, target line + label + hide each + custom label, baseline + hide, ARIA, tooltip value + cumulative, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick, data-series-* stats attrs, legend total + percent, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onHiddenSeriesChange, hide legend, animate flag + class, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w502. Bump 1.11.538. |
| 11.521 | UI: chart-line-rate primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.539 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-rate.tsx` ships `<ChartLineRate>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **plots the per-interval rate of change** (the discrete first derivative) of an input series. Between each consecutive pair of finite samples sorted by x, the chart emits a rate sample `rate = dy / dx` anchored at `'right'` (default), `'left'`, or `'midpoint'` mode. The result is rendered as a line with a horizontal zero-rate baseline; sign-shaded regions paint the area between the rate line and zero (green for positive growth, red for negative). Segments that cross zero are split exactly at the crossing via the absolute-value proportion `x* = x1 + (x2 - x1) * |rate1| / (|rate1| + |rate2|)`. The canonical "growth rate" / "velocity" / "first derivative" view for momentum dashboards, traffic acceleration, balance-sheet delta per period. Distinct from `<ChartLineCumulative>` (11.520; running SUM of increments -- rate is delta PER INTERVAL), `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` (11.513; windowed average of y -- rate is the slope between two y values), `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512; global linear regression -- rate is the LOCAL slope per segment), `<ChartLineComparison>` (11.511; difference between TWO curves -- rate is the difference WITHIN one curve over x), `<ChartLineMinMax>` (11.517; markers at data extremes -- rate highlights segments by sign), and `<ChartLineForecast>` (11.519; time-axis split -- rate is a transform). API: `series: readonly ChartLineRateSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, mode?}`); `mode?` chart-level default ('right'/'left'/'midpoint'); per-series mode override wins; `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3); `lineOpacity` (1) / `fillOpacity` (0.18); `zeroDashArray` ('4 3') / `zeroColor` ('#94a3b8'); `positiveColor` ('#16a34a') / `negativeColor` ('#dc2626'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showSignFill` / `showZeroLine` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Rate-of-change line chart') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatRate(n)` (sign-aware fallback); `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onSampleClick({series, sample})` / `onRegionClick({series, region})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_RATE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/FILL_OPACITY/ZERO_DASH/ZERO_COLOR/POSITIVE_COLOR/NEGATIVE_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/MODE/PALETTE`; `ALL_CHART_LINE_RATE_MODES`; `getLineRateDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineRateFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `computeRateOfChange(points, mode?)` -- canonical first-derivative helper; returns (n-1) samples for n finite inputs sorted by x ascending; drops `dx === 0` segments (consecutive equal x); output's `index` is position in OUTPUT array; `fromIndex` / `toIndex` reference ORIGINAL input array; non-array / <2 finite -> []; modes: 'right' anchors at to.x (default), 'left' anchors at from.x, 'midpoint' anchors at (from.x + to.x) / 2; `findLineRateZeroCrossing(x1, rate1, x2, rate2)` -- crossing x via absolute-value proportion; null on same-sign / endpoint-on-zero / degenerate / non-finite; `computeLineRateStats(samples)` -- returns `{finiteCount, maxRate, minRate, averageRate, positiveCount, negativeCount, zeroCount, totalAbsoluteArea}`; totalAbsoluteArea is the trapezoid sum of |rate| between successive samples; empty -> all zeros; `computeLineRateLayout({series, mode?, hiddenSeries?, showSignFill?, positiveColor?, negativeColor?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, zeroY, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalSamples, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, mode, samples, regions, path, stats, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-sample `{index, x, rate, px, py, isPositive, isNegative, fromIndex, toIndex}`; per-region `{index, startX, endX, startRate, endRate, isPositive, path (closed `M ... L ... L ... Z`), fillColor, area}`; y range ALWAYS expanded to include zero; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; honors hidden filter / showSignFill / bounds overrides; per-series mode override wins; `describeLineRateChart(series, mode?, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Rate-of-change line chart across N series (K segments). A: avg rate <r>, max <m>, min <m> (P positive, N negative); ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-rate-aria-desc"` span; rate path + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; zero baseline `role="graphics-symbol"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-rate / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -regions / -region / -zero-line / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-rate / -tooltip-mode / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-samples, data-mode, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-mode, data-series-sample-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-max-rate, data-series-min-rate, data-series-average-rate, data-series-positive-count, data-series-negative-count, data-series-zero-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-sample-index, data-x, data-rate, data-from-index, data-to-index, data-rate-sign ('positive'|'negative'|'zero'), data-hovered; regions mirror data-series-id, data-region-index, data-region-is-positive, data-region-start-x, data-region-end-x, data-region-fill-color, data-region-area. Tooltip surfaces series label + x + coloured `rate:` (positive or negative tinted) + `mode: <kind> (from #i to #j)` row indicating which original-array indices produced this rate sample. Legend stats show "(avg <r>, P+/N-)" per series. Per-dot fill is positive / negative / line color based on sign so adopters get visual cues for sign without hovering. 69 vitest cases (5 defaults + 2 getLineRateDefaultColor + 2 getLineRateFinitePoints + 10 computeRateOfChange (empty / <2, n-1 outputs, rate=dy/dx, anchor modes (right/left/midpoint), drops non-finite, drops dx=0 duplicate-x, sorts unsorted input, preserves ORIGINAL fromIndex/toIndex, non-array) + 6 findLineRateZeroCrossing (midpoint, same-sign null, endpoint-on-zero null, degenerate null, non-finite null, biased) + 4 computeLineRateStats (empty, aggregates, zero counts, totalAbsoluteArea non-negative) + 12 computeLineRateLayout (empty, degenerate, paths + samples + regions + stats, y expands to include zero, zeroY recorded, crossing splits region into 2, hide sign fill, hidden filter, per-series mode override, bounds overrides, tick step, per-sample isPositive/isNegative) + 4 describeLineRateChart + 25 component render (empty case, rate lines, dots (n-1), sign-fill regions + hide, zero baseline + hide, data-rate-sign on dots, hide dots, ARIA, tooltip rate + sign-coloured + mode + from/to indices, hide on leave + via prop, onSampleClick + onRegionClick payloads, legend stats avg + P+/N-, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onHiddenSeriesChange, data-series-* stats attrs, hide legend, animate flag + class, data-mode attr, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w503. Bump 1.11.539. |
| 11.522 | UI: chart-line-normalize primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.540 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-normalize.tsx` ships `<ChartLineNormalize>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **rebases each series to a common index basis** (default `100`) so series with different y scales become directly comparable. Each output `y` is `(raw_y / reference) * indexBase`. Three rebasing modes: `'first'` (default; rebase from first sample in x-sorted order), `'value'` (rebase at a specific x via linear interpolation), `'min'` (rebase so the minimum y maps to indexBase). Each layout point carries the raw `y`, the normalised value, and the signed percent change from baseline; the legend shows the final % change per series. The y range is auto-expanded to include `indexBase` so the baseline reference is always visible. The canonical "indexed performance" view used in finance / economics dashboards (compare stocks with different price levels, GDP growth across countries, etc). Distinct from `<ChartLineCumulative>` (11.520; running SUM transform -- normalize is a RESCALE), `<ChartLineRate>` (11.521; first-derivative transform), `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` (11.513; windowed average), `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512; regression -- normalize preserves full shape), `<ChartLineComparison>` (11.511; between two curves -- normalize rebases all series independently), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510), `<ChartLineTarget>` (11.518) (per-point classification or comparison vs rescale). API: `series: readonly ChartLineNormalizeSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, mode?, referenceX?}`); `indexBase?` (default 100) / `mode?` (default 'first') / `referenceX?` (chart-level for value-mode); `baselineLabel?` (default 'Base'); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3) / `lineOpacity` (1); `baselineDashArray` ('4 3') / `baselineColor` ('#64748b'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showBaseline` / `showBaselineLabel` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Normalised line chart') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatPercent(n)` (sign-aware fallback); `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_NORMALIZE_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/BASELINE_DASH/BASELINE_COLOR/INDEX_BASE/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/MODE/PALETTE`; `ALL_CHART_LINE_NORMALIZE_MODES`; `getLineNormalizeDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineNormalizeFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `resolveLineNormalizeYAtX(points, referenceX)` -- linearly interpolates y at a given x; clamps to endpoints when outside the range; non-array / non-finite x -> null; `findLineNormalizeReference(points, mode, referenceX?)` -- returns reference y or null when none derivable; 'first' uses x-sorted first; 'min' uses minimum finite y; 'value' uses interpolated y at referenceX (null when missing); `normalizeLineNormalizeSeries(points, mode, indexBase, referenceX?)` -- returns `{normalized: ChartLineNormalizePoint[], reference: number | null, ok: boolean}`; ok=false on null/zero reference (can't rebase); non-finite indexBase falls back to DEFAULT (100); drops non-finite samples; `computeLineNormalizeStats(points, reference, ok, indexBase)` -- returns `{reference, ok, finalNormalized, finalPercentChange, maxNormalized, minNormalized, maxPercentChange, minPercentChange, finiteCount}`; `computeLineNormalizeLayout({series, mode?, indexBase?, referenceX?, hiddenSeries?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, baselineY, indexBase, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, mode, points, path, stats, reference, referenceOk, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, y (raw), normalized, percentChange, px, py}`; y bounds always expanded to include indexBase; per-series mode + referenceX overrides win; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; ok=false series yield empty points; honors hidden filter / bounds overrides; `describeLineNormalizeChart(series, indexBase?, mode?, hidden?, formatValue?, referenceX?)` -- ARIA summary "Normalised line chart (index 100) across N series (K points). A: final 130 (+30%, ref 50); ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-normalize-aria-desc"` span; line paths + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; baseline `role="graphics-symbol"`; dot aria-label includes raw + normalised + percent. data-section on every node (chart-line-normalize / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -baseline / -baseline-line / -baseline-label / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-raw / -tooltip-normalized / -tooltip-percent / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-index-base, data-mode, data-reference-x, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-mode, data-series-reference, data-series-reference-ok, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-final-normalized, data-series-final-percent, data-series-max-normalized, data-series-min-normalized, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-normalized, data-percent, data-hovered. Tooltip surfaces series label + x + raw value + bold normalised index + coloured percent-from-base row (green positive, red negative). Legend shows final percent change per series. 64 vitest cases (5 defaults + 2 getLineNormalizeDefaultColor + 2 getLineNormalizeFinitePoints + 4 resolveLineNormalizeYAtX (null cases, endpoint clamp, exact match, interpolation) + 5 findLineNormalizeReference (null on empty, 'first', 'min', 'value' null without refX, 'value' interpolated) + 8 normalizeLineNormalizeSeries (null reference, zero reference, first-mode at indexBase, min-mode at indexBase, value-mode at referenceX, custom indexBase, drops non-finite, non-finite indexBase fallback, non-array) + 12 computeLineNormalizeLayout (empty, degenerate, normalised points + stats, y expansion to include indexBase, baselineY, hidden filter, per-series mode + referenceX overrides, ok=false yields empty points, bounds overrides, tick step, percentChange uses indexBase) + 3 describeLineNormalizeChart + 23 component render (empty, paths, dots with data-normalized + data-percent, baseline + label + hide each + custom label, ARIA, tooltip raw + normalised + percent, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick, data-series-* stats, legend final percent, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onHiddenSeriesChange, hide legend, data-mode + data-index-base root attrs, animate flag + class, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w504. Bump 1.11.540. |
| 11.523 | UI: chart-line-spark-bar primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.541 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-spark-bar.tsx` ships `<ChartLineSparkBar>` -- pure-SVG **hybrid sparkline** that pairs a compact line chart with an overlaid bar track for dense inline use. The canvas is split vertically into a top line track and a bottom bar track separated by `trackGap` (default 2px). The line uses one y dimension (`point.value`); the bars use a second y dimension (`point.bar`), each normalised independently to fit its own track. Sparkline-sized defaults (width 160, height 48, padding 4) so the component fits inline with text or inside table cells. The classic "stock close + volume" pattern: a thin line of price + a row of volume bars underneath, both squeezed into a few pixels of vertical real estate. Min/max colored dots + last-value dot + optional last-value pill make the form factor self-contained. Signed bars use green/red colors when `signedBars=true`. Distinct from the full-size chart primitives (`<ChartLineCumulative>` 11.520, `<ChartLineRate>` 11.521, `<ChartLineNormalize>` 11.522, etc) which have axes + legend + larger padding -- this is the SPARKLINE form factor optimised for shipping dozens at once in a dashboard or table; `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` (11.513), `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512), `<ChartLineAreaStacked>` (11.505) are single-dimension transforms/overlays; `<ChartLineMarker>` (11.506) puts markers on the line but doesn't pair a second track of bars; `<ChartLineForecast>` (11.519) splits time-axis but doesn't add bar overlay. API: `series: readonly ChartLineSparkBarSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x, value, bar}[], lineColor?, barColor?, positiveBarColor?, negativeBarColor?}`); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`valueMin`/`valueMax`/`barMin`/`barMax` (separate y bounds for line vs bars); `width` (160) / `height` (48) / `padding` (4) / `barRatio` (0.55; clamped to [0.05, 0.95]) / `barGap` (1) / `trackGap` (2); `strokeWidth` (1.5) / `dotRadius` (2); `lineOpacity` (1) / `barOpacity` (0.85); `minColor` ('#dc2626') / `maxColor` ('#16a34a') / `pillBg` ('#0f172a') / `pillFg` ('#f8fafc'); `signedBars` (false; when true, positive bars use positiveBarColor and negative bars use negativeBarColor); `showLine` / `showBars` / `showMinMaxDots` / `showLastValuePill` (false default; pill renders on the right edge) / `showLastValueDot` / `showTooltip` (all true by default except pill) / `showLegend` (FALSE by default for sparkline form factor) / `animate`; `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Sparkline with bar overlay') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatBar(n)`; `onPointClick({series, point})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_SPARK_BAR_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/BAR_RATIO/BAR_GAP/TRACK_GAP/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/BAR_OPACITY/LINE_COLOR/BAR_COLOR/POSITIVE_COLOR/NEGATIVE_COLOR/MIN_COLOR/MAX_COLOR/PILL_BG/PILL_FG/PALETTE`; `getLineSparkBarDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineSparkBarFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter requiring ALL THREE fields (x, value, bar) finite; `computeLineSparkBarBounds(series, hidden?)` -- joint bounds with these guarantees: barMin clamped to 0 when all observed bars non-negative (positive-only tracks ground at bottom), barMax clamped to 0 when all non-positive, equal-bounds expanded +/-0.5, empty / no-finite -> unit defaults; `computeLineSparkBarLayout({series, hiddenSeries?, width, height, padding, barRatio?, barGap?, trackGap?, xMin?, xMax?, valueMin?, valueMax?, barMin?, barMax?})` returns `{series, bounds, innerWidth, innerHeight, barTrackTop, barTrackBottom, lineTrackTop, lineTrackBottom, barZeroY, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), lineColor, barColor, positiveBarColor, negativeBarColor, points, path, finalValue, minValue, maxValue, totalBar, finiteCount, totalCount, minIndex, maxIndex}`; per-point `{index, x, value, bar, px, py, barX, barY, barWidth, barHeight, barSign ('positive' | 'negative' | 'zero'), isMin, isMax}`; bar rect is signed around barZeroY (positive bars grow upward from zero, negative bars grow downward); barWidth derived from innerWidth / sample-count - barGap; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; barRatio clamped to [0.05, 0.95]; trackGap >= 0; honors hidden filter / bounds overrides; `describeLineSparkBarChart(series, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Sparkline with line + bar overlay across N series (K points). A: last <v>, range <vmin> to <vmax>, bar total <t>; ..." (No data when missing). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-spark-bar-aria-desc"` span; line paths + invisible hit circles `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node (chart-line-spark-bar / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -bars / -bar / -lines / -series-group / -path / -min-dot / -max-dot / -last-dot / -hit / -pill / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-value / -tooltip-bar / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-signed-bars, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-line-color, data-series-bar-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-final-value, data-series-min-value, data-series-max-value, data-series-total-bar, data-hovered; bars mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-bar, data-bar-sign; hits mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-hovered. Interaction: invisible hit circles centered on each point ensure pointer hits land reliably despite the tiny dots. Hover opens a small tooltip with x / value / bar rows. Click forwards to onPointClick. Tooltip dimensions are smaller than the full charts (min-w 120px, font-size 11px). 52 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLineSparkBarDefaultColor + 2 getLineSparkBarFinitePoints (drops non-finite all three fields, non-array) + 5 computeLineSparkBarBounds (empty -> unit, barMin clamped when all >= 0, not clamped with negatives, hidden filter, non-finite -> 0..1) + 13 computeLineSparkBarLayout (empty, degenerate, path + bar geometry, line+bar track split with trackGap, barRatio honored, barRatio clamped, barZeroY in bar track, positive above + negative below barZeroY, per-point isMin/isMax, hidden filter, bounds overrides, exposes finalValue/min/max/totalBar) + 2 describeLineSparkBarChart + 25 component render (empty, bar rects + hide, line + hide, signed bars with data-bar-sign, min/max dots + hide, last-value dot + hide, last-value pill (off by default + on), ARIA, tooltip with value + bar rows, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick, data-series-* stats, legend hidden default + shown on flag + uncontrolled toggle + onHiddenSeriesChange, data-signed-bars root attr, animate flag + class, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w505. Bump 1.11.541. |
| 11.524 | UI: chart-line-anomaly primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.542 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-anomaly.tsx` ships `<ChartLineAnomaly>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **detects statistical outliers via z-score** and highlights them with larger coloured markers. For each series the chart computes the mean and **sample standard deviation** (Bessel correction `sqrt(SS / (n-1))`) of finite y values, then z-scores every point and flags `|z| >= threshold` (default `2`) as either `'high'` (z >= threshold; red) or `'low'` (z <= -threshold; purple). The canonical "spike detection" / "outlier flag" / "alert when metric crosses 3-sigma" visualisation. Distinct from `<ChartLineMinMax>` (11.517; markers at the data-derived extremes -- always TWO markers regardless of distribution; anomaly highlights points whose STATISTICAL distance from mean exceeds threshold, could be 0 or many), `<ChartLinePercentile>` (11.514; percentile bands derived from MULTIPLE samples per x; anomaly works on single-sample-per-x and uses parametric Gaussian thresholds), `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` (11.513; windowed smoothing -- anomaly catches spikes against a GLOBAL mean), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502; per-point bounds supplied EXTERNALLY; anomaly DERIVES bounds from the data), `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512; regression), `<ChartLineBand>` (11.516), `<ChartLineThreshold>` (11.503) (external horizontal references vs data-derived). API: `series: readonly ChartLineAnomalySeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, highAnomalyColor?, lowAnomalyColor?, threshold?}`); chart-level `threshold?` (default 2); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `dotRadius` (3) / `anomalyRadius` (6); `lineOpacity` (1) / `bandOpacity` (0.15); `meanDashArray` ('4 3') / `boundDashArray` ('2 3') / `meanColor` ('#64748b') / `bandColor` ('#94a3b8') / `highAnomalyColor` ('#dc2626') / `lowAnomalyColor` ('#9333ea'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showBand` / `showMeanLine` / `showBoundLines` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Anomaly-aware line chart') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatZ(n)` (sign-aware fallback); `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_ANOMALY_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/ANOMALY_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/BAND_OPACITY/MEAN_DASH/BOUND_DASH/MEAN_COLOR/HIGH_COLOR/LOW_COLOR/BAND_COLOR/THRESHOLD/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineAnomalyDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineAnomalyFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `computeLineAnomalyStats(points)` -- returns `{finiteCount, mean, stddev, ok}`; uses sample stddev via Bessel correction; `ok=true` only when n>=2 AND stddev>0 (constant / single-sample series get ok=false -- no meaningful z-score is computable); non-array / empty -> all zeros + ok=false; drops non-finite samples; `computeLineAnomalyZScore(y, mean, stddev)` -- `(y - mean) / stddev`; returns 0 on non-finite inputs or `stddev <= 0`; `classifyLineAnomalyDirection(zScore, threshold?)` -- returns `'high' | 'low' | 'normal'`; INCLUSIVE at `|z| === threshold`; non-finite z -> 'normal'; non-finite / negative threshold falls back to default (2); `computeLineAnomalyLayout({series, threshold?, hiddenSeries?, showBand?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, totalAnomalies, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, highColor, lowColor, threshold, stats, points, path, meanY, upperY, lowerY, bandPath, bandValid, anomalyCount, highCount, lowCount, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, y, px, py, zScore, direction, isAnomaly}`; bandPath is a closed `M..L..L..L..Z` rectangle between upperY and lowerY across the inner width; y range expanded to include upper/lower bounds when band shown; mean line + bound lines only render when stats.ok=true; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; per-series threshold overrides chart-level; honors hidden filter; `describeLineAnomalyChart(series, threshold?, hidden?, formatValue?)` -- ARIA summary "Anomaly-aware line chart across N series (K points, M anomalies). A: mean <m>, stddev <s>, <c> anomalies (<h> high, <l> low) at threshold <t>; ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-anomaly-aria-desc"` span; line paths + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; band rect `role="graphics-symbol"`; dot aria-label includes z + anomaly direction. data-section on every node (chart-line-anomaly / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -bands / -band / -references / -reference-group / -mean-line / -bound-line / -series / -series-group / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-z / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-total-anomalies, data-threshold, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-threshold, data-series-mean, data-series-stddev, data-series-stats-ok, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-anomaly-count, data-series-high-count, data-series-low-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-z-score, data-direction, data-is-anomaly, data-hovered; bound lines mirror data-series-id, data-bound ('upper' | 'lower'). Tooltip surfaces series label + x + y + coloured z-score row (positive z tinted red for high anomaly, negative z tinted purple for low; normal in default text). Anomalous dots render with larger radius (anomalyRadius=6 vs dotRadius=3) AND coloured by direction so anomalies pop visually. Legend shows anomaly count per series. 60 vitest cases (4 defaults + 2 getLineAnomalyDefaultColor + 2 getLineAnomalyFinitePoints + 5 computeLineAnomalyStats (empty zeros, ok=false n<2, ok=false constant, sample stddev Bessel, drops non-finite) + 2 computeLineAnomalyZScore (formula + 0 on non-finite/zero stddev) + 4 classifyLineAnomalyDirection (high/low/normal, inclusive at threshold, non-finite z, fallback threshold) + 12 computeLineAnomalyLayout (empty, degenerate, detects high+low at default, per-series threshold override, ok=false yields empty band + 0 anomalies, y expansion to include band, showBand=false omits band, hidden filter, totalAnomalies recorded, bounds overrides, tick step, per-point z-score reported) + 4 describeLineAnomalyChart + 25 component render (empty, paths, band + hide + hide on ok=false, mean + bound lines + hide each, dots with data-direction + data-is-anomaly, hide dots, ARIA, tooltip z + direction, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick payload, data-series-* attrs, legend anomaly count, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onHiddenSeriesChange, hide legend, data-threshold + data-total-anomalies root attrs, animate flag + class, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w506. Bump 1.11.542. |
| 11.525 | UI: chart-line-residual primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.543 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-residual.tsx` ships `<ChartLineResidual>` -- pure-SVG multi-series **residual plot**. Takes paired observed and predicted values per x and plots `residual = observed - predicted` against a horizontal zero-reference line. Stems drop from each residual point to the zero line so over- vs under-prediction reads at a glance; the residual line itself overlays for trend visualisation. Per-series diagnostic stats (meanResidual, MAE, RMSE, max |r|, bias direction, positive/negative/zero counts) are exposed via the layout, the legend, and the auto-generated ARIA description. The canonical regression-diagnostic / model-evaluation visualisation: "is the model systematically over- or under-predicting? Where? By how much?". Distinct from `<ChartLineRate>` (11.521; first derivative -- delta PER INTERVAL; residual is observed-predicted at the SAME x), `<ChartLineComparison>` (11.511; difference shading between TWO curves; residual collapses each pair into one observed-minus-predicted value plotted against ZERO), `<ChartLineTarget>` (11.518; vs a FLAT target; residual is vs a per-point predicted value), `<ChartLineTrend>` (11.512; the regression line itself; residual plot is the standard regression DIAGNOSTIC for assessing fit), `<ChartLineAnomaly>` (11.524; z-score outliers on a SINGLE series; residual works on PAIRED observed/predicted samples), and `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510; per-point classification vs flat baseline; residual is the dual-data observed/predicted form). API: `series: readonly ChartLineResidualSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x, observed, predicted}[], color?, positiveColor?, negativeColor?}`); `biasEpsilon?` (default 0; widens equality band for bias classification); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.5) / `stemStrokeWidth` (1.5) / `dotRadius` (3); `lineOpacity` (0.8) / `stemOpacity` (0.7); `zeroDashArray` ('4 3') / `zeroColor` ('#0f172a') / `positiveColor` ('#16a34a') / `negativeColor` ('#dc2626'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showZeroLine` / `showLine` / `showStems` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Residual plot') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)` / `formatResidual(n)` (sign-aware fallback); `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_RESIDUAL_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/STEM_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/STEM_OPACITY/ZERO_DASH/ZERO_COLOR/POSITIVE_COLOR/NEGATIVE_COLOR/BIAS_EPSILON/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/PALETTE`; `getLineResidualDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineResidualFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter requiring ALL THREE fields (x, observed, predicted) finite; `computeResidual(observed, predicted)` -- `observed - predicted`; non-finite -> 0; `classifyLineResidualSign(residual, epsilon?)` -- `'positive' | 'negative' | 'zero'`; non-finite -> 'zero'; non-finite / negative epsilon falls back to 0; `computeLineResidualStats(points, biasEpsilon?)` -- returns `{finiteCount, meanResidual, mae, rmse, maxAbs, maxResidual, minResidual, bias, positiveCount, negativeCount, zeroCount}`; meanResidual = sum/n (the model bias: POSITIVE means model UNDER-predicts, NEGATIVE means OVER-predicts); MAE = mean absolute error; RMSE = sqrt(sum/n) (population, since residuals are observed errors not samples); maxAbs = max(|residual|); bias is 'positive' | 'negative' | 'unbiased' after epsilon band; drops non-finite samples; empty / non-array -> all zeros + bias='unbiased'; `computeLineResidualLayout({series, hiddenSeries?, biasEpsilon?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, zeroY, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, positiveColor, negativeColor, points, path, stats, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, observed, predicted, residual, px, py, stemY1, stemY2, sign}`; stemY2 always lands on the zero reference; y range ALWAYS expanded to include 0; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; honors hidden filter / bounds overrides; `describeLineResidualChart(series, hidden?, formatValue?, biasEpsilon?)` -- ARIA summary "Residual plot across N series (K points). A: mean residual <m> (<bias> bias), MAE <mae>, RMSE <rmse>, max |r| <maxAbs> (<p>+ / <n>-); ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-residual-aria-desc"` span; residual line + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; zero baseline `role="graphics-symbol"`; dot aria-label includes observed + predicted + residual. data-section on every node (chart-line-residual / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -zero-line / -series / -series-group / -stem / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-observed / -tooltip-predicted / -tooltip-residual / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-mean-residual, data-series-mae, data-series-rmse, data-series-max-abs, data-series-bias, data-series-positive-count, data-series-negative-count, data-series-zero-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-observed, data-predicted, data-residual, data-sign, data-hovered; stems mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-sign. Tooltip surfaces series label + x + observed row + predicted row + coloured residual row with `(under-predicted)` or `(over-predicted)` suffix when non-zero. Per-stem and per-dot fill colour follows the sign (green positive / red negative / line color zero). Legend shows "(RMSE <r>; <bias> bias)" per series. 53 vitest cases (3 defaults + 2 getLineResidualDefaultColor + 2 getLineResidualFinitePoints + 2 computeResidual + 4 classifyLineResidualSign + 6 computeLineResidualStats (empty, mean+MAE+RMSE, positive bias under-prediction, negative bias over-prediction, epsilon bias, drops non-finite) + 9 computeLineResidualLayout (empty, degenerate, layout points + stems, y expansion to include zero, zeroY in plot, stems land on zeroY, per-series stats exposed, hidden filter, bounds overrides, tick step) + 2 describeLineResidualChart + 23 component render (empty, line + stems + dots, hide line, hide stems, zero line + hide, per-point data-residual + data-sign, hide dots, ARIA, tooltip observed/predicted/residual + suffix, hide on leave + via prop, onPointClick, data-series-* stats, legend RMSE + bias, uncontrolled + controlled visibility + onHiddenSeriesChange, hide legend, animate flag + class, ref, displayName)) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. TypeScript clean for the new files. Exported via components/ui barrel. Reference /root/c4/arps-design-system-v1/. Branch c4/c4-mgr-auto. Worker auto-w507. Bump 1.11.543. |
| 11.526 | UI: chart-line-rolling-min-max primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.544 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-rolling-min-max.tsx` ships `<ChartLineRollingMinMax>` -- pure-SVG multi-series line chart that **shades the rolling min/max envelope** of the data over a sliding window. For each finite sample the chart computes the min and max of y values within a window of size `W` (default 5) using one of three modes (`trailing` / `centered` / `edge`) and paints a translucent band between them. Dashed envelope lines trace the min/max edges; the raw line overlays through the middle so noise vs envelope reads intuitively. The canonical "high-low channel" / "Donchian channel" visualisation used in finance, sensor monitoring, and any time series where you want to see local volatility envelopes. Distinct from `<ChartLineMinMax>` (11.517; ABSOLUTE extremes over the entire series -- two markers + horizontal lines; rolling tracks these LOCALLY as a sliding band), `<ChartLineMovingAvg>` (11.513; windowed AVERAGE -- same window-mode API but different aggregation), `<ChartLinePercentile>` (11.514; bands derived from MULTIPLE samples AT each x; rolling derives the band from a SLIDING WINDOW ACROSS x of single-sample-per-x data), `<ChartLineConfidence>` (11.502; per-point bounds supplied EXTERNALLY; rolling derives bounds from the data itself), `<ChartLineAnomaly>` (11.524; z-score outliers from GLOBAL mean + stddev; rolling is a LOCAL non-parametric envelope), `<ChartLineBaseline>` (11.510) / `<ChartLineBand>` (11.516) / `<ChartLineTarget>` (11.518) (horizontal references from outside the data). API: `series: readonly ChartLineRollingMinMaxSeries[]` (`{id, label, data: readonly {x,y}[], color?, bandColor?, window?, mode?}`); chart-level `window?` (default 5) / `mode?` (default 'trailing'); `hiddenSeries` / `defaultHiddenSeries` / `onHiddenSeriesChange`; `xMin`/`xMax`/`yMin`/`yMax`; `width` (560) / `height` (320) / `padding` (40) / `tickCount` (5); `strokeWidth` (1.75) / `envelopeStrokeWidth` (1) / `dotRadius` (3); `lineOpacity` (1) / `bandOpacity` (0.16) / `envelopeOpacity` (0.55); `envelopeDashArray` ('4 3'); `gridColor` / `axisColor`; `showAxis` / `showGrid` / `showDots` / `showLegend` / `showTooltip` / `showBand` / `showEnvelope` / `showLine` / `animate` (all true by default); `className` / `ariaLabel` (default 'Rolling min/max envelope chart') / `ariaDescription`; `formatValue(n)` / `formatX(n)`; `xLabel` / `yLabel`; `onPointClick({series, point})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_ROLLING_MIN_MAX_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/ENVELOPE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/LINE_OPACITY/BAND_OPACITY/ENVELOPE_OPACITY/ENVELOPE_DASH/WINDOW/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR/MODE/PALETTE`; `ALL_CHART_LINE_ROLLING_MIN_MAX_MODES`; `getLineRollingMinMaxDefaultColor(index)` -- 10-color cycle, NaN / +-Inf / negative -> color 0; `getLineRollingMinMaxFinitePoints(points)` -- finite-only filter; `normaliseLineRollingMinMaxWindow(window)` -- positive integer >= 1; non-finite / <1 / fractional / non-numeric clamp/floor to 1; `computeRollingMinMax(values, window, mode?)` -- canonical sliding helper; returns same-length `RollingMinMaxEntry[]` (`{min, max}` each `number | null`); non-finite values skipped within window (window where every value is non-finite produces `{null, null}`); modes: 'trailing' (default; `[i-W+1, i]`, valid `i >= W-1`), 'centered' (`[i-half, i+(W-1-half)]` where `half = floor((W-1)/2)`, valid only when both ends fit), 'edge' (same as trailing but leading positions take partial window so every index is valid); window > length under trailing/centered -> all nulls; non-array / empty -> []; invalid window normalises to 1 (passthrough); `buildLineRollingMinMaxBandPaths(points)` -- builds one closed polygon per contiguous run of `{px, pyMin, pyMax}` triples (all three finite); skips single-entry runs (no area); returns an array of `d` strings so adopters render multiple separate band regions when the envelope breaks at nulls; `buildLineRollingMinMaxEnvelopePath(points)` -- standard `M..L..` builder that breaks on null / non-finite py (gap rendering); `computeLineRollingMinMaxLayout({series, window?, mode?, hiddenSeries?, showBand?, width, height, padding, tickCount?, xMin?, xMax?, yMin?, yMax?})` returns `{series, xTicks, yTicks, xMin, xMax, yMin, yMax, innerWidth, innerHeight, totalPoints, visibleSeriesCount}`; per-series `{id, label, index (stable original), color, bandColor, window, mode, points, path, minPath, maxPath, bandPaths, validCount, finiteCount, totalCount}`; per-point `{index, x, y, px, py, min, max, pyMin, pyMax}`; y range expanded to include all observed rolling min/max samples; degenerate canvas / empty / all-hidden -> empty layout; honors hidden filter / bounds overrides; per-series window + mode overrides win; `describeLineRollingMinMaxChart(series, window?, mode?, hidden?)` -- ARIA summary "Rolling min/max envelope chart across N series (K points). A: window <W>, mode <m>; ..." (No data when empty / no finite). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-rolling-min-max-aria-desc"` span; raw line + dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; envelope paths + band polygons `role="graphics-symbol"`. data-section on every node (chart-line-rolling-min-max / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -axes / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -x-label / -y-label / -bands / -band / -series / -series-group / -envelope (data-envelope-kind 'min'|'max') / -path / -dot / -tooltip / -tooltip-label / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-y / -tooltip-min / -tooltip-max / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-button / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats); root mirrors data-series-count, data-visible-series-count, data-total-points, data-window, data-mode, data-animate; series group mirrors data-series-id, data-series-index, data-series-color, data-series-band-color, data-series-window, data-series-mode, data-series-point-count, data-series-finite-count, data-series-valid-count, data-hovered; dots mirror data-series-id, data-point-index, data-x, data-y, data-rolling-min (empty string when window unfilled), data-rolling-max, data-hovered; envelopes mirror data-series-id, data-envelope-kind. Tooltip surfaces series label + x + bold y + `rolling max (W): <v>` / `rolling min (W): <v>` rows with value or `n/a` when the window cannot be filled.
