| 11.577 | UI: chart-line-rsi primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.595 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-rsi.tsx` ships `<ChartLineRsi>` -- pure-SVG line chart with a **Relative Strength Index (RSI)** oscillator sub-panel. The price line sits in the TOP panel; the BOTTOM panel renders the RSI line bounded to 0-100, with shaded **overbought** and **oversold** zones. **The computation:** `computeLineRsi(values, period)` is Welles Wilder's RSI -- (1) period-over-period changes are split into GAINS (`max(delta, 0)`) and LOSSES (`max(-delta, 0)`); (2) the average gain and average loss are WILDER-SMOOTHED (the first average is the simple mean of the first `period` changes, then `avg = (avg*(period-1) + change)/period`); (3) `RSI = 100 - 100/(1 + avgGain/avgLoss)`, bounded to [0,100]. Three edge cases are handled deterministically: an all-gain window reads **100**, an all-loss window reads **0**, a flat window reads **50**; indices before the window is full are `null`. `runLineRsi` classifies each reading into a ZONE: `overbought` at or above the overbought threshold (default 70), `oversold` at or below the oversold threshold (default 30), `neutral` between. The component fixture (period 2) rises 10 -> 30 then falls hard to 5: the RSI is **[null,null,100,33.333,25]**, which visits the overbought, neutral and oversold zones in turn -- one overbought reading, one oversold. **Distinct from neighbouring primitives:** RSI is a BOUNDED 0-100 momentum oscillator built from the RATIO of Wilder-smoothed gains to losses, with shaded overbought/oversold zones -- `<ChartLineMacd>` is an UNBOUNDED momentum study (a difference of EMAs), `<ChartLineMomentum>` is a derivative oscillator, `<ChartLineZscore>` is a rolling standardised score; none compute the gain/loss ratio, the 0-100 bound or the overbought/oversold zoning. All exported helpers carry a `LineRsi` infix so the `export *` barrel line cannot collide. API: `data` -- a single `ChartLineRsiPoint[]` (`{x, value}`); `period` (the RSI period; default 14); `overbought` / `oversold` (the zone thresholds; defaults 70 / 30, clamped to [0,100]); `pricePanelRatio` (the fraction of the height given to the price panel; default 0.58, clamped to [0.3, 0.8]); `gap` (the pixel gap between the stacked panels); `strokeWidth` / `dotRadius` / `priceColor` / `rsiColor` / `overboughtColor` / `oversoldColor` / `gridColor` / `axisColor`; toggle flags `showAxis`/`showGrid`/`showDots` (default false)/`showRsi`/`showZones`/`showTooltip`/`showConfigBadge`/`showLegend`/`animate`; controlled + uncontrolled visibility (`hiddenSeries` keys `price` / `rsi` / `zones`); standard sizing/format/a11y props; `formatValue` / `formatX`; `onPointClick({point})` / `onSeriesToggle({seriesId, hidden})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_RSI_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/GAP/PRICE_PANEL_RATIO/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/PERIOD/OVERBOUGHT/OVERSOLD/PRICE_COLOR/RSI_COLOR/OVERBOUGHT_COLOR/OVERSOLD_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR`; `getLineRsiFinitePoints`; `normalizeLineRsiPeriod(period, fallback)`; `computeLineRsi(values, period)` -- the Wilder RSI series (`(number|null)[]`); `runLineRsi(points, options?)` -- the RSI plus the per-sample zone classification; returns `{series, period, overbought, oversold, rsi, samples, overboughtCount, oversoldCount, ok}`; each sample `{index, x, price, rsi, zone}`; `computeLineRsiLayout({data, ...})` -- stacks the price panel above the RSI panel (the RSI panel y axis fixed 0-100); projects `pricePath`, `priceDots`, `rsiPath`, `rsiMarkers`, the `overboughtRect` / `oversoldRect` zone rects and the threshold lines; degenerate canvas / fewer than 2 samples -> ok=false; `describeLineRsiChart(data, options?)` -- ARIA summary mentions RSI + overbought + oversold (No data when missing). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-rsi-aria-desc"` span; the price line + every price dot + every RSI marker `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node (chart-line-rsi / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -zones / -overbought-zone / -oversold-zone / -threshold-line / -axes / -axis-group / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -panel-labels / -panel-label / -price-path / -dots / -dot / -rsi-line / -markers / -marker / -tooltip / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-price / -tooltip-rsi / -tooltip-zone / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats / -badge / -badge-icon / -badge-period / -badge-zones); root mirrors `data-period`, `data-overbought-count`, `data-oversold-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`; axis / tick / grid / panel-label nodes carry `data-panel="price"|"rsi"`; RSI markers expose `data-rsi` and `data-zone`; threshold lines carry `data-kind` (overbought / oversold). Tooltip on a price dot or an RSI marker shows x, price, the RSI value and the zone. Config badge in top-left calls out `RSI p=<period> ob=<overbought> os=<oversold>`. The legend has three toggle items (Price / RSI / Zones). 55 vitest cases (defaults + getLineRsiFinitePoints, normalizeLineRsiPeriod incl. keeps a positive integer + **a sub-1 period falls back** + floors a fractional period + non-finite falls back, computeLineRsi incl. **null until the window is full** + empty -> [] + **an all-gain window reads 100** + **an all-loss window reads 0** + **a flat window reads 50** + **Wilder-smooths the gains and losses**, runLineRsi incl. empty / single point -> ok=false + resolves the default period + thresholds + **computes the RSI series** + **classifies each sample into a zone** + counts the overbought + oversold readings + honours custom thresholds + sorts by x, computeLineRsiLayout incl. empty/degenerate -> ok=false + **stacks a price panel above an RSI panel** + price + RSI paths + **an RSI marker per defined reading** + **the RSI y axis spans 0 to 100** + the overbought + oversold zone rects + zone counts + period, describeLineRsiChart incl. No data + summary mentions RSI + overbought + oversold, component render incl. empty / price line path / RSI line + hide / **an RSI marker per defined reading** / **colours RSI markers by zone** / the overbought + oversold zones + hide / the threshold lines / panel labels / price dots off by default + on / config badge period + thresholds + hide / ARIA region + img + sr-only desc / root data-* / RSI marker data-* / tooltip on an RSI marker (price + rsi + zone) + hide on leave / omit tooltip via prop / onPointClick from a marker / legend three toggle items + toggle / the legend toggle hides the zones / hide legend / animate flag + class / ref / displayName / custom ariaLabel) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.578 | UI: chart-line-stochastic primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.596 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-stochastic.tsx` ships `<ChartLineStochastic>` -- pure-SVG line chart with a **stochastic oscillator** sub-panel. The price line sits in the TOP panel; the BOTTOM panel plots the **%K** and **%D** lines, bounded to 0-100, with shaded overbought and oversold zones. **The computation:** `computeLineStochasticK(values, period)` is George Lane's %K -- for each period it measures where the current value sits within its trailing high-low range, `%K = 100 * (value - lowestLow) / (highestHigh - lowestLow)` over a window of `period` values; a flat window (zero range) reads 50, the middle of a range reads 50, the top reads 100 and the bottom 0; indices before the window is full are `null`. `computeLineStochasticD(kValues, dPeriod)` is the **%D** signal line -- a simple moving average of %K over `dPeriod` values, defined only where the full %K window is itself defined. `runLineStochastic` classifies each reading into a ZONE from %K: `overbought` at or above the overbought threshold (default 80), `oversold` at or below the oversold threshold (default 20), `neutral` between. The component fixture (period 3, %D period 2) makes the math exact: %K is **[null,null,100,0,0,100]**, %D is **[null,null,null,50,0,50]** -- two overbought readings, two oversold. **Distinct from neighbouring primitives:** both the stochastic and `<ChartLineRsi>` are 0-100 oscillators with overbought/oversold zones, but the COMPUTATION is different -- RSI is a gain/loss RATIO whereas the stochastic is a RANGE-POSITION measure (where the close sits between its recent low and high) -- and the stochastic plots TWO lines (%K and its %D signal SMA) where RSI plots one; `<ChartLineMacd>` is an unbounded EMA-difference study and `<ChartLineMomentum>` is a derivative oscillator, neither computing the trailing range position. All exported helpers carry a `LineStochastic` infix so the `export *` barrel line cannot collide. API: `data` -- a single `ChartLineStochasticPoint[]` (`{x, value}`); `period` / `dPeriod` (the %K lookback and the %D smoothing period; defaults 14 / 3); `overbought` / `oversold` (the zone thresholds; defaults 80 / 20, clamped to [0,100]); `pricePanelRatio` (the fraction of the height given to the price panel; default 0.58, clamped to [0.3, 0.8]); `gap` (the pixel gap between the stacked panels); `strokeWidth` / `dotRadius` / `priceColor` / `kColor` / `dColor` / `overboughtColor` / `oversoldColor` / `gridColor` / `axisColor`; toggle flags `showAxis`/`showGrid`/`showDots` (default false)/`showK`/`showD`/`showZones`/`showTooltip`/`showConfigBadge`/`showLegend`/`animate`; controlled + uncontrolled visibility (`hiddenSeries` keys `price` / `k` / `d` / `zones`); standard sizing/format/a11y props; `formatValue` / `formatX`; `onPointClick({point})` / `onSeriesToggle({seriesId, hidden})`. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_STOCHASTIC_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/GAP/PRICE_PANEL_RATIO/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/K_PERIOD/D_PERIOD/OVERBOUGHT/OVERSOLD/PRICE_COLOR/K_COLOR/D_COLOR/OVERBOUGHT_COLOR/OVERSOLD_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR`; `getLineStochasticFinitePoints`; `normalizeLineStochasticPeriod(period, fallback)`; `computeLineStochasticK(values, period)` -- the %K series; `computeLineStochasticD(kValues, dPeriod)` -- the %D SMA; `runLineStochastic(points, options?)` -- returns `{series, period, dPeriod, overbought, oversold, k, d, samples, overboughtCount, oversoldCount, ok}`; each sample `{index, x, price, k, d, zone}`; `computeLineStochasticLayout({data, ...})` -- stacks the price panel above the stochastic panel (the stochastic panel y axis fixed 0-100); projects `pricePath`, `priceDots`, `kPath`, `dPath`, `kMarkers`, the `overboughtRect` / `oversoldRect` zone rects and the threshold lines; degenerate canvas / fewer than 2 samples -> ok=false; `describeLineStochasticChart(data, options?)` -- ARIA summary mentions stochastic + percent-K + percent-D (No data when missing). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-stochastic-aria-desc"` span; the price line + every price dot + every %K marker `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`. data-section on every node (chart-line-stochastic / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -zones / -overbought-zone / -oversold-zone / -threshold-line / -axes / -axis-group / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -panel-labels / -panel-label / -price-path / -dots / -dot / -d-line / -k-line / -k-markers / -k-marker / -tooltip / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-price / -tooltip-k / -tooltip-d / -tooltip-zone / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats / -badge / -badge-icon / -badge-period / -badge-zones); root mirrors `data-period`, `data-d-period`, `data-overbought-count`, `data-oversold-count`, `data-total-points`, `data-animate`; axis / tick / grid / panel-label nodes carry `data-panel="price"|"stoch"`; %K markers expose `data-k` and `data-zone`; threshold lines carry `data-kind` (overbought / oversold). Tooltip on a price dot or a %K marker shows x, price, %K, %D and the zone. Config badge in top-left calls out `STOCH k=<period> d=<dPeriod> ob=<overbought> os=<oversold>`. The legend has four toggle items (Price / %K / %D / Zones). 58 vitest cases (defaults + getLineStochasticFinitePoints, normalizeLineStochasticPeriod incl. keeps a positive integer + **a sub-1 period falls back** + floors a fractional period + non-finite falls back, computeLineStochasticK incl. **null until the window is full** + empty -> [] + **measures the value position in the trailing range** + **a flat window reads 50** + the middle of the range reads 50, computeLineStochasticD incl. **the SMA of %K over the d-period** + a d-period of 1 echoes %K + null where the %K window has a gap + empty -> [], runLineStochastic incl. empty / single point -> ok=false + resolves the default periods + thresholds + **computes the %K and %D series** + **classifies each sample into a zone from %K** + counts the overbought + oversold readings + honours custom thresholds + sorts by x, computeLineStochasticLayout incl. empty/degenerate -> ok=false + **stacks a price panel above a stochastic panel** + price + %K + %D paths + **a %K marker per defined reading** + **the stochastic y axis spans 0 to 100** + the overbought + oversold zone rects + zone counts + periods, describeLineStochasticChart incl. No data + summary mentions stochastic + percent-K + percent-D, component render incl. empty / price line path / %K + %D lines + hide / **a %K marker per defined reading** / **colours %K markers by zone** / the overbought + oversold zones + hide / the threshold lines / panel labels / price dots off by default + on / config badge periods + thresholds + hide / ARIA region + img + sr-only desc / root data-* / %K marker data-* / tooltip on a %K marker (price + K + D + zone) + hide on leave / omit tooltip via prop / onPointClick from a marker / legend four toggle items + toggle / the legend toggle hides the %K line / hide legend / animate flag + class / ref / displayName / custom ariaLabel) all pass under vitest 4.1.5. | 11.579 | UI: chart-line-atr primitive | done | SHIPPED v1.11.597 (mgr-direct on c4/c4-mgr-auto). New `web/src/components/ui/chart-line-atr.tsx` ships `<ChartLineAtr>` -- pure-SVG line chart with an **Average True Range (ATR) volatility sub-panel**. The price line occupies the top panel; the bottom panel plots the ATR as a standalone volatility study, with the raw per-period **true range** drawn behind it as faint bottom-anchored bars. Both panels share one x-axis. **Indicator math:** `computeLineAtrTrueRanges(values)` is the per-period true range -- for a single-value series the true range is the absolute period-over-period change `trueRange[i] = |values[i] - values[i-1]|` for i >= 1; index 0 has no prior value and reads `null`. `computeLineAtr(values, period)` is **Welles Wilder's Average True Range**: the first ATR, at index `period`, seeds with the simple mean of the first `period` true ranges (`atr[period] = mean(trueRange[1..period])`); every later value uses **Wilder smoothing** `atr[i] = (atr[i-1]*(period-1) + trueRange[i]) / period`. Indices before the window fills read `null`, and the ATR is non-negative throughout since every true range is an absolute value. **Worked fixture:** `values = [10,20,30,20,40,30]`, `period 2` -> true range `[null,10,10,10,20,10]`, then `atr[2] = mean(10,10) = 10`, `atr[3] = (10*1+10)/2 = 10`, `atr[4] = (10*1+20)/2 = 15`, `atr[5] = (15*1+10)/2 = 12.5` -> atr `[null,null,10,10,15,12.5]`, atrFinal 12.5, atrMax 15. **Distinct from chart-line-keltner:** Keltner uses the ATR only to **scale a band envelope** around an EMA centre overlaid on the price; chart-line-atr displays the ATR **itself** as a volatility line in a dedicated sub-panel -- the volatility study, not a derived band. **Distinct from chart-line-bollinger:** Bollinger bands measure dispersion via the rolling standard deviation; ATR measures the typical absolute move (different statistic, band overlay vs sub-panel line). **Distinct from chart-line-macd/-rsi/-stochastic:** those sub-panels plot momentum / range-position oscillators; chart-line-atr plots a non-negative volatility magnitude. API: `data: readonly ChartLineAtrPoint[]` (`{x, value}`); `period` (default 14, normalized to a positive integer); sizing `width`/`height`/`padding`/`gap`/`pricePanelRatio`/`tickCount`; styling `strokeWidth`/`dotRadius`/`priceColor`/`atrColor`/`trueRangeColor`/`gridColor`/`axisColor`; toggle flags `showAxis`/`showGrid`/`showDots`/`showAtr`/`showTrueRange`/`showTooltip`/`showConfigBadge`/`showLegend`/`animate`; controlled + uncontrolled series visibility (`hiddenSeries`/`defaultHiddenSeries`/`onHiddenSeriesChange`); `formatValue`/`formatX`; `onPointClick({point})`; `onSeriesToggle({seriesId, hidden})`; standard a11y props. Pure helpers exported: `DEFAULT_CHART_LINE_ATR_WIDTH/HEIGHT/PADDING/GAP/PRICE_PANEL_RATIO/TICK_COUNT/STROKE_WIDTH/DOT_RADIUS/PERIOD/PRICE_COLOR/ATR_COLOR/TRUE_RANGE_COLOR/GRID_COLOR/AXIS_COLOR`; `getLineAtrFinitePoints` (drops non-finite x/value); `normalizeLineAtrPeriod(period, fallback)` (non-finite or sub-1 falls back, fractional floors); `computeLineAtrTrueRanges(values)`; `computeLineAtr(values, period)`; `runLineAtr(points, options?)` -- sorts finite points by x, computes true range + ATR, returns `{series, period, trueRange, atr, samples, atrFinal, atrMax, ok}`; ok=false for fewer than 2 points; `computeLineAtrLayout(options)` -- stacks a price panel above an ATR panel sharing one x-axis; the ATR panel y-range floors at 0 and spans the larger of the peak ATR and peak true range so the faint true-range bars and the ATR line share one scale; returns panels, ticks, the price path, ATR path, ATR markers (only where ATR is defined), and bottom-anchored true-range bars (only where true range is defined); `describeLineAtrChart(data, options?)` -- ARIA summary mentioning Average True Range + volatility + period + peak ATR (No data when fewer than 2 points). ARIA: root `<div role="region">` + `aria-label` + `aria-describedby`, SVG `role="img"` + same `aria-label`, sr-only `data-section="chart-line-atr-aria-desc"` span; price path + price dots `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}`; ATR markers `role="graphics-symbol" tabIndex={0}` with the ATR value in the aria-label. data-section on every node (chart-line-atr / -canvas / -aria-desc / -svg / -grid / -grid-line / -true-range / -true-range-bar / -axes / -axis-group / -axis / -ticks / -tick / -tick-label / -panel-labels / -panel-label / -price-path / -dots / -dot / -atr-line / -markers / -marker / -tooltip / -tooltip-x / -tooltip-price / -tooltip-true-range / -tooltip-atr / -legend / -legend-item / -legend-swatch / -legend-label / -legend-stats / -badge / -badge-icon / -badge-period / -badge-max); root mirrors `data-period`, `data-atr-final`, `data-atr-max`, `data-total-points`, `data-empty`, `data-animate`. Tooltip on price dots and ATR markers shows x, the bold price, the true range, and the ATR for the hovered period. Config badge in top-left calls out `ATR p=<period> max=<peakATR>`. Three-series legend (Price / ATR / True Range) with per-series toggle plus a `final ATR <value>` stat. 81 vitest cases (getLineAtrFinitePoints incl. null/undefined + non-finite x/value drops, normalizeLineAtrPeriod incl. floor + sub-1/NaN/negative fallback, computeLineAtrTrueRanges incl. **absolute period-over-period change** + index 0 null + direction-independent + non-array + single-element, computeLineAtr incl. **the Wilder fixture [null,null,10,10,15,12.5]** + simple-mean seed + Wilder smoothing after the seed + shorter-than-period+1 -> all null + non-array + pre-window nulls + sub-1 period clamp + **non-negative ATR**, runLineAtr incl. ok flags + fewer-than-2 / empty -> not ok + true range series + ATR series + atrFinal + atrMax + one sample per point + true range / ATR carried onto samples + **sorts unsorted input by x** + default period, computeLineAtrLayout incl. ok / not-ok guards + **price panel stacked above the ATR panel** + period + atrFinal/atrMax + total points + **atrYMax = larger of peak ATR and peak true range (20)** + one price dot per point + ATR marker only where ATR defined (4) + true-range bar only where true range defined (5) + **bottom-anchored bars to the ATR panel baseline** + non-empty price + ATR paths + markers inside the ATR panel + degenerate canvas -> not ok, describeLineAtrChart incl. mentions Average True Range + volatility + period + peak ATR + No data, component render incl. root region / data-empty false + true / data-period / ARIA desc / price path / ATR line / one ATR marker per defined value (4) / one true-range bar per defined value (5) / both panel labels / config badge period + peak / hide badge / three legend items / legend toggle hides a series + drops the ATR line / onSeriesToggle payload / hide ATR via showAtr / hide true-range bars via showTrueRange / price dots via showDots / **tooltip on ATR marker hover shows atr 15 + true range 20** / clears tooltip on leave / onPointClick / fade-in class + omit via animate / ref / custom class / region role / final ATR in the legend stats) all pass under vitest 4.1.5.
